authors_text: Xiaoya Chen,Jingkuan Song,Pengpeng Zeng,Lianli Gao,Heng Tao Shen
title: Support-set based Multi-modal Representation Enhancement for Video Captioning
title_zh: 基于支持集的视频字幕多模态表示增强
abstract: Video captioning is a challenging task that necessitates a thorough comprehension of visual scenes. Existing methods follow a typical one-to-one mapping, which concentrates on a limited sample space while ignoring the intrinsic semantic associations between samples, resulting in rigid and uninformative expressions. To address this issue, we propose a novel and flexible framework, namely Support-set based Multi-modal Representation Enhancement (SMRE) model, to mine rich information in a semantic subspace shared between samples. Specifically, we propose a Support-set Construction (SC) module to construct a support-set to learn underlying connections between samples and obtain semantic-related visual elements. During this process, we design a Semantic Space Transformation (SST) module to constrain relative distance and administrate multi-modal interactions in a self-supervised way. Extensive experiments on MSVD and MSR-VTT datasets demonstrate that our SMRE achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Video captioning is a challenging task that necessitates a thorough comprehension of visual scenes. Existing methods follow a typical one-to-one mapping, which concentrates on a limited sample space while ignoring the intrinsic semantic associations between samples, resulting in rigid and uninformative expressions. To address this issue, we propose a novel and flexible framework, namely Support-set based Multi-modal Representation Enhancement (SMRE) model, to mine rich information in a semantic subspace shared between samples. Specifically, we propose a Support-set Construction (SC) module to construct a support-set to learn underlying connections between samples and obtain semantic-related visual elements. During this process, we design a Semantic Space Transformation (SST) module to constrain relative distance and administrate multi-modal interactions in a self-supervised way. Extensive experiments on MSVD and MSR-VTT datasets demonstrate that our SMRE achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 视频字幕是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要彻底理解视觉场景。现有的方法遵循典型的一对一映射，集中于有限的样本空间，而忽略了样本之间内在的语义关联，导致表达僵化且缺乏信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖且灵活的框架，即基于支持集的多模态表示增强（SMRE）模型，以在样本之间共享的语义子空间中挖掘丰富的信息。具体来说，我们提出了一个支持集构建（SC）模块来构建一个支持集来学习样本之间的底层连接并获得语义相关的视觉元素。在此过程中，我们设计了语义空间转换（SST）模块来约束相对距离并以自我监督的方式管理多模态交互。对 MSVD 和 MSR-VTT 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 SMRE 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于支持集的多模态表示增强框架（SMRE），用于改进视频字幕生成任务，通过挖掘样本间的语义关联提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕方法采用一对一映射，局限于有限样本空间，忽视样本间的语义关联，导致生成表达僵化且信息不足。
AI.method: 设计支持集构建模块（SC）学习样本间潜在联系，并引入语义空间变换模块（SST）以自监督方式约束多模态交互，增强语义相关性。
AI.result: 在MSVD和MSR-VTT数据集上实验表明，SMRE模型达到当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘跨样本语义子空间中的关联信息，SMRE有效提升了多模态表示能力，为视频字幕生成提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Mike He Zhu,Léna Néhale Ezzine,Dianbo Liu,Yoshua Bengio
title: FedILC: Weighted Geometric Mean and Invariant Gradient Covariance for Federated Learning on Non-IID Data
title_zh: FedILC：非独立同分布数据联邦学习的加权几何均值和不变梯度协方差
abstract: Federated learning is a distributed machine learning approach which enables a shared server model to learn by aggregating the locally-computed parameter updates with the training data from spatially-distributed client silos. Though successfully possessing advantages in both scale and privacy, federated learning is hurt by domain shift problems, where the learning models are unable to generalize to unseen domains whose data distribution is non-i.i.d. with respect to the training domains. In this study, we propose the Federated Invariant Learning Consistency (FedILC) approach, which leverages the gradient covariance and the geometric mean of Hessians to capture both inter-silo and intra-silo consistencies of environments and unravel the domain shift problems in federated networks. The benchmark and real-world dataset experiments bring evidence that our proposed algorithm outperforms conventional baselines and similar federated learning algorithms. This is relevant to various fields such as medical healthcare, computer vision, and the Internet of Things (IoT). The code is released at https://github.com/mikemikezhu/FedILC.
summary: Federated learning is a distributed machine learning approach which enables a shared server model to learn by aggregating the locally-computed parameter updates with the training data from spatially-distributed client silos. Though successfully possessing advantages in both scale and privacy, federated learning is hurt by domain shift problems, where the learning models are unable to generalize to unseen domains whose data distribution is non-i.i.d. with respect to the training domains. In this study, we propose the Federated Invariant Learning Consistency (FedILC) approach, which leverages the gradient covariance and the geometric mean of Hessians to capture both inter-silo and intra-silo consistencies of environments and unravel the domain shift problems in federated networks. The benchmark and real-world dataset experiments bring evidence that our proposed algorithm outperforms conventional baselines and similar federated learning algorithms. This is relevant to various fields such as medical healthcare, computer vision, and the Internet of Things (IoT). The code is released at https://github.com/mikemikezhu/FedILC.
abstract_zh: 联合学习是一种分布式机器学习方法，它使共享服务器模型能够通过将本地计算的参数更新与来自空间分布式客户端孤岛的训练数据聚合来进行学习。尽管联邦学习在规模和隐私方面成功地拥有优势，但它受到领域转移问题的损害，其中学习模型无法泛化到数据分布非独立同分布的未知领域。关于培训领域。在本研究中，我们提出了联邦不变学习一致性（FedILC）方法，该方法利用梯度协方差和 Hessians 的几何平均值来捕获环境的孤岛间和孤岛内一致性，并解决联邦网络中的域转移问题。基准和现实数据集实验证明我们提出的算法优于传统基线和类似的联邦学习算法。这与医疗保健、计算机视觉和物联网（IoT）等各个领域相关。代码发布于 https://github.com/mikemikezhu/FedILC。

AI.tldr: 提出FedILC方法，通过加权几何均值和不变梯度协方差解决联邦学习中的非独立同分布数据领域迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在非独立同分布数据中存在领域迁移问题，导致模型泛化能力不足，需新方法解决。
AI.method: FedILC方法结合梯度协方差和Hessian几何均值，捕捉环境间和环境内的一致性，缓解领域迁移问题。
AI.result: 实验显示FedILC在基准和真实数据集上优于传统方法和类似联邦学习算法。
AI.conclusion: FedILC有效缓解联邦学习中的领域迁移问题，适用于医疗、计算机视觉和物联网等领域。

authors_text: Minh Tran,Viet-Khoa Vo-Ho,Ngan T. H. Le
title: 3DConvCaps: 3DUnet with Convolutional Capsule Encoder for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 3DConvCaps：具有用于医学图像分割的卷积胶囊编码器的 3DUnet
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved promising results in medical image segmentation. However, CNNs require lots of training data and are incapable of handling pose and deformation of objects. Furthermore, their pooling layers tend to discard important information such as positions as well as CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a recent new architecture that has achieved better robustness in part-whole representation learning by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which has shown potential results on popular tasks such as digit classification and object segmentation. In this paper, we propose a 3D encoder-decoder network with Convolutional Capsule Encoder (called 3DConvCaps) to learn lower-level features (short-range attention) with convolutional layers while modeling the higher-level features (long-range dependence) with capsule layers. Our experiments on multiple datasets including iSeg-2017, Hippocampus, and Cardiac demonstrate that our 3D 3DConvCaps network considerably outperforms previous capsule networks and 3D-UNets. We further conduct ablation studies of network efficiency and segmentation performance under various configurations of convolution layers and capsule layers at both contracting and expanding paths.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved promising results in medical image segmentation. However, CNNs require lots of training data and are incapable of handling pose and deformation of objects. Furthermore, their pooling layers tend to discard important information such as positions as well as CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a recent new architecture that has achieved better robustness in part-whole representation learning by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which has shown potential results on popular tasks such as digit classification and object segmentation. In this paper, we propose a 3D encoder-decoder network with Convolutional Capsule Encoder (called 3DConvCaps) to learn lower-level features (short-range attention) with convolutional layers while modeling the higher-level features (long-range dependence) with capsule layers. Our experiments on multiple datasets including iSeg-2017, Hippocampus, and Cardiac demonstrate that our 3D 3DConvCaps network considerably outperforms previous capsule networks and 3D-UNets. We further conduct ablation studies of network efficiency and segmentation performance under various configurations of convolution layers and capsule layers at both contracting and expanding paths.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在医学图像分割方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，CNN 需要大量训练数据，并且无法处理物体的姿态和变形。此外，它们的池化层往往会丢弃重要信息，例如位置，而且 CNN 对旋转和仿射变换很敏感。胶囊网络是一种最新的新架构，通过用动态路由和卷积步长替换池化层，在部分整体表示学习中实现了更好的鲁棒性，这在数字分类和对象分割等流行任务上显示出了潜在的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有卷积胶囊编码器（称为 3DConvCaps）的 3D 编码器-解码器网络，用于通过卷积层学习较低级别的特征（短程注意力），同时使用胶囊层对较高级别的特征（远程依赖）进行建模。我们对 iSeg-2017、Hippocampus 和 Cardiac 等多个数据集进行的实验表明，我们的 3D 3DConvCaps 网络大大优于以前的胶囊网络和 3D-UNet。我们进一步在收缩和扩展路径上的卷积层和胶囊层的各种配置下对网络效率和分割性能进行消融研究。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合卷积胶囊编码器的3D网络（3DConvCaps）用于医学图像分割，以解决传统CNN在处理姿态变化和变形时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医学图像分割中存在数据需求大、对姿态和变形处理能力差的问题，而胶囊网络通过动态路由和卷积步长替代池化层，能更好地处理部分-整体关系，提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计了一个3D编码器-解码器网络，使用卷积层提取低级特征（短距离注意力），胶囊层建模高级特征（长距离依赖），结合动态路由机制，替代传统池化层。
AI.result: 在iSeg-2017、海马体和心脏数据集上的实验表明，3DConvCaps在分割性能上显著优于传统胶囊网络和3D-UNet，并通过消融研究验证了网络配置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 3DConvCaps通过结合卷积和胶囊机制，有效提升了医学图像分割的鲁棒性和准确性，为处理复杂变形和姿态变化提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种结合卷积胶囊编码器的3D网络（3DConvCaps）用于医学图像分割，以解决传统CNN在处理姿态变化和变形时的不足。

ai_content.result: 在iSeg-2017、海马体和心脏数据集上的实验表明，3DConvCaps在分割性能上显著优于传统胶囊网络和3D-UNet，并通过消融研究验证了网络配置的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 3DConvCaps通过结合卷积和胶囊机制，有效提升了医学图像分割的鲁棒性和准确性，为处理复杂变形和姿态变化提供了新思路。

search_text: 3DConvCaps: 3DUnet with Convolutional Capsule Encoder for Medical Image Segmentation 3DConvCaps：具有用于医学图像分割的卷积胶囊编码器的 3DUnet Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved promising results in medical image segmentation. However, CNNs require lots of training data and are incapable of handling pose and deformation of objects. Furthermore, their pooling layers tend to discard important information such as positions as well as CNNs are sensitive to rotation and affine transformation. Capsule network is a recent new architecture that has achieved better robustness in part-whole representation learning by replacing pooling layers with dynamic routing and convolutional strides, which has shown potential results on popular tasks such as digit classification and object segmentation. In this paper, we propose a 3D encoder-decoder network with Convolutional Capsule Encoder (called 3DConvCaps) to learn lower-level features (short-range attention) with convolutional layers while modeling the higher-level features (long-range dependence) with capsule layers. Our experiments on multiple datasets including iSeg-2017, Hippocampus, and Cardiac demonstrate that our 3D 3DConvCaps network considerably outperforms previous capsule networks and 3D-UNets. We further conduct ablation studies of network efficiency and segmentation performance under various configurations of convolution layers and capsule layers at both contracting and expanding paths. 卷积神经网络（CNN）在医学图像分割方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，CNN 需要大量训练数据，并且无法处理物体的姿态和变形。此外，它们的池化层往往会丢弃重要信息，例如位置，而且 CNN 对旋转和仿射变换很敏感。胶囊网络是一种最新的新架构，通过用动态路由和卷积步长替换池化层，在部分整体表示学习中实现了更好的鲁棒性，这在数字分类和对象分割等流行任务上显示出了潜在的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有卷积胶囊编码器（称为 3DConvCaps）的 3D 编码器-解码器网络，用于通过卷积层学习较低级别的特征（短程注意力），同时使用胶囊层对较高级别的特征（远程依赖）进行建模。我们对 iSeg-2017、Hippocampus 和 Cardiac 等多个数据集进行的实验表明，我们的 3D 3DConvCaps 网络大大优于以前的胶囊网络和 3D-UNet。我们进一步在收缩和扩展路径上的卷积层和胶囊层的各种配置下对网络效率和分割性能进行消融研究。 提出一种结合卷积胶囊编码器的3D网络（3DConvCaps）用于医学图像分割，以解决传统CNN在处理姿态变化和变形时的不足。 Minh Tran,Viet-Khoa Vo-Ho,Ngan T. H. Le cs.CV

title: Free Lunch for Surgical Video Understanding by Distilling Self-Supervisions
title_zh: 通过提炼自我监督来理解手术视频的免费午餐
abstract: Self-supervised learning has witnessed great progress in vision and NLP; recently, it also attracted much attention to various medical imaging modalities such as X-ray, CT, and MRI. Existing methods mostly focus on building new pretext self-supervision tasks such as reconstruction, orientation, and masking identification according to the properties of medical images. However, the publicly available self-supervision models are not fully exploited. In this paper, we present a powerful yet efficient self-supervision framework for surgical video understanding. Our key insight is to distill knowledge from publicly available models trained on large generic datasets4 to facilitate the self-supervised learning of surgical videos. To this end, we first introduce a semantic-preserving training scheme to obtain our teacher model, which not only contains semantics from the publicly available models, but also can produce accurate knowledge for surgical data. Besides training with only contrastive learning, we also introduce a distillation objective to transfer the rich learned information from the teacher model to self-supervised learning on surgical data. Extensive experiments on two surgical phase recognition benchmarks show that our framework can significantly improve the performance of existing self-supervised learning methods. Notably, our framework demonstrates a compelling advantage under a low-data regime. Our code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/DistillingSelf.
summary: Self-supervised learning has witnessed great progress in vision and NLP; recently, it also attracted much attention to various medical imaging modalities such as X-ray, CT, and MRI. Existing methods mostly focus on building new pretext self-supervision tasks such as reconstruction, orientation, and masking identification according to the properties of medical images. However, the publicly available self-supervision models are not fully exploited. In this paper, we present a powerful yet efficient self-supervision framework for surgical video understanding. Our key insight is to distill knowledge from publicly available models trained on large generic datasets4 to facilitate the self-supervised learning of surgical videos. To this end, we first introduce a semantic-preserving training scheme to obtain our teacher model, which not only contains semantics from the publicly available models, but also can produce accurate knowledge for surgical data. Besides training with only contrastive learning, we also introduce a distillation objective to transfer the rich learned information from the teacher model to self-supervised learning on surgical data. Extensive experiments on two surgical phase recognition benchmarks show that our framework can significantly improve the performance of existing self-supervised learning methods. Notably, our framework demonstrates a compelling advantage under a low-data regime. Our code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/DistillingSelf.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习在视觉和NLP方面取得了长足的进步；近年来，X射线、CT、MRI等各种医学影像技术也引起了人们的广泛关注。现有方法主要侧重于根据医学图像的特性构建新的借口自监督任务，例如重建、定向和掩蔽识别。然而，公开的自我监督模型尚未得到充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一个强大而高效的用于手术视频理解的自我监督框架。我们的主要见解是从在大型通用数据集上训练的公开模型中提取知识，以促进手术视频的自我监督学习。为此，我们首先引入一种语义保留训练方案来获得我们的教师模型，该模型不仅包含来自公开可用模型的语义，而且还可以为手术数据产生准确的知识。除了仅使用对比学习进行训练之外，我们还引入了蒸馏目标，将教师模型中丰富的学习信息转移到手术数据的自监督学习中。对两个手术阶段识别基准的广泛实验表明，我们的框架可以显着提高现有自我监督学习方法的性能。值得注意的是，我们的框架在低数据条件下表现出了令人信服的优势。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xmed-lab/DistillingSelf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过蒸馏自监督模型来提升手术视频理解的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖设计新预训练任务，未充分利用公开的自监督模型，导致手术视频理解效率不足。
AI.method: 引入语义保持训练方案生成教师模型，并通过蒸馏目标将通用数据集模型知识迁移至手术视频的自监督学习中。
AI.result: 在两个手术阶段识别基准测试中显著优于现有自监督方法，尤其在低数据量场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过知识蒸馏有效利用现有模型，为手术视频理解提供高效解决方案，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zhengyu Yang,Kan Ren,Xufang Luo,Minghuan Liu,Weiqing Liu,Jiang Bian,Weinan Zhang,Dongsheng Li
title: Towards Applicable Reinforcement Learning: Improving the Generalization and Sample Efficiency with Policy Ensemble
title_zh: 迈向适用的强化学习：通过策略集成提高泛化和样本效率
comment: Accepted in IJCAI 2022. The codes are available at https://seqml.github.io/eppo
comments: Accepted in IJCAI 2022. The codes are available at https://seqml.github.io/eppo
abstract: It is challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to succeed in real-world applications like financial trading and logistic system due to the noisy observation and environment shifting between training and evaluation. Thus, it requires both high sample efficiency and generalization for resolving real-world tasks. However, directly applying typical RL algorithms can lead to poor performance in such scenarios. Considering the great performance of ensemble methods on both accuracy and generalization in supervised learning (SL), we design a robust and applicable method named Ensemble Proximal Policy Optimization (EPPO), which learns ensemble policies in an end-to-end manner. Notably, EPPO combines each policy and the policy ensemble organically and optimizes both simultaneously. In addition, EPPO adopts a diversity enhancement regularization over the policy space which helps to generalize to unseen states and promotes exploration. We theoretically prove EPPO increases exploration efficacy, and through comprehensive experimental evaluations on various tasks, we demonstrate that EPPO achieves higher efficiency and is robust for real-world applications compared with vanilla policy optimization algorithms and other ensemble methods. Code and supplemental materials are available at https://seqml.github.io/eppo.
summary: It is challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to succeed in real-world applications like financial trading and logistic system due to the noisy observation and environment shifting between training and evaluation. Thus, it requires both high sample efficiency and generalization for resolving real-world tasks. However, directly applying typical RL algorithms can lead to poor performance in such scenarios. Considering the great performance of ensemble methods on both accuracy and generalization in supervised learning (SL), we design a robust and applicable method named Ensemble Proximal Policy Optimization (EPPO), which learns ensemble policies in an end-to-end manner. Notably, EPPO combines each policy and the policy ensemble organically and optimizes both simultaneously. In addition, EPPO adopts a diversity enhancement regularization over the policy space which helps to generalize to unseen states and promotes exploration. We theoretically prove EPPO increases exploration efficacy, and through comprehensive experimental evaluations on various tasks, we demonstrate that EPPO achieves higher efficiency and is robust for real-world applications compared with vanilla policy optimization algorithms and other ensemble methods. Code and supplemental materials are available at https://seqml.github.io/eppo.
abstract_zh: 由于训练和评估之间的噪声观察和环境变化，强化学习（RL）算法在金融交易和物流系统等现实应用中取得成功具有挑战性。因此，它需要高样本效率和泛化能力来解决现实世界的任务。然而，直接应用典型的强化学习算法在此类场景中可能会导致性能不佳。考虑到集成方法在监督学习（SL）中的准确性和泛化性方面的出色表现，我们设计了一种鲁棒且适用的方法，称为集成近端策略优化（EPPO），它以端到端的方式学习集成策略。值得注意的是，EPPO 将每项政策和政策整体有机结合并同时优化。此外，EPPO 在政策空间上采用了多样性增强正则化，这有助于泛化到未见过的状态并促进探索。我们从理论上证明了 EPPO 提高了探索效率，并且通过对各种任务的综合实验评估，我们证明了与普通策略优化算法和其他集成方法相比，EPPO 实现了更高的效率并且对于实际应用具有鲁棒性。代码和补充材料可在 https://seqml.github.io/eppo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EPPO的强化学习方法，通过策略集成提升算法在真实场景中的泛化能力和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习算法在金融交易和物流系统等真实场景中因噪声观测和环境变化表现不佳，需提高样本效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计端到端的策略集成方法EPPO，结合个体策略与集成策略优化，并引入策略空间多样性正则化以增强探索能力。
AI.result: 实验表明EPPO在多个任务中相比基线算法具有更高的效率和鲁棒性，理论证明其探索效果更优。
AI.conclusion: EPPO通过策略集成有效提升了强化学习在真实世界应用中的样本效率和泛化能力。

search_text: Towards Applicable Reinforcement Learning: Improving the Generalization and Sample Efficiency with Policy Ensemble 迈向适用的强化学习：通过策略集成提高泛化和样本效率 It is challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms to succeed in real-world applications like financial trading and logistic system due to the noisy observation and environment shifting between training and evaluation. Thus, it requires both high sample efficiency and generalization for resolving real-world tasks. However, directly applying typical RL algorithms can lead to poor performance in such scenarios. Considering the great performance of ensemble methods on both accuracy and generalization in supervised learning (SL), we design a robust and applicable method named Ensemble Proximal Policy Optimization (EPPO), which learns ensemble policies in an end-to-end manner. Notably, EPPO combines each policy and the policy ensemble organically and optimizes both simultaneously. In addition, EPPO adopts a diversity enhancement regularization over the policy space which helps to generalize to unseen states and promotes exploration. We theoretically prove EPPO increases exploration efficacy, and through comprehensive experimental evaluations on various tasks, we demonstrate that EPPO achieves higher efficiency and is robust for real-world applications compared with vanilla policy optimization algorithms and other ensemble methods. Code and supplemental materials are available at https://seqml.github.io/eppo. 由于训练和评估之间的噪声观察和环境变化，强化学习（RL）算法在金融交易和物流系统等现实应用中取得成功具有挑战性。因此，它需要高样本效率和泛化能力来解决现实世界的任务。然而，直接应用典型的强化学习算法在此类场景中可能会导致性能不佳。考虑到集成方法在监督学习（SL）中的准确性和泛化性方面的出色表现，我们设计了一种鲁棒且适用的方法，称为集成近端策略优化（EPPO），它以端到端的方式学习集成策略。值得注意的是，EPPO 将每项政策和政策整体有机结合并同时优化。此外，EPPO 在政策空间上采用了多样性增强正则化，这有助于泛化到未见过的状态并促进探索。我们从理论上证明了 EPPO 提高了探索效率，并且通过对各种任务的综合实验评估，我们证明了与普通策略优化算法和其他集成方法相比，EPPO 实现了更高的效率并且对于实际应用具有鲁棒性。代码和补充材料可在 https://seqml.github.io/eppo 获取。 本文提出一种名为EPPO的强化学习方法，通过策略集成提升算法在真实场景中的泛化能力和样本效率。 Zhengyu Yang,Kan Ren,Xufang Luo,Minghuan Liu,Weiqing Liu,Jiang Bian,Weinan Zhang,Dongsheng Li cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Threshold Designer Adaptation: Improved Adaptation for Designers in Co-creative Systems
title_zh: 阈值设计师适应：改进设计师在共同创意系统中的适应
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI), Special Topic on AI, the Arts, and Creativity
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures, International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI), Special Topic on AI, the Arts, and Creativity
abstract: To best assist human designers with different styles, Machine Learning (ML) systems need to be able to adapt to them. However, there has been relatively little prior work on how and when to best adapt an ML system to a co-designer. In this paper we present threshold designer adaptation: a novel method for adapting a creative ML model to an individual designer. We evaluate our approach with a human subject study using a co-creative rhythm game design tool. We find that designers prefer our proposed method and produce higher quality content in comparison to an existing baseline.
summary: To best assist human designers with different styles, Machine Learning (ML) systems need to be able to adapt to them. However, there has been relatively little prior work on how and when to best adapt an ML system to a co-designer. In this paper we present threshold designer adaptation: a novel method for adapting a creative ML model to an individual designer. We evaluate our approach with a human subject study using a co-creative rhythm game design tool. We find that designers prefer our proposed method and produce higher quality content in comparison to an existing baseline.
abstract_zh: 为了最好地帮助具有不同风格的人类设计师，机器学习 (ML) 系统需要能够适应它们。然而，关于如何以及何时使机器学习系统最好地适应联合设计师的工作相对较少。在本文中，我们提出了阈值设计师适应：一种使创意机器学习模型适应个体设计师的新颖方法。我们使用共同创意​​节奏游戏设计工具通过人类受试者研究来评估我们的方法。我们发现，与现有基线相比，设计师更喜欢我们提出的方法并生成更高质量的内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型阈值设计师适应方法，通过协同创作节奏游戏设计工具验证该方法能提升设计师内容质量。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习系统缺乏对不同风格设计师的有效适应机制，需探索个性化适应策略以提升协同创作效果。
AI.method: 开发阈值设计师适应算法，根据设计师行为动态调整模型输出阈值以匹配其创作风格。
AI.result: 用户实验显示设计师更偏好该方法，生成内容质量较基线方法提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 阈值适应方法有效提升协同创作系统中设计师满意度与内容质量，为个性化AI辅助设计提供新思路。

title: Mining Observation and Cognitive Behavior Process Patterns of Bridge Inspector
title_zh: 桥梁检测员的挖掘观察与认知行为过程模式
abstract: In bridge inspection, engineers should diagnose the observed bridge defects by identifying the factors underlying those defects. Traditionally, engineers search and organize structural condition-related information based on visual inspections. Even following the same qualitative inspection standards, experienced engineers tend to find the critical defects and predict the underlying reasons more reliably than less experienced ones. Unique bridge and site conditions, quality of available data, and personal skills and knowledge collectively influence such a subjective nature of data-driven bridge diagnosis. Unfortunately, the lack of detailed data about how experienced engineers observe bridge defects and identify failure modes makes it hard to comprehend what engineers' behaviors form the best practice of producing reliable bridge inspection. Besides, even experienced engineers could sometimes fail to notice critical defects, thereby producing inconsistent, conflicting condition assessments. Therefore, a detailed cognitive behavior analysis of bridge inspectors is critical for enabling a proactive inspector coaching system that uses inspectors' behavior histories to complement personal limitations. This paper presents a computational framework for revealing engineers' observation and cognitive-behavioral processes to identify bridge defects and produce diagnosis conclusions. The authors designed a bridge inspection game consisting of FEM simulation data and inspection reports to capture and analyze experienced and inexperienced engineers' diagnosis behaviors. Mining these behavioral logs have revealed reusable behavioral process patterns that map critical bridge defects and diagnosis conclusions. The results indicate that the proposed method can proactively share inspection experiences and improve inspection processes' explainability and reliability.
summary: In bridge inspection, engineers should diagnose the observed bridge defects by identifying the factors underlying those defects. Traditionally, engineers search and organize structural condition-related information based on visual inspections. Even following the same qualitative inspection standards, experienced engineers tend to find the critical defects and predict the underlying reasons more reliably than less experienced ones. Unique bridge and site conditions, quality of available data, and personal skills and knowledge collectively influence such a subjective nature of data-driven bridge diagnosis. Unfortunately, the lack of detailed data about how experienced engineers observe bridge defects and identify failure modes makes it hard to comprehend what engineers' behaviors form the best practice of producing reliable bridge inspection. Besides, even experienced engineers could sometimes fail to notice critical defects, thereby producing inconsistent, conflicting condition assessments. Therefore, a detailed cognitive behavior analysis of bridge inspectors is critical for enabling a proactive inspector coaching system that uses inspectors' behavior histories to complement personal limitations. This paper presents a computational framework for revealing engineers' observation and cognitive-behavioral processes to identify bridge defects and produce diagnosis conclusions. The authors designed a bridge inspection game consisting of FEM simulation data and inspection reports to capture and analyze experienced and inexperienced engineers' diagnosis behaviors. Mining these behavioral logs have revealed reusable behavioral process patterns that map critical bridge defects and diagnosis conclusions. The results indicate that the proposed method can proactively share inspection experiences and improve inspection processes' explainability and reliability.
abstract_zh: 在桥梁检查中，工程师应通过识别这些缺陷背后的因素来诊断观察到的桥梁缺陷。传统上，工程师基于目视检查来搜索和组织与结构状况相关的信息。即使遵循相同的定性检查标准，经验丰富的工程师也往往比经验不足的工程师更可靠地发现关键缺陷并预测根本原因。独特的桥梁和现场条件、可用数据的质量以及个人技能和知识共同影响数据驱动的桥梁诊断的主观性质。不幸的是，缺乏关于经验丰富的工程师如何观察桥梁缺陷和识别故障模式的详细数据，使得很难理解工程师的行为构成了进行可靠桥梁检查的最佳实践。此外，即使是经验丰富的工程师有时也可能无法注意到关键缺陷，从而产生不一致、相互冲突的状况评估。因此，对桥梁检查员进行详细的认知行为分析对于启用主动检查员辅导系统至关重要，该系统使用检查员的行为历史来补充个人局限性。本文提出了一个计算框架，用于揭示工程师的观察和认知行为过程，以识别桥梁缺陷并得出诊断结论。作者设计了一个由有限元模拟数据和检查报告组成的桥梁检查游戏，以捕获和分析经验丰富和缺乏经验的工程师的诊断行为。挖掘这些行为日志揭示了可重用的行为过程模式，可以映射关键的桥梁缺陷和诊断结论。结果表明，该方法可以主动共享检验经验，提高检验过程的可解释性和可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算框架，用于揭示桥梁检测工程师的观察和认知行为过程，以识别桥梁缺陷并生成诊断结论。
AI.motivation: 经验丰富的工程师在诊断桥梁缺陷时表现更可靠，但缺乏对其观察和认知行为的详细数据，导致检测结果不一致。需通过分析行为模式改进检测可靠性。
AI.method: 设计包含有限元模拟数据和检测报告的桥梁检测游戏，捕捉经验与非经验工程师的诊断行为，并挖掘行为日志中的可复用模式。
AI.result: 方法揭示了关键缺陷与诊断结论的映射模式，能够主动分享检测经验，提升检测过程的可解释性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 分析检测工程师的认知行为模式有助于构建主动教练系统，弥补个人局限性，提高桥梁检测质量。

authors_text: Liangke Gui,Yingshan Chang,Qiuyuan Huang,Subhojit Som,Alex Hauptmann,Jianfeng Gao,Yonatan Bisk
title: Training Vision-Language Transformers from Captions
title_zh: 从字幕训练视觉语言转换器
abstract: Vision-Language Transformers can be learned without low-level human labels (e.g. class labels, bounding boxes, etc). Existing work, whether explicitly utilizing bounding boxes or patches, assumes that the visual backbone must first be trained on ImageNet class prediction before being integrated into a multimodal linguistic pipeline. We show that this is not necessary and introduce a new model Vision-Language from Captions (VLC) built on top of Masked Auto-Encoders that does not require this supervision. In fact, in a head-to-head comparison between ViLT, the current state-of-the-art patch-based vision-language transformer which is pretrained with supervised object classification, and our model, VLC, we find that our approach 1. outperforms ViLT on standard benchmarks, 2. provides more interpretable and intuitive patch visualizations, and 3. is competitive with many larger models that utilize ROIs trained on annotated bounding-boxes.
summary: Vision-Language Transformers can be learned without low-level human labels (e.g. class labels, bounding boxes, etc). Existing work, whether explicitly utilizing bounding boxes or patches, assumes that the visual backbone must first be trained on ImageNet class prediction before being integrated into a multimodal linguistic pipeline. We show that this is not necessary and introduce a new model Vision-Language from Captions (VLC) built on top of Masked Auto-Encoders that does not require this supervision. In fact, in a head-to-head comparison between ViLT, the current state-of-the-art patch-based vision-language transformer which is pretrained with supervised object classification, and our model, VLC, we find that our approach 1. outperforms ViLT on standard benchmarks, 2. provides more interpretable and intuitive patch visualizations, and 3. is competitive with many larger models that utilize ROIs trained on annotated bounding-boxes.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言变压器可以在没有低级人类标签（例如类标签、边界框等）的情况下学习。现有的工作，无论是明确利用边界框还是补丁，都假设视觉主干必须首先在 ImageNet 类预测上进行训练，然后才能集成到多模态语言管道中。我们证明这是没有必要的，并引入了一种新的字幕视觉语言模型（VLC），该模型建立在屏蔽自动编码器之上，不需要这种监督。事实上，在 ViLT（当前最先进的基于补丁的视觉语言转换器（通过监督对象分类进行预训练）和我们的模型 VLC 之间的头对头比较中，我们发现我们的方法 1. 在标准基准上优于 ViLT，2. 提供更可解释和直观的补丁可视化，以及 3. 与许多利用在带注释的边界框上训练的 ROI 的更大模型竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需ImageNet预训练和人工标注的视觉-语言模型VLC，直接通过字幕训练视觉-语言转换器。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型依赖ImageNet预训练和人工标注（如边界框），限制了模型灵活性并需要大量监督数据。
AI.method: 基于掩码自编码器（MAE）构建VLC模型，直接利用字幕数据训练，无需预先的ImageNet分类或边界框标注。
AI.result: VLC在标准基准上优于ViLT，生成更直观的可视化结果，并与使用ROI标注的大型模型性能相当。
AI.conclusion: VLC证明了无需传统监督即可训练有效视觉-语言模型，提升了可解释性并为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Training Vision-Language Transformers from Captions 从字幕训练视觉语言转换器 Vision-Language Transformers can be learned without low-level human labels (e.g. class labels, bounding boxes, etc). Existing work, whether explicitly utilizing bounding boxes or patches, assumes that the visual backbone must first be trained on ImageNet class prediction before being integrated into a multimodal linguistic pipeline. We show that this is not necessary and introduce a new model Vision-Language from Captions (VLC) built on top of Masked Auto-Encoders that does not require this supervision. In fact, in a head-to-head comparison between ViLT, the current state-of-the-art patch-based vision-language transformer which is pretrained with supervised object classification, and our model, VLC, we find that our approach 1. outperforms ViLT on standard benchmarks, 2. provides more interpretable and intuitive patch visualizations, and 3. is competitive with many larger models that utilize ROIs trained on annotated bounding-boxes. 视觉语言变压器可以在没有低级人类标签（例如类标签、边界框等）的情况下学习。现有的工作，无论是明确利用边界框还是补丁，都假设视觉主干必须首先在 ImageNet 类预测上进行训练，然后才能集成到多模态语言管道中。我们证明这是没有必要的，并引入了一种新的字幕视觉语言模型（VLC），该模型建立在屏蔽自动编码器之上，不需要这种监督。事实上，在 ViLT（当前最先进的基于补丁的视觉语言转换器（通过监督对象分类进行预训练）和我们的模型 VLC 之间的头对头比较中，我们发现我们的方法 1. 在标准基准上优于 ViLT，2. 提供更可解释和直观的补丁可视化，以及 3. 与许多利用在带注释的边界框上训练的 ROI 的更大模型竞争。 本文提出一种无需ImageNet预训练和人工标注的视觉-语言模型VLC，直接通过字幕训练视觉-语言转换器。 Liangke Gui,Yingshan Chang,Qiuyuan Huang,Subhojit Som,Alex Hauptmann,Jianfeng Gao,Yonatan Bisk cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Taylor A. Howell,Simon Le Cleac'h,Kevin Tracy,Zachary Manchester
title: CALIPSO: A Differentiable Solver for Trajectory Optimization with Conic and Complementarity Constraints
title_zh: CALIPSO：具有圆锥曲线和互补约束的轨迹优化的可微分求解器
abstract: We present a new solver for non-convex trajectory optimization problems that is specialized for robotics applications. CALIPSO, or the Conic Augmented Lagrangian Interior-Point SOlver, combines several strategies for constrained numerical optimization to natively handle second-order cones and complementarity constraints. It reliably solves challenging motion-planning problems that include contact-implicit formulations of impacts and Coulomb friction and state-triggered constraints where general-purpose non-convex solvers like SNOPT and Ipopt fail to converge. Additionally, CALIPSO supports efficient differentiation of solutions with respect to problem data, enabling bi-level optimization applications like auto-tuning of feedback policies. Reliable convergence of the solver is demonstrated on a range of problems from manipulation, locomotion, and aerospace domains. An open-source implementation of this solver is available.
summary: We present a new solver for non-convex trajectory optimization problems that is specialized for robotics applications. CALIPSO, or the Conic Augmented Lagrangian Interior-Point SOlver, combines several strategies for constrained numerical optimization to natively handle second-order cones and complementarity constraints. It reliably solves challenging motion-planning problems that include contact-implicit formulations of impacts and Coulomb friction and state-triggered constraints where general-purpose non-convex solvers like SNOPT and Ipopt fail to converge. Additionally, CALIPSO supports efficient differentiation of solutions with respect to problem data, enabling bi-level optimization applications like auto-tuning of feedback policies. Reliable convergence of the solver is demonstrated on a range of problems from manipulation, locomotion, and aerospace domains. An open-source implementation of this solver is available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的非凸轨迹优化问题求解器，专门用于机器人应用。 CALIPSO（即圆锥增广拉格朗日内点求解器）结合了多种约束数值优化策略，可以原生处理二阶锥体和互补约束。它可靠地解决了具有挑战性的运动规划问题，包括影响和库仑摩擦的接触隐式公式以及状态触发约束，其中 SNOPT 和 Ipopt 等通用非凸求解器无法收敛。此外，CALIPSO 支持针对问题数据有效区分解决方案，从而实现反馈策略自动调整等双层优化应用。求解器的可靠收敛性在操纵、运动和航空航天领域的一系列问题上得到了证明。该求解器的开源实现现已推出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CALIPSO，一种针对机器人轨迹优化问题的可微求解器，专门处理圆锥和互补性约束。
AI.motivation: 现有通用非凸求解器在处理接触隐式冲击、库仑摩擦和状态触发约束时存在收敛困难，需开发更可靠的方法。
AI.method: CALIPSO结合圆锥增广拉格朗日乘子法与内点法，原生支持二阶锥和互补约束，并实现对问题数据的高效微分。
AI.result: 求解器在操作、移动和航空航天领域的多类问题中可靠收敛，开源实现已发布。
AI.conclusion: CALIPSO有效解决了复杂约束下的轨迹优化问题，为机器人反馈策略自动调整等应用提供支持。

authors_text: Wei-Di Chang,Juan Camilo Gamboa Higuera,Scott Fujimoto,David Meger,Gregory Dudek
title: IL-flOw: Imitation Learning from Observation using Normalizing Flows
title_zh: IL-flow：使用标准化流从观察中进行模仿学习
comment: Presented at the 4th Robot Learning Workshop at NeurIPS 2021
comments: Presented at the 4th Robot Learning Workshop at NeurIPS 2021
abstract: We present an algorithm for Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) from expert state observations only. Our approach decouples reward modelling from policy learning, unlike state-of-the-art adversarial methods which require updating the reward model during policy search and are known to be unstable and difficult to optimize. Our method, IL-flOw, recovers the expert policy by modelling state-state transitions, by generating rewards using deep density estimators trained on the demonstration trajectories, avoiding the instability issues of adversarial methods. We demonstrate that using the state transition log-probability density as a reward signal for forward reinforcement learning translates to matching the trajectory distribution of the expert demonstrations, and experimentally show good recovery of the true reward signal as well as state of the art results for imitation from observation on locomotion and robotic continuous control tasks.
summary: We present an algorithm for Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) from expert state observations only. Our approach decouples reward modelling from policy learning, unlike state-of-the-art adversarial methods which require updating the reward model during policy search and are known to be unstable and difficult to optimize. Our method, IL-flOw, recovers the expert policy by modelling state-state transitions, by generating rewards using deep density estimators trained on the demonstration trajectories, avoiding the instability issues of adversarial methods. We demonstrate that using the state transition log-probability density as a reward signal for forward reinforcement learning translates to matching the trajectory distribution of the expert demonstrations, and experimentally show good recovery of the true reward signal as well as state of the art results for imitation from observation on locomotion and robotic continuous control tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种仅根据专家状态观察进行逆强化学习（IRL）的算法。我们的方法将奖励建模与策略学习分离，这与最先进的对抗方法不同，后者需要在策略搜索期间更新奖励模型，并且已知不稳定且难以优化。我们的方法 IL-flow 通过对状态-状态转换建模、使用在演示轨迹上训练的深度密度估计器生成奖励来恢复专家策略，避免了对抗方法的不稳定问题。我们证明，使用状态转换对数概率密度作为前向强化学习的奖励信号可以转化为匹配专家演示的轨迹分布，并通过实验证明了真实奖励信号的良好恢复以及对运动和机器人连续控制任务的观察的模仿的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅从专家状态观察中进行模仿学习的算法IL-flOw，通过归一化流建模奖励信号以避免对抗方法的不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性逆强化学习方法在策略搜索时需同步更新奖励模型，导致训练不稳定且难以优化。
AI.method: 通过深度密度估计器建模状态转移的对数概率密度作为奖励信号，解耦奖励建模与策略学习过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效恢复真实奖励函数，在运动控制与机器人连续控制任务中达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: IL-flOw通过非对抗的密度估计方法实现了稳定可靠的模仿学习，为仅基于观察的逆强化学习提供了新范式。

Our method, IL-flOw, recovers the expert policy by modelling state-state transitions, by generating rewards using deep density estimators trained on the demonstration trajectories, avoiding the instability issues of adversarial methods. We demonstrate that using the state transition log-probability density as a reward signal for forward reinforcement learning translates to matching the trajectory distribution of the expert demonstrations, and experimentally show good recovery of the true reward signal as well as state of the art results for imitation from observation on locomotion and robotic continuous control tasks. 我们提出了一种仅根据专家状态观察进行逆强化学习（IRL）的算法。我们的方法将奖励建模与策略学习分离，这与最先进的对抗方法不同，后者需要在策略搜索期间更新奖励模型，并且已知不稳定且难以优化。我们的方法 IL-flow 通过对状态-状态转换建模、使用在演示轨迹上训练的深度密度估计器生成奖励来恢复专家策略，避免了对抗方法的不稳定问题。我们证明，使用状态转换对数概率密度作为前向强化学习的奖励信号可以转化为匹配专家演示的轨迹分布，并通过实验证明了真实奖励信号的良好恢复以及对运动和机器人连续控制任务的观察的模仿的最先进结果。 本文提出一种仅从专家状态观察中进行模仿学习的算法IL-flOw，通过归一化流建模奖励信号以避免对抗方法的不稳定性。 Wei-Di Chang,Juan Camilo Gamboa Higuera,Scott Fujimoto,David Meger,Gregory Dudek cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Mohammad Joshaghani,Amirabbas Davari,Faezeh Nejati Hatamian,Andreas Maier,Christian Riess
title: Bayesian Convolutional Neural Networks for Limited Data Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Image Classification
title_zh: 用于有限数据高光谱遥感图像分类的贝叶斯卷积神经网络
abstract: Employing deep neural networks for Hyperspectral remote sensing (HSRS) image classification is a challenging task. HSRS images have high dimensionality and a large number of channels with substantial redundancy between channels. In addition, the training data for classifying HSRS images is limited and the amount of available training data is much smaller compared to other classification tasks. These factors complicate the training process of deep neural networks with many parameters and cause them to not perform well even compared to conventional models. Moreover, convolutional neural networks produce over-confident predictions, which is highly undesirable considering the aforementioned problem. In this work, we use for HSRS image classification a special class of deep neural networks, namely a Bayesian neural network (BNN). To the extent of our knowledge, this is the first time that BNNs are used in HSRS image classification. BNNs inherently provide a measure for uncertainty. We perform extensive experiments on the Pavia Centre, Salinas, and Botswana datasets. We show that a BNN outperforms a standard convolutional neural network (CNN) and an off-the-shelf Random Forest (RF). Further experiments underline that the BNN is more stable and robust to model pruning, and that the uncertainty is higher for samples with higher expected prediction error.
summary: Employing deep neural networks for Hyperspectral remote sensing (HSRS) image classification is a challenging task. HSRS images have high dimensionality and a large number of channels with substantial redundancy between channels. In addition, the training data for classifying HSRS images is limited and the amount of available training data is much smaller compared to other classification tasks. These factors complicate the training process of deep neural networks with many parameters and cause them to not perform well even compared to conventional models. Moreover, convolutional neural networks produce over-confident predictions, which is highly undesirable considering the aforementioned problem. In this work, we use for HSRS image classification a special class of deep neural networks, namely a Bayesian neural network (BNN). To the extent of our knowledge, this is the first time that BNNs are used in HSRS image classification. BNNs inherently provide a measure for uncertainty. We perform extensive experiments on the Pavia Centre, Salinas, and Botswana datasets. We show that a BNN outperforms a standard convolutional neural network (CNN) and an off-the-shelf Random Forest (RF). Further experiments underline that the BNN is more stable and robust to model pruning, and that the uncertainty is higher for samples with higher expected prediction error.
abstract_zh: 采用深度神经网络进行高光谱遥感 (HSRS) 图像分类是一项具有挑战性的任务。 HSRS 图像具有高维度和大量通道，通道之间存在大量冗余。此外，用于分类 HSRS 图像的训练数据是有限的，与其他分类任务相比，可用训练数据量要小得多。这些因素使具有许多参数的深度神经网络的训练过程变得复杂，导致它们即使与传统模型相比也表现不佳。此外，卷积神经网络会产生过于自信的预测，考虑到上述问题，这是非常不希望的。在这项工作中，我们使用一类特殊的深度神经网络进行 HSRS 图像分类，即贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN)。据我们所知，这是 BNN 首次用于 HSRS 图像分类。 BNN 本质上提供了不确定性的度量。我们在帕维亚中心、萨利纳斯和博茨瓦纳数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们证明 BNN 的性能优于标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和现成的随机森林 (RF)。进一步的实验强调，BNN 对模型剪枝更加稳定和鲁棒，并且对于具有较高预期预测误差的样本，不确定性较高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用贝叶斯卷积神经网络（BNN）解决高光谱遥感图像分类中数据量有限和模型不确定性高的问题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱遥感图像具有高维度、通道冗余且训练数据稀缺，传统深度学习模型表现不佳且预测过于自信，需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 首次将贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）应用于高光谱图像分类，利用其内置的不确定性估计能力，通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在Pavia Centre、Salinas和Botswana数据集上，BNN优于标准CNN和随机森林，且在模型剪枝下更稳定，预测不确定性与误差率正相关。
AI.conclusion: BNN在高光谱分类中展现更优性能和鲁棒性，其不确定性估计能有效反映预测可靠性，为小样本场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyounghun Kim,Aishwarya Padmakumar,Di Jin,Mohit Bansal,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: On the Limits of Evaluating Embodied Agent Model Generalization Using Validation Sets
title_zh: 关于使用验证集评估具体代理模型泛化能力的局限性
abstract: Natural language guided embodied task completion is a challenging problem since it requires understanding natural language instructions, aligning them with egocentric visual observations, and choosing appropriate actions to execute in the environment to produce desired changes. We experiment with augmenting a transformer model for this task with modules that effectively utilize a wider field of view and learn to choose whether the next step requires a navigation or manipulation action. We observed that the proposed modules resulted in improved, and in fact state-of-the-art performance on an unseen validation set of a popular benchmark dataset, ALFRED. However, our best model selected using the unseen validation set underperforms on the unseen test split of ALFRED, indicating that performance on the unseen validation set may not in itself be a sufficient indicator of whether model improvements generalize to unseen test sets. We highlight this result as we believe it may be a wider phenomenon in machine learning tasks but primarily noticeable only in benchmarks that limit evaluations on test splits, and highlights the need to modify benchmark design to better account for variance in model performance.
summary: Natural language guided embodied task completion is a challenging problem since it requires understanding natural language instructions, aligning them with egocentric visual observations, and choosing appropriate actions to execute in the environment to produce desired changes. We experiment with augmenting a transformer model for this task with modules that effectively utilize a wider field of view and learn to choose whether the next step requires a navigation or manipulation action. We observed that the proposed modules resulted in improved, and in fact state-of-the-art performance on an unseen validation set of a popular benchmark dataset, ALFRED. However, our best model selected using the unseen validation set underperforms on the unseen test split of ALFRED, indicating that performance on the unseen validation set may not in itself be a sufficient indicator of whether model improvements generalize to unseen test sets. We highlight this result as we believe it may be a wider phenomenon in machine learning tasks but primarily noticeable only in benchmarks that limit evaluations on test splits, and highlights the need to modify benchmark design to better account for variance in model performance.
abstract_zh: 自然语言引导的具体任务完成是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它需要理解自然语言指令，将其与以自我为中心的视觉观察相结合，并选择在环境中执行的适当动作以产生所需的变化。我们尝试使用有效利用更广泛视野的模块来增强该任务的变压器模型，并学习选择下一步是否需要导航或操纵操作。我们观察到，所提出的模块在流行基准数据集 ALFRED 的未见过的验证集上带来了改进，事实上是最先进的性能。然而，我们使用未见的验证集选择的最佳模型在 ALFRED 的未见的测试集上表现不佳，这表明未见的验证集上的性能本身可能不足以表明模型改进是否推广到未见的测试集。我们强调这一结果是因为我们认为这可能是机器学习任务中更广泛的现象，但主要仅在限制测试分割评估的基准中引人注目，并强调需要修改基准设计以更好地考虑模型性能的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用验证集评估具身智能体模型泛化能力的局限性，发现验证集表现未必能准确反映测试集表现。
AI.motivation: 自然语言引导的具身任务完成需要理解指令、视觉观察和动作选择，但现有基准测试中验证集可能无法有效预测模型在测试集上的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过增强Transformer模型（引入宽视野模块和动作选择机制），在ALFRED数据集上进行验证集与测试集对比实验。
AI.result: 模型在验证集上达到SOTA性能，但在测试集上表现较差，表明验证集性能不能充分反映泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 需重新设计基准测试以更好地反映模型性能的方差，避免仅依赖验证集评估模型改进的有效性。

authors_text: Anton Ratnarajah,Zhenyu Tang,Rohith Chandrashekar Aralikatti,Dinesh Manocha
title: MESH2IR: Neural Acoustic Impulse Response Generator for Complex 3D Scenes
title_zh: MESH2IR：用于复杂 3D 场景的神经声学脉冲响应发生器
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022. More results and source code is available at https://anton-jeran.github.io/M2IR/
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2022. More results and source code is available at https://anton-jeran.github.io/M2IR/
abstract: We propose a mesh-based neural network (MESH2IR) to generate acoustic impulse responses (IRs) for indoor 3D scenes represented using a mesh. The IRs are used to create a high-quality sound experience in interactive applications and audio processing. Our method can handle input triangular meshes with arbitrary topologies (2K - 3M triangles). We present a novel training technique to train MESH2IR using energy decay relief and highlight its benefits. We also show that training MESH2IR on IRs preprocessed using our proposed technique significantly improves the accuracy of IR generation. We reduce the non-linearity in the mesh space by transforming 3D scene meshes to latent space using a graph convolution network. Our MESH2IR is more than 200 times faster than a geometric acoustic algorithm on a CPU and can generate more than 10,000 IRs per second on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU for a given furnished indoor 3D scene. The acoustic metrics are used to characterize the acoustic environment. We show that the acoustic metrics of the IRs predicted from our MESH2IR match the ground truth with less than 10% error. We also highlight the benefits of MESH2IR on audio and speech processing applications such as speech dereverberation and speech separation. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first neural-network-based approach to predict IRs from a given 3D scene mesh in real-time.
summary: We propose a mesh-based neural network (MESH2IR) to generate acoustic impulse responses (IRs) for indoor 3D scenes represented using a mesh. The IRs are used to create a high-quality sound experience in interactive applications and audio processing. Our method can handle input triangular meshes with arbitrary topologies (2K - 3M triangles). We present a novel training technique to train MESH2IR using energy decay relief and highlight its benefits. We also show that training MESH2IR on IRs preprocessed using our proposed technique significantly improves the accuracy of IR generation. We reduce the non-linearity in the mesh space by transforming 3D scene meshes to latent space using a graph convolution network. Our MESH2IR is more than 200 times faster than a geometric acoustic algorithm on a CPU and can generate more than 10,000 IRs per second on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU for a given furnished indoor 3D scene. The acoustic metrics are used to characterize the acoustic environment. We show that the acoustic metrics of the IRs predicted from our MESH2IR match the ground truth with less than 10% error. We also highlight the benefits of MESH2IR on audio and speech processing applications such as speech dereverberation and speech separation. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first neural-network-based approach to predict IRs from a given 3D scene mesh in real-time.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于网格的神经网络 (MESH2IR) 来为使用网格表示的室内 3D 场景生成声脉冲响应 (IR)。 IR 用于在交互式应用程序和音频处理中创建高质量的声音体验。我们的方法可以处理具有任意拓扑的输入三角形网格（2K - 3M 三角形）。我们提出了一种利用能量衰减缓解来训练 MESH2IR 的新颖训练技术，并强调了其优点。我们还表明，在使用我们提出的技术预处理的 IR 上训练 MESH2IR 可以显着提高 IR 生成的准确性。我们通过使用图卷积网络将 3D 场景网格转换为潜在空间来减少网格空间中的非线性。我们的 MESH2IR 比 CPU 上的几何声学算法快 200 倍以上，并且可以在 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU 上针对给定的室内 3D 场景生成超过 10,000 个 IR。声学指标用于表征声学环境。我们表明，从 MESH2IR 预测的 IR 声学指标与地面真实情况相匹配，误差小于 10%。我们还强调了 MESH2IR 在音频和语音处理应用（例如语音去混响和语音分离）方面的优势。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个基于神经网络的方法，可以根据给定的 3D 场景网格实时预测 IR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网格的神经网络MESH2IR，用于生成复杂3D场景的声学脉冲响应。
AI.motivation: 传统几何声学算法在生成声学脉冲响应时计算速度慢，难以满足实时需求，因此需要一种高效且准确的神经网络方法。
AI.method: 该方法通过图卷积网络将3D场景网格转换到潜在空间，降低网格空间的非线性，并利用能量衰减缓解技术进行训练，以提高生成精度。
AI.result: MESH2IR在CPU上比传统几何声学算法快200倍以上，且在NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU上每秒可生成超过10,000个IR，声学指标误差小于10%。
AI.conclusion: MESH2IR是首个能够实时从给定3D场景网格预测IR的神经网络方法，具有在语音去混响和语音分离等应用中的潜力。

search_text: MESH2IR: Neural Acoustic Impulse Response Generator for Complex 3D Scenes MESH2IR：用于复杂 3D 场景的神经声学脉冲响应发生器 We propose a mesh-based neural network (MESH2IR) to generate acoustic impulse responses (IRs) for indoor 3D scenes represented using a mesh. The IRs are used to create a high-quality sound experience in interactive applications and audio processing. Our method can handle input triangular meshes with arbitrary topologies (2K - 3M triangles). We present a novel training technique to train MESH2IR using energy decay relief and highlight its benefits. We also show that training MESH2IR on IRs preprocessed using our proposed technique significantly improves the accuracy of IR generation. We reduce the non-linearity in the mesh space by transforming 3D scene meshes to latent space using a graph convolution network. Our MESH2IR is more than 200 times faster than a geometric acoustic algorithm on a CPU and can generate more than 10,000 IRs per second on an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU for a given furnished indoor 3D scene. The acoustic metrics are used to characterize the acoustic environment. We show that the acoustic metrics of the IRs predicted from our MESH2IR match the ground truth with less than 10% error. We also highlight the benefits of MESH2IR on audio and speech processing applications such as speech dereverberation and speech separation. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first neural-network-based approach to predict IRs from a given 3D scene mesh in real-time. 我们提出了一种基于网格的神经网络 (MESH2IR) 来为使用网格表示的室内 3D 场景生成声脉冲响应 (IR)。 IR 用于在交互式应用程序和音频处理中创建高质量的声音体验。我们的方法可以处理具有任意拓扑的输入三角形网格（2K - 3M 三角形）。我们提出了一种利用能量衰减缓解来训练 MESH2IR 的新颖训练技术，并强调了其优点。我们还表明，在使用我们提出的技术预处理的 IR 上训练 MESH2IR 可以显着提高 IR 生成的准确性。我们通过使用图卷积网络将 3D 场景网格转换为潜在空间来减少网格空间中的非线性。我们的 MESH2IR 比 CPU 上的几何声学算法快 200 倍以上，并且可以在 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Ti GPU 上针对给定的室内 3D 场景生成超过 10,000 个 IR。声学指标用于表征声学环境。我们表明，从 MESH2IR 预测的 IR 声学指标与地面真实情况相匹配，误差小于 10%。我们还强调了 MESH2IR 在音频和语音处理应用（例如语音去混响和语音分离）方面的优势。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个基于神经网络的方法，可以根据给定的 3D 场景网格实时预测 IR。 本文提出了一种基于网格的神经网络MESH2IR，用于生成复杂3D场景的声学脉冲响应。 Anton Ratnarajah,Zhenyu Tang,Rohith Chandrashekar Aralikatti,Dinesh Manocha cs.SD,cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

title: Deterministic Near-Optimal Distributed Listing of Cliques
title_zh: 确定性近最优分布式派系列表
abstract: The importance of classifying connections in large graphs has been the motivation for a rich line of work on distributed subgraph finding that has led to exciting recent breakthroughs. A crucial aspect that remained open was whether deterministic algorithms can be as efficient as their randomized counterparts, where the latter are known to be tight up to polylogarithmic factors. We give deterministic distributed algorithms for listing cliques of size $p$ in $n^{1 - 2/p + o(1)}$ rounds in the \congest model. For triangles, our $n^{1/3+o(1)}$ round complexity improves upon the previous state of the art of $n^{2/3+o(1)}$ rounds [Chang and Saranurak, FOCS 2020]. For cliques of size $p \geq 4$, ours are the first non-trivial deterministic distributed algorithms. Given known lower bounds, for all values $p \geq 3$ our algorithms are tight up to a $n^{o(1)}$ subpolynomial factor, which comes from the deterministic routing procedure we use.
summary: The importance of classifying connections in large graphs has been the motivation for a rich line of work on distributed subgraph finding that has led to exciting recent breakthroughs. A crucial aspect that remained open was whether deterministic algorithms can be as efficient as their randomized counterparts, where the latter are known to be tight up to polylogarithmic factors. We give deterministic distributed algorithms for listing cliques of size $p$ in $n^{1 - 2/p + o(1)}$ rounds in the \congest model. For triangles, our $n^{1/3+o(1)}$ round complexity improves upon the previous state of the art of $n^{2/3+o(1)}$ rounds [Chang and Saranurak, FOCS 2020]. For cliques of size $p \geq 4$, ours are the first non-trivial deterministic distributed algorithms. Given known lower bounds, for all values $p \geq 3$ our algorithms are tight up to a $n^{o(1)}$ subpolynomial factor, which comes from the deterministic routing procedure we use.
abstract_zh: 对大图中的连接进行分类的重要性一直是分布式子图查找方面丰富工作的动力，这些工作导致了最近令人兴奋的突破。仍然悬而未决的一个关键方面是确定性算法是否可以与随机算法一样有效，众所周知后者受到多对数因素的影响。我们给出了确定性分布式算法，用于在 \congest 模型中列出 $n^{1 - 2/p + o(1)}$ 轮中大小为 $p$ 的派系。对于三角形，我们的 $n^{1/3+o(1)}$ 轮复杂度比之前的 $n^{2/3+o(1)}$ 轮的技术水平有所提高 [Chang 和 Saranurak，FOCS 2020]。对于大小为 $p \geq 4$ 的派系，我们的算法是第一个非平凡的确定性分布式算法。给定已知的下界，对于所有值 $p \geq 3$，我们的算法都严格达到 $n^{o(1)}$ 次多项式因子，该因子来自我们使用的确定性路由过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种确定性分布式算法，用于在Congest模型中高效列出图中的所有团。
AI.motivation: 尽管随机化算法在分布式子图查找中已达到接近最优效率，但确定性算法是否能达到类似效率仍是一个未解问题。
AI.method: 设计基于Congest模型的确定性分布式算法，通过优化路由过程和团检测策略，减少通信轮数。
AI.result: 对于三角形（3团），算法复杂度降至$O(n^{1/3+o(1)})$，优于此前$O(n^{2/3+o(1)})$的结果；对于$p \\geq 4$的团，首次提出非平凡的确定性算法，且整体复杂度接近理论下界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在所有$p \\geq 3$的情况下达到近似最优，仅存在亚多项式因子差距，证明了确定性方法在分布式团列举中的可行性。

title: Frequency-Competitive Query Strategies to Maintain Low Congestion Potential Among Moving Entities
title_zh: 频率竞争查询策略以保持移动实体之间的低拥塞潜力
comment: 26 pages, 3 figures. Revised to correct Lemma 1, to improve the presentation, and to strengthen the results
comments: 26 pages, 3 figures. Revised to correct Lemma 1, to improve the presentation, and to strengthen the results
abstract: We consider the problem of using location queries to monitor the congestion potential among a collection of entities moving, with bounded speed but otherwise unpredictably, in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space. Uncertainty in entity locations due to potential motion between queries gives rise to a space of possible entity configurations at each moment in time, with possibly very different congestion properties. We define different measures of what we call the congestion potential of such spaces, in terms of the (dynamic) intersection graph of the uncertainty regions associated with entities, to describe the congestion that might actually occur. Previous work [SoCG'13, EuroCG'14, SICOMP'16, SODA'19], in the same uncertainty model, addressed the problem of minimizing congestion potential using location queries of some bounded frequency. It was shown that it is possible to design a query scheme that is $O(1)$-competitive, in terms of worst-case congestion potential, with other, even clairvoyant query schemes (that know the trajectories of all entities), subject to the same bound on query frequency. In this paper we address the dual problem: how to guarantee a fixed bound on congestion potential while minimizing the query frequency, measured in terms of total number of queries or the minimum spacing between queries (granularity), over any fixed time interval. This complementary objective necessitates quite different algorithms and analyses. Nevertheless, our results parallel those of the earlier papers, specifically tight competitive bounds on required query frequency, with a few surprising differences.
summary: We consider the problem of using location queries to monitor the congestion potential among a collection of entities moving, with bounded speed but otherwise unpredictably, in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space. Uncertainty in entity locations due to potential motion between queries gives rise to a space of possible entity configurations at each moment in time, with possibly very different congestion properties. We define different measures of what we call the congestion potential of such spaces, in terms of the (dynamic) intersection graph of the uncertainty regions associated with entities, to describe the congestion that might actually occur. Previous work [SoCG'13, EuroCG'14, SICOMP'16, SODA'19], in the same uncertainty model, addressed the problem of minimizing congestion potential using location queries of some bounded frequency. It was shown that it is possible to design a query scheme that is $O(1)$-competitive, in terms of worst-case congestion potential, with other, even clairvoyant query schemes (that know the trajectories of all entities), subject to the same bound on query frequency. In this paper we address the dual problem: how to guarantee a fixed bound on congestion potential while minimizing the query frequency, measured in terms of total number of queries or the minimum spacing between queries (granularity), over any fixed time interval. This complementary objective necessitates quite different algorithms and analyses. Nevertheless, our results parallel those of the earlier papers, specifically tight competitive bounds on required query frequency, with a few surprising differences.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用位置查询来监控在 $d$ 维欧几里德空间中以有限速度移动但在其他方面不可预测的实体集合之间的拥塞潜力的问题。由于查询之间的潜在运动而导致的实体位置的不确定性会在每个时刻产生可能的实体配置空间，并且可能具有非常不同的拥塞属性。我们根据与实体相关的不确定区域的（动态）交集图，定义了此类空间的拥塞潜力的不同度量，以描述实际可能发生的拥塞。先前的工作 [SoCG'13、EuroCG'14、SICOMP'16、SODA'19] 在同一不确定性模型中解决了使用某些有界频率的位置查询来最小化拥塞潜力的问题。结果表明，在最坏情况拥塞潜力方面，可以设计一种与其他甚至是洞察力查询方案（知道所有实体的轨迹）具有 $O(1)$ 竞争性的查询方案，并且受到相同的查询频率限制。在本文中，我们解决了双重问题：如何在任何固定时间间隔内保证拥塞潜力的固定范围，同时最小化查询频率，以查询总数或查询之间的最小间隔（粒度）来衡量。这种互补的目标需要完全不同的算法和分析。尽管如此，我们的结果与早期论文的结果相似，特别是在所需查询频率方面的严格竞争限制，但有一些令人惊讶的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过频率竞争查询策略，在移动实体间维持低拥堵风险，同时最小化查询频率。
AI.motivation: 先前工作聚焦于在有限查询频率下最小化拥堵风险，而本文解决其对偶问题：在保证拥堵风险上限的前提下，如何最小化查询频率。
AI.method: 基于动态不确定区域的交集图模型，设计竞争性查询策略，并通过理论分析推导查询频率的紧致竞争界。
AI.result: 证明了查询频率的紧致竞争界，与先前工作结果平行，但存在若干反直觉差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新算法在保证拥堵风险上限的同时，有效降低了查询频率需求，为动态环境监控提供了理论支持。

search_text: Frequency-Competitive Query Strategies to Maintain Low Congestion Potential Among Moving Entities 频率竞争查询策略以保持移动实体之间的低拥塞潜力 We consider the problem of using location queries to monitor the congestion potential among a collection of entities moving, with bounded speed but otherwise unpredictably, in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space. Uncertainty in entity locations due to potential motion between queries gives rise to a space of possible entity configurations at each moment in time, with possibly very different congestion properties. We define different measures of what we call the congestion potential of such spaces, in terms of the (dynamic) intersection graph of the uncertainty regions associated with entities, to describe the congestion that might actually occur. Previous work [SoCG'13, EuroCG'14, SICOMP'16, SODA'19], in the same uncertainty model, addressed the problem of minimizing congestion potential using location queries of some bounded frequency. It was shown that it is possible to design a query scheme that is $O(1)$-competitive, in terms of worst-case congestion potential, with other, even clairvoyant query schemes (that know the trajectories of all entities), subject to the same bound on query frequency. In this paper we address the dual problem: how to guarantee a fixed bound on congestion potential while minimizing the query frequency, measured in terms of total number of queries or the minimum spacing between queries (granularity), over any fixed time interval. This complementary objective necessitates quite different algorithms and analyses. Nevertheless, our results parallel those of the earlier papers, specifically tight competitive bounds on required query frequency, with a few surprising differences. 我们考虑使用位置查询来监控在 $d$ 维欧几里德空间中以有限速度移动但在其他方面不可预测的实体集合之间的拥塞潜力的问题。由于查询之间的潜在运动而导致的实体位置的不确定性会在每个时刻产生可能的实体配置空间，并且可能具有非常不同的拥塞属性。我们根据与实体相关的不确定区域的（动态）交集图，定义了此类空间的拥塞潜力的不同度量，以描述实际可能发生的拥塞。先前的工作 [SoCG'13、EuroCG'14、SICOMP'16、SODA'19] 在同一不确定性模型中解决了使用某些有界频率的位置查询来最小化拥塞潜力的问题。结果表明，在最坏情况拥塞潜力方面，可以设计一种与其他甚至是洞察力查询方案（知道所有实体的轨迹）具有 $O(1)$ 竞争性的查询方案，并且受到相同的查询频率限制。在本文中，我们解决了双重问题：如何在任何固定时间间隔内保证拥塞潜力的固定范围，同时最小化查询频率，以查询总数或查询之间的最小间隔（粒度）来衡量。这种互补的目标需要完全不同的算法和分析。尽管如此，我们的结果与早期论文的结果相似，特别是在所需查询频率方面的严格竞争限制，但有一些令人惊讶的差异。 本文研究如何通过频率竞争查询策略，在移动实体间维持低拥堵风险，同时最小化查询频率。 William Evans,David Kirkpatrick cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Yuantong Li,Xiaokai Wei,Zijian Wang,Shen Wang,Parminder Bhatia,Xiaofei Ma,Andrew Arnold
title: Debiasing Neural Retrieval via In-batch Balancing Regularization
title_zh: 通过批量平衡正则化消除神经检索偏差
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, and 3 tables. A version appears in the Proceedings of the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing (GeBNLP), 2022
comments: 9 pages, 1 figure, and 3 tables. A version appears in the Proceedings of the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing (GeBNLP), 2022
abstract: People frequently interact with information retrieval (IR) systems, however, IR models exhibit biases and discrimination towards various demographics. The in-processing fair ranking methods provide a trade-offs between accuracy and fairness through adding a fairness-related regularization term in the loss function. However, there haven't been intuitive objective functions that depend on the click probability and user engagement to directly optimize towards this. In this work, we propose the In-Batch Balancing Regularization (IBBR) to mitigate the ranking disparity among subgroups. In particular, we develop a differentiable \textit{normed Pairwise Ranking Fairness} (nPRF) and leverage the T-statistics on top of nPRF over subgroups as a regularization to improve fairness. Empirical results with the BERT-based neural rankers on the MS MARCO Passage Retrieval dataset with the human-annotated non-gendered queries benchmark \citep{rekabsaz2020neural} show that our IBBR method with nPRF achieves significantly less bias with minimal degradation in ranking performance compared with the baseline.
summary: People frequently interact with information retrieval (IR) systems, however, IR models exhibit biases and discrimination towards various demographics. The in-processing fair ranking methods provide a trade-offs between accuracy and fairness through adding a fairness-related regularization term in the loss function. However, there haven't been intuitive objective functions that depend on the click probability and user engagement to directly optimize towards this. In this work, we propose the In-Batch Balancing Regularization (IBBR) to mitigate the ranking disparity among subgroups. In particular, we develop a differentiable \textit{normed Pairwise Ranking Fairness} (nPRF) and leverage the T-statistics on top of nPRF over subgroups as a regularization to improve fairness. Empirical results with the BERT-based neural rankers on the MS MARCO Passage Retrieval dataset with the human-annotated non-gendered queries benchmark \citep{rekabsaz2020neural} show that our IBBR method with nPRF achieves significantly less bias with minimal degradation in ranking performance compared with the baseline.
abstract_zh: 人们经常与信息检索 (IR) 系统交互，然而，IR 模型对不同的人口统计数据表现出偏见和歧视。处理中公平排名方法通过在损失函数中添加与公平相关的正则化项来提供准确性和公平性之间的权衡。然而，还没有依赖于点击概率和用户参与度的直观目标函数来直接对此进行优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了批量平衡正则化（IBBR）来减轻子组之间的排名差异。特别是，我们开发了一个可微的 \textit{normed Pairwise Ranking Fairness} (nPRF)，并利用子组上 nPRF 之上的 T 统计量作为正则化来提高公平性。使用基于 BERT 的神经排序器在 MS MARCO Passage Retrieval 数据集上使用人工注释的非性别查询基准 \citep{rekabsaz2020neural} 得出的经验结果表明，与基线相比，我们使用 nPRF 的 IBBR 方法可显着减少偏差，并且排序性能的下降最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过批次内平衡正则化来减轻神经检索模型中排名偏差的方法。
AI.motivation: 信息检索系统中存在对不同群体的偏差和歧视，现有的方法在准确性和公平性之间难以取得平衡，缺乏直观的基于点击概率和用户参与度的目标函数。
AI.method: 提出了一种可微的归一化成对排名公平性（nPRF）指标，并利用子群上的T统计量作为正则化项，以改进公平性。
AI.result: 在基于BERT的神经排序模型和MS MARCO数据集上的实验表明，该方法在减少偏差的同时，排名性能仅有轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的IBBR方法能够有效缓解神经检索模型中的排名偏差问题，同时保持较高的排序性能。

title: GRACE-C: Generalized Rate Agnostic Causal Estimation via Constraints
title_zh: GRACE-C：通过约束进行广义速率不可知因果估计
comment: published in International Conference on Learning Representation (Spotlight)
comments: published in International Conference on Learning Representation (Spotlight)
abstract: Graphical structures estimated by causal learning algorithms from time series data can provide misleading causal information if the causal timescale of the generating process fails to match the measurement timescale of the data. Existing algorithms provide limited resources to respond to this challenge, and so researchers must either use models that they know are likely misleading, or else forego causal learning entirely. Existing methods face up-to-four distinct shortfalls, as they might 1) require that the difference between causal and measurement timescales is known; 2) only handle very small number of random variables when the timescale difference is unknown; 3) only apply to pairs of variables; or 4) be unable to find a solution given statistical noise in the data. This research addresses these challenges. Our approach combines constraint programming with both theoretical insights into the problem structure and prior information about admissible causal interactions to achieve multiple orders of magnitude in speed-up. The resulting system maintains theoretical guarantees while scaling to significantly larger sets of random variables (>100) without knowledge of timescale differences. This method is also robust to edge misidentification and can use parametric connection strengths, while optionally finding the optimal solution among many possible ones.
summary: Graphical structures estimated by causal learning algorithms from time series data can provide misleading causal information if the causal timescale of the generating process fails to match the measurement timescale of the data. Existing algorithms provide limited resources to respond to this challenge, and so researchers must either use models that they know are likely misleading, or else forego causal learning entirely. Existing methods face up-to-four distinct shortfalls, as they might 1) require that the difference between causal and measurement timescales is known; 2) only handle very small number of random variables when the timescale difference is unknown; 3) only apply to pairs of variables; or 4) be unable to find a solution given statistical noise in the data. This research addresses these challenges. Our approach combines constraint programming with both theoretical insights into the problem structure and prior information about admissible causal interactions to achieve multiple orders of magnitude in speed-up. The resulting system maintains theoretical guarantees while scaling to significantly larger sets of random variables (>100) without knowledge of timescale differences. This method is also robust to edge misidentification and can use parametric connection strengths, while optionally finding the optimal solution among many possible ones.
abstract_zh: 如果生成过程的因果时间尺度与数据的测量时间尺度不匹配，则通过因果学习算法从时间序列数据估计的图形结构可能会提供误导性的因果信息。现有算法提供的资源有限来应对这一挑战，因此研究人员必须要么使用他们知道可能具有误导性的模型，要么完全放弃因果学习。现有方法面临多达四个明显的缺陷，因为它们可能 1）要求已知因果时间尺度和测量时间尺度之间的差异； 2）当时间尺度差异未知时，仅处理非常少量的随机变量； 3）仅适用于变量对；或 4) 由于数据中存在统计噪声而无法找到解决方案。这项研究解决了这些挑战。我们的方法将约束规划与对问题结构的理论见解和有关可接受的因果相互作用的先验信息相结合，以实现多个数量级的加速。由此产生的系统保持了理论保证，同时在不知道时间尺度差异的情况下扩展到更大的随机变量集（> 100）。该方法对于边缘错误识别也具有鲁棒性，并且可以使用参数连接强度，同时可以选择在许多可能的解决方案中找到最佳解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRACE-C的方法，用于解决时间序列数据中因果学习算法因因果时间尺度与测量时间尺度不匹配而导致的误导性因果信息问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的因果学习算法在处理时间尺度不匹配问题时存在诸多不足，例如需要已知时间尺度差异、仅适用于少量变量、仅适用于变量对或无法处理数据中的统计噪声。
AI.method: 本文方法结合约束编程、理论洞察和先验因果交互信息，实现多数量级的速度提升，并在无需时间尺度差异知识的情况下扩展到更大的变量集。
AI.result: 该方法在保持理论保证的同时，能够处理超过100个变量，并且对边误识别具有鲁棒性，还能使用参数连接强度并选择最优解。
AI.conclusion: GRACE-C方法有效解决了因果学习中的时间尺度不匹配问题，适用于更大规模的数据集，并具有鲁棒性和灵活性。

search_text: GRACE-C: Generalized Rate Agnostic Causal Estimation via Constraints GRACE-C：通过约束进行广义速率不可知因果估计 Graphical structures estimated by causal learning algorithms from time series data can provide misleading causal information if the causal timescale of the generating process fails to match the measurement timescale of the data. Existing algorithms provide limited resources to respond to this challenge, and so researchers must either use models that they know are likely misleading, or else forego causal learning entirely. Existing methods face up-to-four distinct shortfalls, as they might 1) require that the difference between causal and measurement timescales is known; 2) only handle very small number of random variables when the timescale difference is unknown; 3) only apply to pairs of variables; or 4) be unable to find a solution given statistical noise in the data. This research addresses these challenges. Our approach combines constraint programming with both theoretical insights into the problem structure and prior information about admissible causal interactions to achieve multiple orders of magnitude in speed-up. The resulting system maintains theoretical guarantees while scaling to significantly larger sets of random variables (>100) without knowledge of timescale differences. This method is also robust to edge misidentification and can use parametric connection strengths, while optionally finding the optimal solution among many possible ones. 如果生成过程的因果时间尺度与数据的测量时间尺度不匹配，则通过因果学习算法从时间序列数据估计的图形结构可能会提供误导性的因果信息。现有算法提供的资源有限来应对这一挑战，因此研究人员必须要么使用他们知道可能具有误导性的模型，要么完全放弃因果学习。现有方法面临多达四个明显的缺陷，因为它们可能 1）要求已知因果时间尺度和测量时间尺度之间的差异； 2）当时间尺度差异未知时，仅处理非常少量的随机变量； 3）仅适用于变量对；或 4) 由于数据中存在统计噪声而无法找到解决方案。这项研究解决了这些挑战。我们的方法将约束规划与对问题结构的理论见解和有关可接受的因果相互作用的先验信息相结合，以实现多个数量级的加速。由此产生的系统保持了理论保证，同时在不知道时间尺度差异的情况下扩展到更大的随机变量集（> 100）。该方法对于边缘错误识别也具有鲁棒性，并且可以使用参数连接强度，同时可以选择在许多可能的解决方案中找到最佳解决方案。 本文提出了一种名为GRACE-C的方法，用于解决时间序列数据中因果学习算法因因果时间尺度与测量时间尺度不匹配而导致的误导性因果信息问题。 Mohammadsajad Abavisani,David Danks,Sergey Plis stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: PromptDA: Label-guided Data Augmentation for Prompt-based Few-shot Learners
title_zh: PromptDA：针对基于提示的少样本学习者的标签引导数据增强
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of EACL 2023 main conference. Code is available at https://github.com/canyuchen/PromptDA
comments: Accepted to Proceedings of EACL 2023 main conference. Code is available at https://github.com/canyuchen/PromptDA
abstract: Recent advances in large pre-trained language models (PLMs) lead to impressive gains in natural language understanding (NLU) tasks with task-specific fine-tuning. However, directly fine-tuning PLMs heavily relies on sufficient labeled training instances, which are usually hard to obtain. Prompt-based tuning on PLMs has shown to be powerful for various downstream few-shot tasks. Existing works studying prompt-based tuning for few-shot NLU tasks mainly focus on deriving proper label words with a verbalizer or generating prompt templates to elicit semantics from PLMs. In addition, conventional data augmentation strategies such as synonym substitution, though widely adopted in low-resource scenarios, only bring marginal improvements for prompt-based few-shot learning. Thus, an important research question arises: how to design effective data augmentation methods for prompt-based few-shot tuning? To this end, considering the label semantics are essential in prompt-based tuning, we propose a novel label-guided data augmentation framework PromptDA, which exploits the enriched label semantic information for data augmentation. Extensive experiment results on few-shot text classification tasks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed framework by effectively leveraging label semantics and data augmentation for natural language understanding. Our code is available at https://github.com/canyuchen/PromptDA.
summary: Recent advances in large pre-trained language models (PLMs) lead to impressive gains in natural language understanding (NLU) tasks with task-specific fine-tuning. However, directly fine-tuning PLMs heavily relies on sufficient labeled training instances, which are usually hard to obtain. Prompt-based tuning on PLMs has shown to be powerful for various downstream few-shot tasks. Existing works studying prompt-based tuning for few-shot NLU tasks mainly focus on deriving proper label words with a verbalizer or generating prompt templates to elicit semantics from PLMs. In addition, conventional data augmentation strategies such as synonym substitution, though widely adopted in low-resource scenarios, only bring marginal improvements for prompt-based few-shot learning. Thus, an important research question arises: how to design effective data augmentation methods for prompt-based few-shot tuning? To this end, considering the label semantics are essential in prompt-based tuning, we propose a novel label-guided data augmentation framework PromptDA, which exploits the enriched label semantic information for data augmentation. Extensive experiment results on few-shot text classification tasks demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed framework by effectively leveraging label semantics and data augmentation for natural language understanding. Our code is available at https://github.com/canyuchen/PromptDA.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的最新进展通过特定于任务的微调在自然语言理解 (NLU) 任务中取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，直接微调 PLM 在很大程度上依赖于足够的标记训练实例，而这些实例通常很难获得。 PLM 上基于提示的调整已被证明对于各种下游小样本任务非常强大。现有研究针对小样本 NLU 任务的基于提示的调整的工作主要集中于使用语言器导出适当的标签词或生成提示模板以从 PLM 中引出语义。此外，传统的数据增强策略（例如同义词替换）虽然在资源匮乏的场景中被广泛采用，但只能为基于提示的小样本学习带来边际改进。因此，出现了一个重要的研究问题：如何为基于提示的小样本调整设计有效的数据增强方法？为此，考虑到标签语义在基于提示的调整中至关重要，我们提出了一种新颖的标签引导数据增强框架 PromptDA，它利用丰富的标签语义信息进行数据增强。在少量文本分类任务上的大量实验结果证明了所提出的框架通过有效利用标签语义和数据增强来实现自然语言理解的卓越性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/canyuchen/PromptDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PromptDA框架，通过利用标签语义信息进行数据增强，以提升基于提示的少样本学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的少样本学习方法在数据增强方面效果有限，而标签语义对提示调整至关重要，需设计更有效的数据增强策略。
AI.method: PromptDA通过挖掘标签的语义信息生成增强数据，结合合成样本与原始数据训练模型，强化标签与提示的关联性。
AI.result: 在少样本文本分类任务中，PromptDA显著优于现有方法，验证了标签引导数据增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 标签语义驱动的数据增强能有效提升少样本学习性能，PromptDA框架为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Liang Liu,Peng Chen,Guangchun Luo,Zhao Kang,Yonggang Luo,Sanchu Han
title: Scalable Multi-view Clustering with Graph Filtering
title_zh: 具有图过滤的可扩展多视图聚类
abstract: With the explosive growth of multi-source data, multi-view clustering has attracted great attention in recent years. Most existing multi-view methods operate in raw feature space and heavily depend on the quality of original feature representation. Moreover, they are often designed for feature data and ignore the rich topology structure information. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a generic framework to cluster both attribute and graph data with heterogeneous features. It is capable of exploring the interplay between feature and structure. Specifically, we first adopt graph filtering technique to eliminate high-frequency noise to achieve a clustering-friendly smooth representation. To handle the scalability challenge, we develop a novel sampling strategy to improve the quality of anchors. Extensive experiments on attribute and graph benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach with respect to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: With the explosive growth of multi-source data, multi-view clustering has attracted great attention in recent years. Most existing multi-view methods operate in raw feature space and heavily depend on the quality of original feature representation. Moreover, they are often designed for feature data and ignore the rich topology structure information. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a generic framework to cluster both attribute and graph data with heterogeneous features. It is capable of exploring the interplay between feature and structure. Specifically, we first adopt graph filtering technique to eliminate high-frequency noise to achieve a clustering-friendly smooth representation. To handle the scalability challenge, we develop a novel sampling strategy to improve the quality of anchors. Extensive experiments on attribute and graph benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our approach with respect to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着多源数据的爆炸式增长，多视图聚类引起了人们的广泛关注。大多数现有的多视图方法在原始特征空间中运行，并且很大程度上依赖于原始特征表示的质量。而且，它们往往是针对特征数据而设计的，而忽略了丰富的拓扑结构信息。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一个通用框架来对具有异构特征的属性和图数据进行聚类。它能够探索特征和结构之间的相互作用。具体来说，我们首先采用图过滤技术来消除高频噪声，以实现聚类友好的平滑表示。为了应对可扩展性挑战，我们开发了一种新颖的采样策略来提高锚点的质量。对属性和图基准的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图过滤的可扩展多视图聚类框架，能够同时处理属性数据和图结构数据。
AI.motivation: 现有多视图聚类方法依赖原始特征表示且忽略拓扑结构信息，难以有效处理异构特征和大规模数据。
AI.method: 采用图过滤技术消除高频噪声获得平滑表示，并设计新型采样策略优化锚点质量以提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在多个属性数据集和图数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于当前最先进的多视图聚类算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过融合特征与结构信息，结合图过滤与采样优化策略，在聚类性能和可扩展性方面取得显著优势。
