title: Reconfiguration of Digraph Homomorphisms
title_zh: 有向图同态的重构
abstract: For a fixed graph H, the H-Recoloring problem asks whether for two given homomorphisms from a graph G to H, we can transform one into the other by changing the image of a single vertex of G in each step and maintaining a homomorphism from G to H throughout. We extend an algorithm of Wrochna for H-Recoloring where H is a square-free loopless undirected graph to the more general setting of directed graphs. We obtain a polynomial-time algorithm for H-Recoloring in this setting whenever H is a loopless digraph that does not contain a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero and whenever H is a reflexive digraph that contains neither a 3-cycle of algebraic girth 1 nor a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero.
summary: For a fixed graph H, the H-Recoloring problem asks whether for two given homomorphisms from a graph G to H, we can transform one into the other by changing the image of a single vertex of G in each step and maintaining a homomorphism from G to H throughout. We extend an algorithm of Wrochna for H-Recoloring where H is a square-free loopless undirected graph to the more general setting of directed graphs. We obtain a polynomial-time algorithm for H-Recoloring in this setting whenever H is a loopless digraph that does not contain a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero and whenever H is a reflexive digraph that contains neither a 3-cycle of algebraic girth 1 nor a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero.
abstract_zh: 对于固定图 H，H 重着色问题询问对于从图 G 到 H 的两个给定同态，我们是否可以通过在每一步中更改 G 的单个顶点的图像并始终保持从 G 到 H 的同态来将一个同态变换为另一个。我们将 Wrochna 的 H 重着色算法扩展为更一般的有向图设置，其中 H 是无平方无环无向图。每当 H 是不包含 4 周期代数周长 0 的无环有向图，并且每当 H 是既不包含 3 周期代数周长 1 也不包含 4 周期代数周长 0 的自反有向图时，我们就在此设置中获得 H 重着色的多项式时间算法。

AI.tldr: 研究有向图同态重配置问题，扩展Wrochna算法到有向图，并确定多项式时间算法的条件。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅适用于无向图，需扩展至更通用的有向图场景以解决更广泛的问题。
AI.method: 基于Wrochna算法，结合有向图特性，通过分析图的结构限制（如无环、无特定环）设计多项式时间算法。
AI.result: 当H为无环有向图且不含4-环，或为反射有向图且不含特定3-环/4-环时，H-Recoloring问题可在多项式时间内求解。
AI.conclusion: 提出适用于有向图的同态重配置算法，明确了图结构限制与计算复杂性之间的关系，为相关领域提供理论支持。

search_text: Reconfiguration of Digraph Homomorphisms 有向图同态的重构 For a fixed graph H, the H-Recoloring problem asks whether for two given homomorphisms from a graph G to H, we can transform one into the other by changing the image of a single vertex of G in each step and maintaining a homomorphism from G to H throughout. We extend an algorithm of Wrochna for H-Recoloring where H is a square-free loopless undirected graph to the more general setting of directed graphs. We obtain a polynomial-time algorithm for H-Recoloring in this setting whenever H is a loopless digraph that does not contain a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero and whenever H is a reflexive digraph that contains neither a 3-cycle of algebraic girth 1 nor a 4-cycle of algebraic girth zero. 对于固定图 H，H 重着色问题询问对于从图 G 到 H 的两个给定同态，我们是否可以通过在每一步中更改 G 的单个顶点的图像并始终保持从 G 到 H 的同态来将一个同态变换为另一个。我们将 Wrochna 的 H 重着色算法扩展为更一般的有向图设置，其中 H 是无平方无环无向图。每当 H 是不包含 4 周期代数周长 0 的无环有向图，并且每当 H 是既不包含 3 周期代数周长 1 也不包含 4 周期代数周长 0 的自反有向图时，我们就在此设置中获得 H 重着色的多项式时间算法。 研究有向图同态重配置问题，扩展Wrochna算法到有向图，并确定多项式时间算法的条件。 Benjamin Lévêque,Moritz Mühlenthaler,Thomas Suzan cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Giuseppe De Giacomo,Dror Fried,Fabio Patrizi,Shufang Zhu
title: Mimicking Behaviors in Separated Domains
title_zh: 模仿不同领域的行为
abstract: Devising a strategy to make a system mimicking behaviors from another system is a problem that naturally arises in many areas of Computer Science. In this work, we interpret this problem in the context of intelligent agents, from the perspective of LTLf, a formalism commonly used in AI for expressing finite-trace properties. Our model consists of two separated dynamic domains, D_A and D_B, and an LTLf specification that formalizes the notion of mimicking by mapping properties on behaviors (traces) of D_A into properties on behaviors of D_B. The goal is to synthesize a strategy that step-by-step maps every behavior of D_A into a behavior of D_B so that the specification is met. We consider several forms of mapping specifications, ranging from simple ones to full LTLf, and for each we study synthesis algorithms and computational properties.
summary: Devising a strategy to make a system mimicking behaviors from another system is a problem that naturally arises in many areas of Computer Science. In this work, we interpret this problem in the context of intelligent agents, from the perspective of LTLf, a formalism commonly used in AI for expressing finite-trace properties. Our model consists of two separated dynamic domains, D_A and D_B, and an LTLf specification that formalizes the notion of mimicking by mapping properties on behaviors (traces) of D_A into properties on behaviors of D_B. The goal is to synthesize a strategy that step-by-step maps every behavior of D_A into a behavior of D_B so that the specification is met. We consider several forms of mapping specifications, ranging from simple ones to full LTLf, and for each we study synthesis algorithms and computational properties.
abstract_zh: 设计一种策略来使一个系统模仿另一个系统的行为是计算机科学许多领域中自然出现的一个问题。在这项工作中，我们从 LTLf 的角度在智能代理的背景下解释这个问题，LTLf 是人工智能中常用的一种表达有限跟踪属性的形式。我们的模型由两个独立的动态域 D_A 和 D_B 以及一个 LTLf 规范组成，LTLf 规范通过将 D_A 行为（痕迹）的属性映射到 D_B 行为的属性来形式化模仿的概念。目标是综合一个策略，逐步将 D_A 的每个行为映射到 D_B 的行为，从而满足规范。我们考虑几种形式的映射规范，从简单的到完整的 LTLf，并且针对每种形式我们研究综合算法和计算属性。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是设计一种策略，使两个分离动态领域中的系统行为能够相互模仿，满足LTLf规范。
AI.motivation: 解决跨领域行为模仿的挑战，提升智能代理在不同动态环境中的适应性与规范性。
AI.method: 基于LTLf形式化规范，构建两个分离领域D_A与D_B的行为映射模型，并研究不同映射规范下的策略合成算法。
AI.result: 提出了针对简单到完整LTLf映射规范的策略合成算法，分析了其计算复杂性及可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为跨领域行为模仿提供了形式化框架，未来可扩展至更复杂规范及实际应用场景。

authors_text: Bojan Sofronievski,Elena Velovska,Martin Velichkovski,Violeta Argirova,Tea Veljkovikj,Risto Chavdarov,Stefan Janev,Kristijan Lazarev,Toni Bachvarovski,Zoran Ivanovski,Dimitar Tashkovski,Branislav Gerazov
title: Macedonian Speech Synthesis for Assistive Technology Applications
title_zh: 用于辅助技术应用的马其顿语语音合成
abstract: Speech technology is becoming ever more ubiquitous with the advance of speech enabled devices and services. The use of speech synthesis in Augmentative and Alternative Communication tools, has facilitated inclusion of individuals with speech impediments allowing them to communicate with their surroundings using speech. Although there are numerous speech synthesis systems for the most spoken world languages, there is still a limited offer for smaller languages. We propose and compare three models built using parametric and deep learning techniques for Macedonian trained on a newly recorded corpus. We target low-resource edge deployment for Augmentative and Alternative Communication and assistive technologies, such as communication boards and screen readers. The listening test results show that parametric speech synthesis is as performant compared to the more advanced deep learning models. Since it also requires less resources, and offers full speech rate and pitch control, it is the preferred choice for building a Macedonian TTS system for this application scenario.
summary: Speech technology is becoming ever more ubiquitous with the advance of speech enabled devices and services. The use of speech synthesis in Augmentative and Alternative Communication tools, has facilitated inclusion of individuals with speech impediments allowing them to communicate with their surroundings using speech. Although there are numerous speech synthesis systems for the most spoken world languages, there is still a limited offer for smaller languages. We propose and compare three models built using parametric and deep learning techniques for Macedonian trained on a newly recorded corpus. We target low-resource edge deployment for Augmentative and Alternative Communication and assistive technologies, such as communication boards and screen readers. The listening test results show that parametric speech synthesis is as performant compared to the more advanced deep learning models. Since it also requires less resources, and offers full speech rate and pitch control, it is the preferred choice for building a Macedonian TTS system for this application scenario.
abstract_zh: 随着语音设备和服务的进步，语音技术变得越来越普遍。在增强性和替代性交流工具中使用语音合成，促进了有语言障碍的人的融入，使他们能够使用语音与周围环境进行交流。尽管针对世界上使用最广泛的语言有许多语音合成系统，但针对较小语言的提供仍然有限。我们提出并比较了使用参数化和深度学习技术为马其顿语在新记录的语料库上训练的三个模型。我们的目标是增强和替代通信以及辅助技术（例如通信板和屏幕阅读器）的低资源边缘部署。听力测试结果表明，与更先进的深度学习模型相比，参数语音合成的性能相同。由于它需要的资源较少，并且提供完整的语速和音调控制，因此它是为此应用场景构建马其顿语 TTS 系统的首选。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发适用于辅助技术的马其顿语语音合成系统，以支持言语障碍者的沟通需求。
AI.motivation: 现有主流语言的语音合成系统资源丰富，但小语种如马其顿语缺乏相应技术，难以满足辅助沟通工具在低资源环境下的部署需求。
AI.method: 基于新采集的语料库，采用参数化和深度学习方法构建三种模型，并针对边缘设备的低资源特性进行优化比较。
AI.result: 参数化语音合成在性能上与深度学习模型相当，且资源占用更少，同时支持语速和音高调节，更适合辅助技术应用。
AI.conclusion: 参数化方法在资源效率和可控性方面更具优势，是构建马其顿语TTS系统的优选方案。

title: Sim-to-Real Strategy for Spatially Aware Robot Navigation in Uneven Outdoor Environments
title_zh: 不平坦户外环境中空间感知机器人导航的模拟到真实策略
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is hugely successful due to the availability of realistic simulated environments. However, performance degradation during simulation to real-world transfer still remains a challenging problem for the policies trained in simulated environments. To close this sim-to-real gap, we present a novel hybrid architecture that utilizes an intermediate output from a fully trained attention DRL policy as a navigation cost map for outdoor navigation. Our attention DRL network incorporates a robot-centric elevation map, IMU data, the robot's pose, previous actions, and goal information as inputs to compute a navigation cost-map that highlights non-traversable regions. We compute least-cost waypoints on the cost map and utilize the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) with velocity constraints on high cost regions to follow the waypoints in highly uneven outdoor environments. Our formulation generates dynamically feasible velocities along stable, traversable regions to reach the robot's goals. We observe an increase of 5% in terms of success rate, 13.09% of the decrease in average robot vibration, and a 19.33% reduction in average velocity compared to end-to-end DRL method and state-of-the-art methods in complex outdoor environments. We evaluate the benefits of our method using a Clearpath Husky robot in both simulated and real-world uneven environments.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is hugely successful due to the availability of realistic simulated environments. However, performance degradation during simulation to real-world transfer still remains a challenging problem for the policies trained in simulated environments. To close this sim-to-real gap, we present a novel hybrid architecture that utilizes an intermediate output from a fully trained attention DRL policy as a navigation cost map for outdoor navigation. Our attention DRL network incorporates a robot-centric elevation map, IMU data, the robot's pose, previous actions, and goal information as inputs to compute a navigation cost-map that highlights non-traversable regions. We compute least-cost waypoints on the cost map and utilize the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) with velocity constraints on high cost regions to follow the waypoints in highly uneven outdoor environments. Our formulation generates dynamically feasible velocities along stable, traversable regions to reach the robot's goals. We observe an increase of 5% in terms of success rate, 13.09% of the decrease in average robot vibration, and a 19.33% reduction in average velocity compared to end-to-end DRL method and state-of-the-art methods in complex outdoor environments. We evaluate the benefits of our method using a Clearpath Husky robot in both simulated and real-world uneven environments.
abstract_zh: 由于真实模拟环境的可用性，深度强化学习（DRL）取得了巨大成功。然而，对于在模拟环境中训练的策略来说，模拟到现实世界传输过程中的性能下降仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了缩小模拟与真实之间的差距，我们提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构利用经过充分训练的注意力 DRL 策略的中间输出作为户外导航的导航成本图。我们的注意力 DRL 网络结合了以机器人为中心的高程图、IMU 数据、机器人的姿态、之前的动作和目标信息作为输入，以计算突出显示不可穿越区域的导航成本地图。我们在成本地图上计算最低成本航路点，并利用动态窗口方法（DWA）对高成本区域进行速度限制，以在高度不平坦的室外环境中遵循航路点。我们的公式沿着稳定、可穿越的区域生成动态可行的速度，以达到机器人的目标。我们观察到，与复杂室外环境中的端到端 DRL 方法和最先进的方法相比，成功率提高了 5%，平均机器人振动降低了 13.09%，平均速度降低了 19.33%。我们使用 Clearpath Husky 机器人在模拟和现实世界的不平坦环境中评估我们的方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度强化学习与动态窗口方法的混合架构，用于解决复杂户外环境中机器人导航的仿真到现实迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度强化学习在仿真环境中表现优异，但其在真实户外场景中的性能下降问题仍未解决，亟需缩小仿真与现实间的差距。
AI.method: 通过注意力机制DRL网络生成导航代价地图，结合IMU数据、地形信息等输入，计算可通行区域并利用DWA算法规划动态可行路径。
AI.result: 相比端到端DRL方法，成功率提升5%，机器人振动降低13.09%，平均速度下降19.33%，在仿真与真实不平地形中均验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合DRL与DWA的优势，有效提升了复杂户外环境下的导航稳定性，为仿真到现实迁移提供了可行方案。

search_text: Sim-to-Real Strategy for Spatially Aware Robot Navigation in Uneven Outdoor Environments 不平坦户外环境中空间感知机器人导航的模拟到真实策略 Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) is hugely successful due to the availability of realistic simulated environments. However, performance degradation during simulation to real-world transfer still remains a challenging problem for the policies trained in simulated environments. To close this sim-to-real gap, we present a novel hybrid architecture that utilizes an intermediate output from a fully trained attention DRL policy as a navigation cost map for outdoor navigation. Our attention DRL network incorporates a robot-centric elevation map, IMU data, the robot's pose, previous actions, and goal information as inputs to compute a navigation cost-map that highlights non-traversable regions. We compute least-cost waypoints on the cost map and utilize the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA) with velocity constraints on high cost regions to follow the waypoints in highly uneven outdoor environments. Our formulation generates dynamically feasible velocities along stable, traversable regions to reach the robot's goals. We observe an increase of 5% in terms of success rate, 13.09% of the decrease in average robot vibration, and a 19.33% reduction in average velocity compared to end-to-end DRL method and state-of-the-art methods in complex outdoor environments. We evaluate the benefits of our method using a Clearpath Husky robot in both simulated and real-world uneven environments. 由于真实模拟环境的可用性，深度强化学习（DRL）取得了巨大成功。然而，对于在模拟环境中训练的策略来说，模拟到现实世界传输过程中的性能下降仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了缩小模拟与真实之间的差距，我们提出了一种新颖的混合架构，该架构利用经过充分训练的注意力 DRL 策略的中间输出作为户外导航的导航成本图。我们的注意力 DRL 网络结合了以机器人为中心的高程图、IMU 数据、机器人的姿态、之前的动作和目标信息作为输入，以计算突出显示不可穿越区域的导航成本地图。我们在成本地图上计算最低成本航路点，并利用动态窗口方法（DWA）对高成本区域进行速度限制，以在高度不平坦的室外环境中遵循航路点。我们的公式沿着稳定、可穿越的区域生成动态可行的速度，以达到机器人的目标。我们观察到，与复杂室外环境中的端到端 DRL 方法和最先进的方法相比，成功率提高了 5%，平均机器人振动降低了 13.09%，平均速度降低了 19.33%。我们使用 Clearpath Husky 机器人在模拟和现实世界的不平坦环境中评估我们的方法的优点。 本文提出了一种结合深度强化学习与动态窗口方法的混合架构，用于解决复杂户外环境中机器人导航的仿真到现实迁移问题。 Kasun Weerakoon,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

title: Computing the ensemble spread from deterministic weather predictions using conditional generative adversarial networks
title_zh: 使用条件生成对抗网络计算确定性天气预报的集合传播
abstract: Ensemble prediction systems are an invaluable tool for weather forecasting. Practically, ensemble predictions are obtained by running several perturbations of the deterministic control forecast. However, ensemble prediction is associated with a high computational cost and often involves statistical post-processing steps to improve its quality. Here we propose to use deep-learning-based algorithms to learn the statistical properties of an ensemble prediction system, the ensemble spread, given only the deterministic control forecast. Thus, once trained, the costly ensemble prediction system will not be needed anymore to obtain future ensemble forecasts, and the statistical properties of the ensemble can be derived from a single deterministic forecast. We adapt the classical pix2pix architecture to a three-dimensional model and also experiment with a shared latent space encoder-decoder model, and train them against several years of operational (ensemble) weather forecasts for the 500 hPa geopotential height. The results demonstrate that the trained models indeed allow obtaining a highly accurate ensemble spread from the control forecast only.
summary: Ensemble prediction systems are an invaluable tool for weather forecasting. Practically, ensemble predictions are obtained by running several perturbations of the deterministic control forecast. However, ensemble prediction is associated with a high computational cost and often involves statistical post-processing steps to improve its quality. Here we propose to use deep-learning-based algorithms to learn the statistical properties of an ensemble prediction system, the ensemble spread, given only the deterministic control forecast. Thus, once trained, the costly ensemble prediction system will not be needed anymore to obtain future ensemble forecasts, and the statistical properties of the ensemble can be derived from a single deterministic forecast. We adapt the classical pix2pix architecture to a three-dimensional model and also experiment with a shared latent space encoder-decoder model, and train them against several years of operational (ensemble) weather forecasts for the 500 hPa geopotential height. The results demonstrate that the trained models indeed allow obtaining a highly accurate ensemble spread from the control forecast only.
abstract_zh: 集合预测系统是天气预报的宝贵工具。实际上，集合预测是通过运行确定性控制预测的几次扰动来获得的。然而，集成预测的计算成本较高，并且通常涉及统计后处理步骤以提高其质量。在这里，我们建议使用基于深度学习的算法来学习集成预测系统的统计特性，即仅给出确定性控制预测的集成扩展。因此，一旦经过训练，将不再需要昂贵的集合预测系统来获得未来的集合预测，并且集合的统计特性可以从单个确定性预测中得出。我们将经典的 pix2pix 架构应用于三维模型，并尝试了共享的潜在空间编码器-解码器模型，并根据多年的 500 hPa 位势高度的业务（集合）天气预报对其进行训练。结果表明，经过训练的模型确实可以仅从控制预测中获得高度准确的集合分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）从确定性天气预测中计算集合预报的离散度，以替代传统的高成本集合预测系统。
AI.motivation: 传统集合预报系统需要运行多个扰动预测，计算成本高且需统计后处理。本文旨在通过深度学习模型直接从单次确定性预报中生成集合离散度，降低计算成本。
AI.method: 基于pix2pix架构改进三维模型，并设计共享潜在空间的编码器-解码器结构，利用多年实际天气预报数据（500hPa位势高度）进行训练。
AI.result: 训练后的模型能够仅凭确定性预报准确生成集合离散度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可替代传统集合预报系统，显著提升天气预测效率，同时保持统计特性准确性。

authors_text: Florinel-Alin Croitoru,Nicolae-Catalin Ristea,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Nicu Sebe
title: Learning Rate Curriculum
title_zh: 学习率课程
comment: Accepted at the International Journal of Computer Vision
comments: Accepted at the International Journal of Computer Vision
abstract: Most curriculum learning methods require an approach to sort the data samples by difficulty, which is often cumbersome to perform. In this work, we propose a novel curriculum learning approach termed Learning Rate Curriculum (LeRaC), which leverages the use of a different learning rate for each layer of a neural network to create a data-agnostic curriculum during the initial training epochs. More specifically, LeRaC assigns higher learning rates to neural layers closer to the input, gradually decreasing the learning rates as the layers are placed farther away from the input. The learning rates increase at various paces during the first training iterations, until they all reach the same value. From this point on, the neural model is trained as usual. This creates a model-level curriculum learning strategy that does not require sorting the examples by difficulty and is compatible with any neural network, generating higher performance levels regardless of the architecture. We conduct comprehensive experiments on 12 data sets from the computer vision (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet, ImageNet-200, Food-101, UTKFace, PASCAL VOC), language (BoolQ, QNLI, RTE) and audio (ESC-50, CREMA-D) domains, considering various convolutional (ResNet-18, Wide-ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, YOLOv5), recurrent (LSTM) and transformer (CvT, BERT, SepTr) architectures. We compare our approach with the conventional training regime, as well as with Curriculum by Smoothing (CBS), a state-of-the-art data-agnostic curriculum learning approach. Unlike CBS, our performance improvements over the standard training regime are consistent across all data sets and models. Furthermore, we significantly surpass CBS in terms of training time (there is no additional cost over the standard training regime for LeRaC). Our code is freely available at: https://github.com/CroitoruAlin/LeRaC.

Furthermore, we significantly surpass CBS in terms of training time (there is no additional cost over the standard training regime for LeRaC). Our code is freely available at: https://github.com/CroitoruAlin/LeRaC.
abstract_zh: 大多数课程学习方法都需要一种按难度对数据样本进行排序的方法，这通常执行起来很麻烦。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为学习率课程（LeRaC）的新颖课程学习方法，该方法利用神经网络每一层使用不同的学习率，在初始训练时期创建与数据无关的课程。更具体地说，LeRaC 为靠近输入的神经层分配较高的学习率，随着层远离输入而逐渐降低学习率。在第一次训练迭代期间，学习率以不同的速度增加，直到它们都达到相同的值。从此时起，神经模型就像往常一样进行训练。这创建了一个模型级课程学习策略，不需要按难度对示例进行排序，并且与任何神经网络兼容，无论架构如何，都能产生更高的性能水平。我们对计算机视觉（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet、ImageNet-200、Food-101、UTKFace、PASCAL VOC）、语言（BoolQ、QNLI、RTE）和音频（ESC-50、CREMA-D）领域的 12 个数据集进行综合实验，考虑各种卷积（ResNet-18、Wide-ResNet-50、 DenseNet-121、YOLOv5）、循环（LSTM）和变压器（CvT、BERT、SepTr）架构。我们将我们的方法与传统的培训制度以及平滑课程（CBS）（一种最先进的与数据无关的课程学习方法）进行比较。与 CBS 不同，我们在标准训练体系上的性能改进在所有数据集和模型中都是一致的。此外，我们在训练时间方面显着超过了 CBS（与 LeRaC 的标准训练制度相比，没有额外的成本）。我们的代码可免费获取：https://github.com/CroitoruAlin/LeRaC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需数据排序的课程学习方法LeRaC，通过为神经网络各层分配不同学习率，实现模型级课程学习。
AI.motivation: 现有课程学习方法需要繁琐的数据难度排序，而该方法旨在提供一种无需数据排序、兼容任意网络架构的自动课程学习策略。
AI.method: LeRaC为靠近输入层的神经网络分配较高学习率，随层数增加逐渐降低，初始训练阶段各层学习率以不同速度上升至统一值后按常规训练。
AI.result: 在12个跨领域数据集和多种网络架构上，LeRaC相较标准训练和CBS方法均取得性能提升，且训练时间无额外成本。
AI.conclusion: LeRaC通过模型级学习率调度实现了高效课程学习，无需数据排序且具有普适性，在多个任务中显著优于现有方法。

search_text: Learning Rate Curriculum 学习率课程 Most curriculum learning methods require an approach to sort the data samples by difficulty, which is often cumbersome to perform. In this work, we propose a novel curriculum learning approach termed Learning Rate Curriculum (LeRaC), which leverages the use of a different learning rate for each layer of a neural network to create a data-agnostic curriculum during the initial training epochs. More specifically, LeRaC assigns higher learning rates to neural layers closer to the input, gradually decreasing the learning rates as the layers are placed farther away from the input. The learning rates increase at various paces during the first training iterations, until they all reach the same value. From this point on, the neural model is trained as usual. This creates a model-level curriculum learning strategy that does not require sorting the examples by difficulty and is compatible with any neural network, generating higher performance levels regardless of the architecture. We conduct comprehensive experiments on 12 data sets from the computer vision (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet, ImageNet-200, Food-101, UTKFace, PASCAL VOC), language (BoolQ, QNLI, RTE) and audio (ESC-50, CREMA-D) domains, considering various convolutional (ResNet-18, Wide-ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, YOLOv5), recurrent (LSTM) and transformer (CvT, BERT, SepTr) architectures. We compare our approach with the conventional training regime, as well as with Curriculum by Smoothing (CBS), a state-of-the-art data-agnostic curriculum learning approach. Unlike CBS, our performance improvements over the standard training regime are consistent across all data sets and models. Furthermore, we significantly surpass CBS in terms of training time (there is no additional cost over the standard training regime for LeRaC). Our code is freely available at: https://github.com/CroitoruAlin/LeRaC. 大多数课程学习方法都需要一种按难度对数据样本进行排序的方法，这通常执行起来很麻烦。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为学习率课程（LeRaC）的新颖课程学习方法，该方法利用神经网络每一层使用不同的学习率，在初始训练时期创建与数据无关的课程。更具体地说，LeRaC 为靠近输入的神经层分配较高的学习率，随着层远离输入而逐渐降低学习率。在第一次训练迭代期间，学习率以不同的速度增加，直到它们都达到相同的值。从此时起，神经模型就像往常一样进行训练。这创建了一个模型级课程学习策略，不需要按难度对示例进行排序，并且与任何神经网络兼容，无论架构如何，都能产生更高的性能水平。我们对计算机视觉（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet、ImageNet-200、Food-101、UTKFace、PASCAL VOC）、语言（BoolQ、QNLI、RTE）和音频（ESC-50、CREMA-D）领域的 12 个数据集进行综合实验，考虑各种卷积（ResNet-18、Wide-ResNet-50、 DenseNet-121、YOLOv5）、循环（LSTM）和变压器（CvT、BERT、SepTr）架构。我们将我们的方法与传统的培训制度以及平滑课程（CBS）（一种最先进的与数据无关的课程学习方法）进行比较。与 CBS 不同，我们在标准训练体系上的性能改进在所有数据集和模型中都是一致的。此外，我们在训练时间方面显着超过了 CBS（与 LeRaC 的标准训练制度相比，没有额外的成本）。我们的代码可免费获取：https://github.com/CroitoruAlin/LeRaC。 本文提出了一种无需数据排序的课程学习方法LeRaC，通过为神经网络各层分配不同学习率，实现模型级课程学习。 Florinel-Alin Croitoru,Nicolae-Catalin Ristea,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Nicu Sebe cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Carbon Figures of Merit Knowledge Creation with a Hybrid Solution and Carbon Tables API
title_zh: 使用混合解决方案和碳表 API 创建碳价值知识
abstract: Nowadays there are algorithms, methods, and platforms that are being created to accelerate the discovery of materials that are able to absorb or adsorb $CO_2$ molecules that are in the atmosphere or during the combustion in power plants, for instance. In this work an asynchronous REST API is described to accelerate the creation of Carbon figures of merit knowledge, called Carbon Tables, because the knowledge is created from tables in scientific PDF documents and stored in knowledge graphs. The figures of merit knowledge creation solution uses a hybrid approach, in which heuristics and machine learning are part of. As a result, one can search the knowledge with mature and sophisticated cognitive tools, and create more with regards to Carbon figures of merit.
summary: Nowadays there are algorithms, methods, and platforms that are being created to accelerate the discovery of materials that are able to absorb or adsorb $CO_2$ molecules that are in the atmosphere or during the combustion in power plants, for instance. In this work an asynchronous REST API is described to accelerate the creation of Carbon figures of merit knowledge, called Carbon Tables, because the knowledge is created from tables in scientific PDF documents and stored in knowledge graphs. The figures of merit knowledge creation solution uses a hybrid approach, in which heuristics and machine learning are part of. As a result, one can search the knowledge with mature and sophisticated cognitive tools, and create more with regards to Carbon figures of merit.
abstract_zh: 如今，人们正在创建一些算法、方法和平台来加速发现能够吸收或吸附大气中或发电厂燃烧过程中的 $CO_2$ 分子的材料。在这项工作中，描述了一个异步 REST API，以加速创建 Carbon 品质因数知识（称为 Carbon Tables），因为知识是根据科学 PDF 文档中的表格创建并存储在知识图中的。品质因数知识创建解决方案采用混合方法，其中启发式和机器学习是其中的一部分。因此，人们可以使用成熟而复杂的认知工具来搜索知识，并创造更多有关碳品质因数的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异步REST API（Carbon Tables），通过结合启发式方法和机器学习，从科学PDF文档中的表格提取碳指标知识并存储到知识图谱中，以加速碳捕获材料的发现。
AI.motivation: 当前需要加速开发能够吸收大气或电厂燃烧中CO₂分子的材料，但传统方法在从科学文献中提取碳指标知识时效率低下，亟需自动化工具支持。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，结合启发式规则与机器学习模型，构建异步REST API从PDF表格中提取碳指标数据，并将其结构化存储至知识图谱以支持高级搜索。
AI.result: 成功实现Carbon Tables API，可高效提取和存储碳指标知识，用户可通过认知工具进行复杂查询，显著提升碳相关材料研究的知识创建效率。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法有效解决了科学文献中碳指标知识提取的难题，为碳捕获材料的快速发现提供了可扩展的知识管理解决方案。

title: Backdoor Attacks on Bayesian Neural Networks using Reverse Distribution
title_zh: 使用反向分布对贝叶斯神经网络进行后门攻击
abstract: Due to cost and time-to-market constraints, many industries outsource the training process of machine learning models (ML) to third-party cloud service providers, popularly known as ML-asa-Service (MLaaS). MLaaS creates opportunity for an adversary to provide users with backdoored ML models to produce incorrect predictions only in extremely rare (attacker-chosen) scenarios. Bayesian neural networks (BNN) are inherently immune against backdoor attacks since the weights are designed to be marginal distributions to quantify the uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoor attack based on effective learning and targeted utilization of reverse distribution. This paper makes three important contributions. (1) To the best of our knowledge, this is the first backdoor attack that can effectively break the robustness of BNNs. (2) We produce reverse distributions to cancel the original distributions when the trigger is activated. (3) We propose an efficient solution for merging probability distributions in BNNs. Experimental results on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed attack can achieve the attack success rate (ASR) of 100%, while the ASR of the state-of-the-art attacks is lower than 60%.
summary: Due to cost and time-to-market constraints, many industries outsource the training process of machine learning models (ML) to third-party cloud service providers, popularly known as ML-asa-Service (MLaaS). MLaaS creates opportunity for an adversary to provide users with backdoored ML models to produce incorrect predictions only in extremely rare (attacker-chosen) scenarios. Bayesian neural networks (BNN) are inherently immune against backdoor attacks since the weights are designed to be marginal distributions to quantify the uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoor attack based on effective learning and targeted utilization of reverse distribution. This paper makes three important contributions. (1) To the best of our knowledge, this is the first backdoor attack that can effectively break the robustness of BNNs. (2) We produce reverse distributions to cancel the original distributions when the trigger is activated. (3) We propose an efficient solution for merging probability distributions in BNNs. Experimental results on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed attack can achieve the attack success rate (ASR) of 100%, while the ASR of the state-of-the-art attacks is lower than 60%.
abstract_zh: 由于成本和上市时间的限制，许多行业将机器学习模型（ML）的训练过程外包给第三方云服务提供商，通常称为ML-asa-Service（MLaaS）。 MLaaS 为对手创造了机会，向用户提供后门 ML 模型，仅在极其罕见的（攻击者选择的）场景中产生错误的预测。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 本质上不会受到后门攻击，因为权重被设计为边际分布以量化不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于有效学习和有针对性地利用反向分布的新型后门攻击。本文做出了三个重要贡献。 (1) 据我们所知，这是第一个能够有效破坏 BNN 鲁棒性的后门攻击。 (2) 当触发器被激活时，我们产生反向分布以取消原始分布。 (3) 我们提出了一种合并 BNN 中概率分布的有效解决方案。在不同基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的攻击可以实现 100% 的攻击成功率 (ASR)，而最先进的攻击的 ASR 低于 60%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的新型后门攻击方法，通过利用反向分布破坏其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 由于工业界广泛使用第三方云服务训练机器学习模型，后门攻击风险增加。BNN因权重分布特性被认为天然免疫后门攻击，但现有研究未充分验证其安全性。
AI.method: 通过构造反向分布抵消原始分布，并提出概率分布合并算法，在触发器激活时实现后门植入。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现100%攻击成功率（ASR），显著优于现有方法（<60%）。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明BNN存在后门攻击漏洞，提出的反向分布方法和分布合并技术为模型安全防护提供新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种针对贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的新型后门攻击方法，通过利用反向分布破坏其鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 由于工业界广泛使用第三方云服务训练机器学习模型，后门攻击风险增加。BNN因权重分布特性被认为天然免疫后门攻击，但现有研究未充分验证其安全性。
ai_content.method: 通过构造反向分布抵消原始分布，并提出概率分布合并算法，在触发器激活时实现后门植入。
ai_content.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现100%攻击成功率（ASR），显著优于现有方法（<60%）。
ai_content.conclusion: 首次证明BNN存在后门攻击漏洞，提出的反向分布方法和分布合并技术为模型安全防护提供新视角。

search_text: Backdoor Attacks on Bayesian Neural Networks using Reverse Distribution 使用反向分布对贝叶斯神经网络进行后门攻击 Due to cost and time-to-market constraints, many industries outsource the training process of machine learning models (ML) to third-party cloud service providers, popularly known as ML-asa-Service (MLaaS). MLaaS creates opportunity for an adversary to provide users with backdoored ML models to produce incorrect predictions only in extremely rare (attacker-chosen) scenarios. Bayesian neural networks (BNN) are inherently immune against backdoor attacks since the weights are designed to be marginal distributions to quantify the uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoor attack based on effective learning and targeted utilization of reverse distribution. This paper makes three important contributions. (1) To the best of our knowledge, this is the first backdoor attack that can effectively break the robustness of BNNs. (2) We produce reverse distributions to cancel the original distributions when the trigger is activated. (3) We propose an efficient solution for merging probability distributions in BNNs. Experimental results on diverse benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed attack can achieve the attack success rate (ASR) of 100%, while the ASR of the state-of-the-art attacks is lower than 60%. 由于成本和上市时间的限制，许多行业将机器学习模型（ML）的训练过程外包给第三方云服务提供商，通常称为ML-asa-Service（MLaaS）。 MLaaS 为对手创造了机会，向用户提供后门 ML 模型，仅在极其罕见的（攻击者选择的）场景中产生错误的预测。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 本质上不会受到后门攻击，因为权重被设计为边际分布以量化不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于有效学习和有针对性地利用反向分布的新型后门攻击。本文做出了三个重要贡献。 (1) 据我们所知，这是第一个能够有效破坏 BNN 鲁棒性的后门攻击。 (2) 当触发器被激活时，我们产生反向分布以取消原始分布。 (3) 我们提出了一种合并 BNN 中概率分布的有效解决方案。在不同基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的攻击可以实现 100% 的攻击成功率 (ASR)，而最先进的攻击的 ASR 低于 60%。 本文提出一种针对贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）的新型后门攻击方法，通过利用反向分布破坏其鲁棒性。 Zhixin Pan,Prabhat Mishra cs.CR,cs.AI

title: An Approach to Investigate Public Opinion, Views, and Perspectives Towards Exoskeleton Technology
title_zh: 调查公众对外骨骼技术的意见、观点和观点的方法
comment: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 7th International Conference on Human Interaction & Emerging Technologies: Artificial Intelligence & Future Applications (IHIET-AI 2022), Lausanne, Switzerland, April 21-23, 2022
abstract: Over the last decade, exoskeletons have had an extensive impact on different disciplines and application domains such as assisted living, military, healthcare, firefighting, and industries, on account of their diverse and dynamic functionalities to augment human abilities, stamina, potential, and performance in a multitude of ways. In view of this wide-scale applicability and use-cases of exoskeletons, it is crucial to investigate and analyze the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeletons which would help to interpret the effectiveness of the underlining human-robot, human-machine, and human-technology interactions. The Internet of Everything era of today's living, characterized by people spending more time on the internet than ever before, holds the potential for the investigation of the same by mining and analyzing relevant web behavior, specifically from social media, that can be interpreted to understand public opinion, views, and perspectives towards a topic or set of topics. Therefore, this paper aims to address this research challenge related to exoskeletons by utilizing the potential of web behavior-based Big Data mining in the modern-day Internet of Everything era. As Twitter is one of the most popular social media platforms on a global scale - characterized by both the number of users and the amount of time spent by its users on the platform - this work focused on investigating web behavior on Twitter to interpret the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeleton technology. A total of approximately 20,000 tweets related to exoskeletons were used to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. The results presented and discussed uphold the efficacy of the proposed approach to interpret and analyze the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeletons from the associated tweets.

In view of this wide-scale applicability and use-cases of exoskeletons, it is crucial to investigate and analyze the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeletons which would help to interpret the effectiveness of the underlining human-robot, human-machine, and human-technology interactions. The Internet of Everything era of today's living, characterized by people spending more time on the internet than ever before, holds the potential for the investigation of the same by mining and analyzing relevant web behavior, specifically from social media, that can be interpreted to understand public opinion, views, and perspectives towards a topic or set of topics. Therefore, this paper aims to address this research challenge related to exoskeletons by utilizing the potential of web behavior-based Big Data mining in the modern-day Internet of Everything era. As Twitter is one of the most popular social media platforms on a global scale - characterized by both the number of users and the amount of time spent by its users on the platform - this work focused on investigating web behavior on Twitter to interpret the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeleton technology. A total of approximately 20,000 tweets related to exoskeletons were used to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. The results presented and discussed uphold the efficacy of the proposed approach to interpret and analyze the public opinion, views, and perspectives towards exoskeletons from the associated tweets.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，外骨骼因其多样化和动态的功能以多种方式增强人类的能力、耐力、潜力和表现，对辅助生活、军事、医疗保健、消防和工业等不同学科和应用领域产生了广泛的影响。鉴于外骨骼的广泛适用性和用例，调查和分析对外骨骼的公众舆论、观点和观点至关重要，这将有助于解释人与机器人、人与机器以及人与技术交互的有效性。当今生活的万物互联时代，其特点是人们在互联网上花费的时间比以往任何时候都多，因此有可能通过挖掘和分析相关网络行为（特别是社交媒体）来调查这一问题，这些行为可以被解释为了解公众对一个或一组主题的意见、观点和观点。因此，本文旨在利用现代万物互联时代基于网络行为的大数据挖掘的潜力来解决与外骨骼相关的研究挑战。由于 Twitter 是全球范围内最受欢迎的社交媒体平台之一（以用户数量和用户在平台上花费的时间为特征），因此这项工作的重点是调查 Twitter 上的网络行为，以解释公众对外骨骼技术的意见、观点和观点。总共大约 20,000 条与外骨骼相关的推文被用来评估所提出方法的有效性。所提出和讨论的结果证明了所提出的方法在解释和分析相关推文中对外骨骼的公众意见、观点和观点方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过挖掘社交媒体数据，分析公众对外骨骼技术的观点和看法。
AI.motivation: 外骨骼技术在多个领域广泛应用，但缺乏对公众意见的系统研究，需通过分析网络行为了解其社会接受度与潜在改进方向。
AI.method: 利用Twitter平台的20,000条相关推文，结合大数据挖掘技术，分析公众对准骨骼技术的态度与观点。
AI.result: 验证了基于网络行为的大数据挖掘方法能有效解读公众对准骨骼技术的舆论和看法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究新兴技术的社会影响提供了可行框架，有助于优化人机交互设计与技术推广策略。

authors_text: Arsene Fansi Tchango,Rishab Goel,Zhi Wen,Julien Martel,Joumana Ghosn
title: DDXPlus: A New Dataset For Automatic Medical Diagnosis
title_zh: DDXPlus：用于自动医疗诊断的新数据集
comment: Camera ready. NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
comments: Camera ready. NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
abstract: There has been a rapidly growing interest in Automatic Symptom Detection (ASD) and Automatic Diagnosis (AD) systems in the machine learning research literature, aiming to assist doctors in telemedicine services. These systems are designed to interact with patients, collect evidence about their symptoms and relevant antecedents, and possibly make predictions about the underlying diseases. Doctors would review the interactions, including the evidence and the predictions, collect if necessary additional information from patients, before deciding on next steps. Despite recent progress in this area, an important piece of doctors' interactions with patients is missing in the design of these systems, namely the differential diagnosis. Its absence is largely due to the lack of datasets that include such information for models to train on. In this work, we present a large-scale synthetic dataset of roughly 1.3 million patients that includes a differential diagnosis, along with the ground truth pathology, symptoms and antecedents for each patient. Unlike existing datasets which only contain binary symptoms and antecedents, this dataset also contains categorical and multi-choice symptoms and antecedents useful for efficient data collection. Moreover, some symptoms are organized in a hierarchy, making it possible to design systems able to interact with patients in a logical way. As a proof-of-concept, we extend two existing AD and ASD systems to incorporate the differential diagnosis, and provide empirical evidence that using differentials as training signals is essential for the efficiency of such systems or for helping doctors better understand the reasoning of those systems.
summary: There has been a rapidly growing interest in Automatic Symptom Detection (ASD) and Automatic Diagnosis (AD) systems in the machine learning research literature, aiming to assist doctors in telemedicine services. These systems are designed to interact with patients, collect evidence about their symptoms and relevant antecedents, and possibly make predictions about the underlying diseases. Doctors would review the interactions, including the evidence and the predictions, collect if necessary additional information from patients, before deciding on next steps. Despite recent progress in this area, an important piece of doctors' interactions with patients is missing in the design of these systems, namely the differential diagnosis. Its absence is largely due to the lack of datasets that include such information for models to train on. In this work, we present a large-scale synthetic dataset of roughly 1.3 million patients that includes a differential diagnosis, along with the ground truth pathology, symptoms and antecedents for each patient. Unlike existing datasets which only contain binary symptoms and antecedents, this dataset also contains categorical and multi-choice symptoms and antecedents useful for efficient data collection. Moreover, some symptoms are organized in a hierarchy, making it possible to design systems able to interact with patients in a logical way. As a proof-of-concept, we extend two existing AD and ASD systems to incorporate the differential diagnosis, and provide empirical evidence that using differentials as training signals is essential for the efficiency of such systems or for helping doctors better understand the reasoning of those systems.
abstract_zh: 机器学习研究文献中对自动症状检测（ASD）和自动诊断（AD）系统的兴趣迅速增长，旨在协助医生进行远程医疗服务。这些系统旨在与患者互动，收集有关其症状和相关背景的证据，并可能对潜在疾病做出预测。医生会审查相互作用，包括证据和预测，在必要时从患者那里收集额外信息，然后再决定下一步行动。尽管该领域最近取得了进展，但这些系统的设计中缺少医生与患者互动的一个重要部分，即鉴别诊断。它的缺失很大程度上是由于缺乏包含此类信息供模型训练的数据集。在这项工作中，我们提供了大约 130 万患者的大规模综合数据集，其中包括鉴别诊断以及每位患者的真实病理学、症状和背景。与仅包含二元症状和前因的现有数据集不同，该数据集还包含可用于高效数据收集的分类和多选症状和前因。此外，一些症状按层次结构组织，使得设计能够以逻辑方式与患者交互的系统成为可能。作为概念验证，我们扩展了两个现有的 AD 和 ASD 系统以纳入鉴别诊断，并提供经验证据表明，使用差异作为训练信号对于此类系统的效率或帮助医生更好地理解这些系统的推理至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为DDXPlus的新数据集，用于自动医学诊断，包含约130万患者的差异诊断信息、病理学真相、症状和病史。
AI.motivation: 现有自动症状检测（ASD）和自动诊断（AD）系统缺乏差异诊断功能，主要由于缺乏包含此类信息的训练数据集，限制了系统的效率和医生对系统的理解。
AI.method: 构建了一个合成数据集，包含分类和多选症状及病史的层次结构，并扩展了两个现有AD/ASD系统以整合差异诊断作为训练信号。
AI.result: 实验证明，使用差异诊断作为训练信号能显著提升系统效率，并帮助医生更好地理解系统推理过程。
AI.conclusion: DDXPlus数据集填补了差异诊断数据的空白，为开发更高效、可解释的自动诊断系统提供了关键支持。

search_text: DDXPlus: A New Dataset For Automatic Medical Diagnosis DDXPlus：用于自动医疗诊断的新数据集 There has been a rapidly growing interest in Automatic Symptom Detection (ASD) and Automatic Diagnosis (AD) systems in the machine learning research literature, aiming to assist doctors in telemedicine services. These systems are designed to interact with patients, collect evidence about their symptoms and relevant antecedents, and possibly make predictions about the underlying diseases. Doctors would review the interactions, including the evidence and the predictions, collect if necessary additional information from patients, before deciding on next steps. Despite recent progress in this area, an important piece of doctors' interactions with patients is missing in the design of these systems, namely the differential diagnosis. Its absence is largely due to the lack of datasets that include such information for models to train on. In this work, we present a large-scale synthetic dataset of roughly 1.3 million patients that includes a differential diagnosis, along with the ground truth pathology, symptoms and antecedents for each patient. Unlike existing datasets which only contain binary symptoms and antecedents, this dataset also contains categorical and multi-choice symptoms and antecedents useful for efficient data collection. Moreover, some symptoms are organized in a hierarchy, making it possible to design systems able to interact with patients in a logical way. As a proof-of-concept, we extend two existing AD and ASD systems to incorporate the differential diagnosis, and provide empirical evidence that using differentials as training signals is essential for the efficiency of such systems or for helping doctors better understand the reasoning of those systems. 机器学习研究文献中对自动症状检测（ASD）和自动诊断（AD）系统的兴趣迅速增长，旨在协助医生进行远程医疗服务。这些系统旨在与患者互动，收集有关其症状和相关背景的证据，并可能对潜在疾病做出预测。医生会审查相互作用，包括证据和预测，在必要时从患者那里收集额外信息，然后再决定下一步行动。尽管该领域最近取得了进展，但这些系统的设计中缺少医生与患者互动的一个重要部分，即鉴别诊断。它的缺失很大程度上是由于缺乏包含此类信息供模型训练的数据集。在这项工作中，我们提供了大约 130 万患者的大规模综合数据集，其中包括鉴别诊断以及每位患者的真实病理学、症状和背景。与仅包含二元症状和前因的现有数据集不同，该数据集还包含可用于高效数据收集的分类和多选症状和前因。此外，一些症状按层次结构组织，使得设计能够以逻辑方式与患者交互的系统成为可能。作为概念验证，我们扩展了两个现有的 AD 和 ASD 系统以纳入鉴别诊断，并提供经验证据表明，使用差异作为训练信号对于此类系统的效率或帮助医生更好地理解这些系统的推理至关重要。 本文提出一个名为DDXPlus的新数据集，用于自动医学诊断，包含约130万患者的差异诊断信息、病理学真相、症状和病史。 Arsene Fansi Tchango,Rishab Goel,Zhi Wen,Julien Martel,Joumana Ghosn cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Relational representation learning with spike trains
title_zh: 使用尖峰序列进行关系表示学习
comment: Accepted for publication at the WCCI 2022 (IJCNN)
comments: Accepted for publication at the WCCI 2022 (IJCNN)
abstract: Relational representation learning has lately received an increase in interest due to its flexibility in modeling a variety of systems like interacting particles, materials and industrial projects for, e.g., the design of spacecraft. A prominent method for dealing with relational data are knowledge graph embedding algorithms, where entities and relations of a knowledge graph are mapped to a low-dimensional vector space while preserving its semantic structure. Recently, a graph embedding method has been proposed that maps graph elements to the temporal domain of spiking neural networks. However, it relies on encoding graph elements through populations of neurons that only spike once. Here, we present a model that allows us to learn spike train-based embeddings of knowledge graphs, requiring only one neuron per graph element by fully utilizing the temporal domain of spike patterns. This coding scheme can be implemented with arbitrary spiking neuron models as long as gradients with respect to spike times can be calculated, which we demonstrate for the integrate-and-fire neuron model. In general, the presented results show how relational knowledge can be integrated into spike-based systems, opening up the possibility of merging event-based computing and relational data to build powerful and energy efficient artificial intelligence applications and reasoning systems.
summary: Relational representation learning has lately received an increase in interest due to its flexibility in modeling a variety of systems like interacting particles, materials and industrial projects for, e.g., the design of spacecraft. A prominent method for dealing with relational data are knowledge graph embedding algorithms, where entities and relations of a knowledge graph are mapped to a low-dimensional vector space while preserving its semantic structure. Recently, a graph embedding method has been proposed that maps graph elements to the temporal domain of spiking neural networks. However, it relies on encoding graph elements through populations of neurons that only spike once. Here, we present a model that allows us to learn spike train-based embeddings of knowledge graphs, requiring only one neuron per graph element by fully utilizing the temporal domain of spike patterns. This coding scheme can be implemented with arbitrary spiking neuron models as long as gradients with respect to spike times can be calculated, which we demonstrate for the integrate-and-fire neuron model. In general, the presented results show how relational knowledge can be integrated into spike-based systems, opening up the possibility of merging event-based computing and relational data to build powerful and energy efficient artificial intelligence applications and reasoning systems.
abstract_zh: 关系表示学习最近受到了越来越多的关注，因为它可以灵活地对各种系统进行建模，例如相互作用的粒子、材料和工业项目，例如航天器的设计。处理关系数据的一种重要方法是知识图嵌入算法，其中知识图的实体和关系被映射到低维向量空间，同时保留其语义结构。最近，提出了一种图嵌入方法，将图元素映射到尖峰神经网络的时域。然而，它依赖于通过仅峰值一次的神经元群体来编码图形元素。在这里，我们提出了一种模型，允许我们学习基于尖峰序列的知识图嵌入，通过充分利用尖峰模式的时域，每个图元素只需要一个神经元。只要可以计算相对于尖峰时间的梯度，就可以使用任意尖峰神经元模型来实现这种编码方案，我们在积分和激发神经元模型中演示了这一点。总的来说，所提出的结果展示了如何将关系知识集成到基于尖峰的系统中，从而开启了合并基于事件的计算和关系数据以构建强大且节能的人工智能应用程序和推理系统的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲序列的知识图谱嵌入方法，通过单个神经元利用脉冲模式的时间域特性进行表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法依赖于一次性脉冲的神经元群体，存在效率和灵活性限制，需探索更高效的脉冲编码方案以融合事件驱动计算与关系数据。
AI.method: 设计单神经元编码方案，通过脉冲时间序列的时序特性表示图元素，兼容任意可计算脉冲时间梯度的神经元模型（如积分-发放模型）。
AI.result: 验证了该方法可有效整合关系知识到脉冲系统中，为构建高效能、低功耗的AI推理系统提供了事件驱动与关系数据融合的新途径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了脉冲神经网络在关系表示学习中的潜力，为下一代能源高效的智能系统设计提供了理论基础与技术路线。

authors_text: Ryan Sander,Wilko Schwarting,Tim Seyde,Igor Gilitschenski,Sertac Karaman,Daniela Rus
title: Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay: Local Convex Interpolation for Improved Sample Efficiency in Continuous Control Tasks
title_zh: 邻域混合体验重播：局部凸插值可提高连续控制任务中的样本效率
abstract: Experience replay plays a crucial role in improving the sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning agents. Recent advances in experience replay propose using Mixup (Zhang et al., 2018) to further improve sample efficiency via synthetic sample generation. We build upon this technique with Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER), a geometrically-grounded replay buffer that interpolates transitions with their closest neighbors in state-action space. NMER preserves a locally linear approximation of the transition manifold by only applying Mixup between transitions with vicinal state-action features. Under NMER, a given transition's set of state action neighbors is dynamic and episode agnostic, in turn encouraging greater policy generalizability via inter-episode interpolation. We combine our approach with recent off-policy deep reinforcement learning algorithms and evaluate on continuous control environments. We observe that NMER improves sample efficiency by an average 94% (TD3) and 29% (SAC) over baseline replay buffers, enabling agents to effectively recombine previous experiences and learn from limited data.
summary: Experience replay plays a crucial role in improving the sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning agents. Recent advances in experience replay propose using Mixup (Zhang et al., 2018) to further improve sample efficiency via synthetic sample generation. We build upon this technique with Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER), a geometrically-grounded replay buffer that interpolates transitions with their closest neighbors in state-action space. NMER preserves a locally linear approximation of the transition manifold by only applying Mixup between transitions with vicinal state-action features. Under NMER, a given transition's set of state action neighbors is dynamic and episode agnostic, in turn encouraging greater policy generalizability via inter-episode interpolation. We combine our approach with recent off-policy deep reinforcement learning algorithms and evaluate on continuous control environments. We observe that NMER improves sample efficiency by an average 94% (TD3) and 29% (SAC) over baseline replay buffers, enabling agents to effectively recombine previous experiences and learn from limited data.
abstract_zh: 经验回放对于提高深度强化学习智能体的样本效率起着至关重要的作用。经验回放的最新进展建议使用 Mixup（Zhang 等人，2018）通过合成样本生成进一步提高样本效率。我们利用 Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER) 来构建这项技术，这是一种几何基础的重播缓冲区，可以在状态动作空间中插入与其最近邻居的转换。 NMER 通过仅在具有邻近状态-动作特征的转换之间应用 Mixup 来保留转换流形的局部线性近似。在 NMER 下，给定过渡的一组国家行动邻居是动态的且与事件无关，反过来又通过事件间插值鼓励更大的政策普遍性。我们将我们的方法与最近的离策略深度强化学习算法相结合，并在连续控制环境上进行评估。我们观察到，与基线重放缓冲区相比，NMER 的样本效率平均提高了 94% (TD3) 和 29% (SAC)，使代理能够有效地重新组合以前的经验并从有限的数据中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER)的方法，通过在连续控制任务中对经验回放缓冲区进行局部凸插值，以提高深度强化学习代理的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统经验回放存在样本效率不足的问题，而Mixup技术通过合成样本生成可进一步提升效率。然而，直接应用Mixup可能破坏状态-动作空间的局部线性结构，因此需设计一种基于邻域状态的动态插值方法以增强策略泛化能力。
AI.method: NMER通过在状态-动作空间中动态选择相邻转移，仅对邻近状态-动作特征的转移应用Mixup插值，从而保持转移流形的局部线性近似。该方法跨回合动态维护邻域关系，促进跨回合插值学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，NMER在连续控制环境中使TD3算法样本效率提升94%，SAC算法提升29%，显著优于基线回放缓冲区。
AI.conclusion: NMER通过局部几何结构感知的插值机制，有效提升了连续控制任务中深度强化学习的样本效率，为有限数据下的策略学习提供了新思路。

method: NMER通过在状态-动作空间中动态选择相邻转移，仅对邻近状态-动作特征的转移应用Mixup插值，从而保持转移流形的局部线性近似。该方法跨回合动态维护邻域关系，促进跨回合插值学习。
result: 实验表明，NMER在连续控制环境中使TD3算法样本效率提升94%，SAC算法提升29%，显著优于基线回放缓冲区。
conclusion: NMER通过局部几何结构感知的插值机制，有效提升了连续控制任务中深度强化学习的样本效率，为有限数据下的策略学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay: Local Convex Interpolation for Improved Sample Efficiency in Continuous Control Tasks 邻域混合体验重播：局部凸插值可提高连续控制任务中的样本效率 Experience replay plays a crucial role in improving the sample efficiency of deep reinforcement learning agents. Recent advances in experience replay propose using Mixup (Zhang et al., 2018) to further improve sample efficiency via synthetic sample generation. We build upon this technique with Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER), a geometrically-grounded replay buffer that interpolates transitions with their closest neighbors in state-action space. NMER preserves a locally linear approximation of the transition manifold by only applying Mixup between transitions with vicinal state-action features. Under NMER, a given transition's set of state action neighbors is dynamic and episode agnostic, in turn encouraging greater policy generalizability via inter-episode interpolation. We combine our approach with recent off-policy deep reinforcement learning algorithms and evaluate on continuous control environments. We observe that NMER improves sample efficiency by an average 94% (TD3) and 29% (SAC) over baseline replay buffers, enabling agents to effectively recombine previous experiences and learn from limited data. 经验回放对于提高深度强化学习智能体的样本效率起着至关重要的作用。经验回放的最新进展建议使用 Mixup（Zhang 等人，2018）通过合成样本生成进一步提高样本效率。我们利用 Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER) 来构建这项技术，这是一种几何基础的重播缓冲区，可以在状态动作空间中插入与其最近邻居的转换。 NMER 通过仅在具有邻近状态-动作特征的转换之间应用 Mixup 来保留转换流形的局部线性近似。在 NMER 下，给定过渡的一组国家行动邻居是动态的且与事件无关，反过来又通过事件间插值鼓励更大的政策普遍性。我们将我们的方法与最近的离策略深度强化学习算法相结合，并在连续控制环境上进行评估。我们观察到，与基线重放缓冲区相比，NMER 的样本效率平均提高了 94% (TD3) 和 29% (SAC)，使代理能够有效地重新组合以前的经验并从有限的数据中学习。 本文提出了一种名为Neighborhood Mixup Experience Replay (NMER)的方法，通过在连续控制任务中对经验回放缓冲区进行局部凸插值，以提高深度强化学习代理的样本效率。 Ryan Sander,Wilko Schwarting,Tim Seyde,Igor Gilitschenski,Sertac Karaman,Daniela Rus cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Exploring the Adjugate Matrix Approach to Quaternion Pose Extraction
title_zh: 探索四元数姿态提取的辅助矩阵方法
abstract: Quaternions are important for a wide variety of rotation-related problems in computer graphics, machine vision, and robotics. We study the nontrivial geometry of the relationship between quaternions and rotation matrices by exploiting the adjugate matrix of the characteristic equation of a related eigenvalue problem to obtain the manifold of the space of a quaternion eigenvector. We argue that quaternions parameterized by their corresponding rotation matrices cannot be expressed, for example, in machine learning tasks, as single-valued functions: the quaternion solution must instead be treated as a manifold, with different algebraic solutions for each of several single-valued sectors represented by the adjugate matrix. We conclude with novel constructions exploiting the quaternion adjugate variables to revisit several classic pose estimation applications: 2D point-cloud matching, 2D point-cloud-to-projection matching, 3D point-cloud matching, 3D orthographic point-cloud-to-projection matching, and 3D perspective point-cloud-to-projection matching. We find an exact solution to the 3D orthographic least squares pose extraction problem, and apply it successfully also to the perspective pose extraction problem with results that improve on existing methods.
summary: Quaternions are important for a wide variety of rotation-related problems in computer graphics, machine vision, and robotics. We study the nontrivial geometry of the relationship between quaternions and rotation matrices by exploiting the adjugate matrix of the characteristic equation of a related eigenvalue problem to obtain the manifold of the space of a quaternion eigenvector. We argue that quaternions parameterized by their corresponding rotation matrices cannot be expressed, for example, in machine learning tasks, as single-valued functions: the quaternion solution must instead be treated as a manifold, with different algebraic solutions for each of several single-valued sectors represented by the adjugate matrix. We conclude with novel constructions exploiting the quaternion adjugate variables to revisit several classic pose estimation applications: 2D point-cloud matching, 2D point-cloud-to-projection matching, 3D point-cloud matching, 3D orthographic point-cloud-to-projection matching, and 3D perspective point-cloud-to-projection matching. We find an exact solution to the 3D orthographic least squares pose extraction problem, and apply it successfully also to the perspective pose extraction problem with results that improve on existing methods.
abstract_zh: 四元数对于计算机图形、机器视觉和机器人技术中各种与旋转相关的问题都很重要。我们通过利用相关特征值问题的特征方程的共轭矩阵来获得四元数特征向量空间的流形来研究四元数和旋转矩阵之间关系的非平凡几何。我们认为，例如在机器学习任务中，由相应旋转矩阵参数化的四元数不能表示为单值函数：四元数解必须被视为流形，对于由辅助矩阵表示的几个单值扇区中的每一个都有不同的代数解。我们以利用四元数辅助变量的新颖结构来回顾几个经典的姿态估计应用：2D 点云匹配、2D 点云到投影匹配、3D 点云匹配、3D 正交点云到投影匹配和 3D 透视点云到投影匹配。我们找到了 3D 正交最小二乘姿态提取问题的精确解决方案，并将其成功应用于透视姿态提取问题，其结果改进了现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过伴随矩阵方法从四元数中提取姿态的问题。
AI.motivation: 四元数在计算机图形学、机器视觉和机器人学中非常重要，但其与旋转矩阵之间的关系复杂，无法用单值函数表示，因此需要新的方法来处理。
AI.method: 本文利用与特征值问题相关的特征方程的伴随矩阵，探索四元数与旋转矩阵之间的几何关系，并通过四元数伴随变量重新审视经典姿态估计应用。
AI.result: 本文找到了3D正交最小二乘姿态提取问题的精确解，并成功应用于透视姿态提取问题，结果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 四元数解应视为流形，伴随矩阵方法为姿态估计问题提供了新的构造和改进的解决方案。

authors_text: Amilson R. Fritsch,Shangjie Guo,Sophia M. Koh,I. B. Spielman,Justyna P. Zwolak
title: Dark solitons in Bose-Einstein condensates: a dataset for many-body physics research
title_zh: 玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态中的暗孤子：多体物理研究数据集
abstract: We establish a dataset of over $1.6\times10^4$ experimental images of Bose--Einstein condensates containing solitonic excitations to enable machine learning (ML) for many-body physics research. About $33~\%$ of this dataset has manually assigned and carefully curated labels. The remainder is automatically labeled using SolDet -- an implementation of a physics-informed ML data analysis framework -- consisting of a convolutional-neural-network-based classifier and OD as well as a statistically motivated physics-informed classifier and a quality metric. This technical note constitutes the definitive reference of the dataset, providing an opportunity for the data science community to develop more sophisticated analysis tools, to further understand nonlinear many-body physics, and even advance cold atom experiments.
summary: We establish a dataset of over $1.6\times10^4$ experimental images of Bose--Einstein condensates containing solitonic excitations to enable machine learning (ML) for many-body physics research. About $33~\%$ of this dataset has manually assigned and carefully curated labels. The remainder is automatically labeled using SolDet -- an implementation of a physics-informed ML data analysis framework -- consisting of a convolutional-neural-network-based classifier and OD as well as a statistically motivated physics-informed classifier and a quality metric. This technical note constitutes the definitive reference of the dataset, providing an opportunity for the data science community to develop more sophisticated analysis tools, to further understand nonlinear many-body physics, and even advance cold atom experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们建立了一个包含超过 1.6\times10^4$ 玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体实验图像的数据集，其中包含孤子激励，以便为多体物理研究提供机器学习 (ML)。该数据集的大约 $33~\%$ 具有手动分配和精心策划的标签。其余部分使用 SolDet 自动标记，SolDet 是物理信息 ML 数据分析框架的实现，由基于卷积神经网络的分类器和 OD 以及统计驱动的物理信息分类器和质量指标组成。该技术说明构成了该数据集的权威参考，为数据科学界提供了开发更复杂的分析工具、进一步了解非线性多体物理、甚至推进冷原子实验的机会。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个包含超过1.6万张玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体实验图像的数据集，用于机器学习在多体物理研究中的应用。
AI.motivation: 为数据科学社区提供高质量数据，推动非线性多体物理的理解及冷原子实验的进展。
AI.method: 通过手动标注33%数据并结合物理信息机器学习框架SolDet（含卷积神经网络分类器和统计物理分类器）自动标注剩余数据。
AI.result: 生成了标注完整的实验图像数据集，并提供了物理信息机器学习分析框架的实现方案。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发更先进的分析工具和探索非线性多体物理现象提供了重要资源。

title: Masked Autoencoders As Spatiotemporal Learners
title_zh: 作为时空学习器的蒙面自动编码器
abstract: This paper studies a conceptually simple extension of Masked Autoencoders (MAE) to spatiotemporal representation learning from videos. We randomly mask out spacetime patches in videos and learn an autoencoder to reconstruct them in pixels. Interestingly, we show that our MAE method can learn strong representations with almost no inductive bias on spacetime (only except for patch and positional embeddings), and spacetime-agnostic random masking performs the best. We observe that the optimal masking ratio is as high as 90% (vs. 75% on images), supporting the hypothesis that this ratio is related to information redundancy of the data. A high masking ratio leads to a large speedup, e.g., > 4x in wall-clock time or even more. We report competitive results on several challenging video datasets using vanilla Vision Transformers. We observe that MAE can outperform supervised pre-training by large margins. We further report encouraging results of training on real-world, uncurated Instagram data. Our study suggests that the general framework of masked autoencoding (BERT, MAE, etc.) can be a unified methodology for representation learning with minimal domain knowledge.
summary: This paper studies a conceptually simple extension of Masked Autoencoders (MAE) to spatiotemporal representation learning from videos. We randomly mask out spacetime patches in videos and learn an autoencoder to reconstruct them in pixels. Interestingly, we show that our MAE method can learn strong representations with almost no inductive bias on spacetime (only except for patch and positional embeddings), and spacetime-agnostic random masking performs the best. We observe that the optimal masking ratio is as high as 90% (vs. 75% on images), supporting the hypothesis that this ratio is related to information redundancy of the data. A high masking ratio leads to a large speedup, e.g., > 4x in wall-clock time or even more. We report competitive results on several challenging video datasets using vanilla Vision Transformers. We observe that MAE can outperform supervised pre-training by large margins. We further report encouraging results of training on real-world, uncurated Instagram data. Our study suggests that the general framework of masked autoencoding (BERT, MAE, etc.) can be a unified methodology for representation learning with minimal domain knowledge.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了掩模自动编码器（MAE）在概念上的简单扩展，以从视频中进行时空表示学习。我们随机屏蔽视频中的时空补丁，并学习自动编码器以像素为单位重建它们。有趣的是，我们表明我们的 MAE 方法可以学习强表示，而对时空几乎没有归纳偏差（仅除了补丁和位置嵌入），并且与时空无关的随机掩蔽表现最好。我们观察到最佳掩蔽率高达 90%（图像上为 75%），支持了该比率与数据的信息冗余相关的假设。高掩蔽比会带来很大的加速，例如挂钟时间 > 4 倍甚至更多。我们使用 vanilla Vision Transformers 报告了几个具有挑战性的视频数据集的竞争结果。我们观察到 MAE 可以大幅优于监督预训练。我们进一步报告了对真实世界、未经整理的 Instagram 数据进行训练的令人鼓舞的结果。我们的研究表明，屏蔽自动编码的通用框架（BERT、MAE 等）可以成为使用最少领域知识进行表示学习的统一方法。

AI.tldr: 本文将掩码自编码器（MAE）扩展到视频的时空表示学习，通过随机掩码时空块并重建像素来学习特征。
AI.motivation: 探索如何在无需强归纳偏置的情况下，利用掩码自编码框架从视频中学习有效的时空表示，并验证其在不同数据上的泛化能力。
AI.method: 对视频中的时空块进行随机掩码，使用自编码器以像素级重建为目标进行训练，采用高掩码比（高达90%）并结合视觉Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在多个视频数据集上取得具有竞争力的结果，优于监督预训练；在真实世界Instagram数据上表现良好，且高掩码比显著提升训练速度。
AI.conclusion: 掩码自编码框架可作为统一的表示学习方法，适用于视频等时空数据，且对领域知识依赖极低。

search_text: Masked Autoencoders As Spatiotemporal Learners 作为时空学习器的蒙面自动编码器 This paper studies a conceptually simple extension of Masked Autoencoders (MAE) to spatiotemporal representation learning from videos. We randomly mask out spacetime patches in videos and learn an autoencoder to reconstruct them in pixels. Interestingly, we show that our MAE method can learn strong representations with almost no inductive bias on spacetime (only except for patch and positional embeddings), and spacetime-agnostic random masking performs the best. We observe that the optimal masking ratio is as high as 90% (vs. 75% on images), supporting the hypothesis that this ratio is related to information redundancy of the data. A high masking ratio leads to a large speedup, e.g., > 4x in wall-clock time or even more. We report competitive results on several challenging video datasets using vanilla Vision Transformers. We observe that MAE can outperform supervised pre-training by large margins. We further report encouraging results of training on real-world, uncurated Instagram data. Our study suggests that the general framework of masked autoencoding (BERT, MAE, etc.) can be a unified methodology for representation learning with minimal domain knowledge. 本文研究了掩模自动编码器（MAE）在概念上的简单扩展，以从视频中进行时空表示学习。我们随机屏蔽视频中的时空补丁，并学习自动编码器以像素为单位重建它们。有趣的是，我们表明我们的 MAE 方法可以学习强表示，而对时空几乎没有归纳偏差（仅除了补丁和位置嵌入），并且与时空无关的随机掩蔽表现最好。我们观察到最佳掩蔽率高达 90%（图像上为 75%），支持了该比率与数据的信息冗余相关的假设。高掩蔽比会带来很大的加速，例如挂钟时间 > 4 倍甚至更多。我们使用 vanilla Vision Transformers 报告了几个具有挑战性的视频数据集的竞争结果。我们观察到 MAE 可以大幅优于监督预训练。我们进一步报告了对真实世界、未经整理的 Instagram 数据进行训练的令人鼓舞的结果。我们的研究表明，屏蔽自动编码的通用框架（BERT、MAE 等）可以成为使用最少领域知识进行表示学习的统一方法。 本文将掩码自编码器（MAE）扩展到视频的时空表示学习，通过随机掩码时空块并重建像素来学习特征。 Christoph Feichtenhofer,Haoqi Fan,Yanghao Li,Kaiming He cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Anastasia Ianina,Nikolaos Sarafianos,Yuanlu Xu,Ignacio Rocco,Tony Tung
title: BodyMap: Learning Full-Body Dense Correspondence Map
title_zh: BodyMap：学习全身密集对应图
abstract: Dense correspondence between humans carries powerful semantic information that can be utilized to solve fundamental problems for full-body understanding such as in-the-wild surface matching, tracking and reconstruction. In this paper we present BodyMap, a new framework for obtaining high-definition full-body and continuous dense correspondence between in-the-wild images of clothed humans and the surface of a 3D template model. The correspondences cover fine details such as hands and hair, while capturing regions far from the body surface, such as loose clothing. Prior methods for estimating such dense surface correspondence i) cut a 3D body into parts which are unwrapped to a 2D UV space, producing discontinuities along part seams, or ii) use a single surface for representing the whole body, but none handled body details. Here, we introduce a novel network architecture with Vision Transformers that learn fine-level features on a continuous body surface. BodyMap outperforms prior work on various metrics and datasets, including DensePose-COCO by a large margin. Furthermore, we show various applications ranging from multi-layer dense cloth correspondence, neural rendering with novel-view synthesis and appearance swapping.
summary: Dense correspondence between humans carries powerful semantic information that can be utilized to solve fundamental problems for full-body understanding such as in-the-wild surface matching, tracking and reconstruction. In this paper we present BodyMap, a new framework for obtaining high-definition full-body and continuous dense correspondence between in-the-wild images of clothed humans and the surface of a 3D template model. The correspondences cover fine details such as hands and hair, while capturing regions far from the body surface, such as loose clothing. Prior methods for estimating such dense surface correspondence i) cut a 3D body into parts which are unwrapped to a 2D UV space, producing discontinuities along part seams, or ii) use a single surface for representing the whole body, but none handled body details. Here, we introduce a novel network architecture with Vision Transformers that learn fine-level features on a continuous body surface. BodyMap outperforms prior work on various metrics and datasets, including DensePose-COCO by a large margin. Furthermore, we show various applications ranging from multi-layer dense cloth correspondence, neural rendering with novel-view synthesis and appearance swapping.
abstract_zh: 人类之间的密集对应关系携带强大的语义信息，可用于解决全身理解的基本问题，例如野外表面匹配、跟踪和重建。在本文中，我们提出了 BodyMap，这是一种新框架，用于获取穿着衣服的人类野外图像与 3D 模板模型表面之间的高清全身和连续密集对应关系。这些对应关系涵盖了手和头发等精细细节，同时捕捉了远离身体表面的区域，例如宽松的衣服。用于估计这种密集表面对应关系的现有方法 i) 将 3D 身体切割成展开到 2D UV 空间的部分，沿部分接缝产生不连续性，或 ii) 使用单个表面来表示整个身体，但没有处理身体细节。在这里，我们引入了一种带有 Vision Transformers 的新颖网络架构，可以学习连续身体表面的精细特征。 BodyMap 在各种指标和数据集（包括 DensePose-COCO）上的表现都远远优于之前的工作。此外，我们还展示了各种应用，包括多层密集布料对应、具有新颖视图合成的神经渲染和外观交换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BodyMap的框架，用于在真实场景中生成穿着衣物的人体图像与3D模板模型之间的高精度全身连续密集对应关系。
AI.motivation: 密集人体对应关系蕴含丰富的语义信息，可应用于表面匹配、追踪等任务，但现有方法存在部分缝合处不连续或无法处理细节的问题。
AI.method: 设计基于视觉Transformer的新网络架构，在连续体表上学习细粒度特征，避免传统方法的分块展开或单表面表示的缺陷。
AI.result: 在DensePose-COCO等数据集上显著超越现有方法，支持多层衣物对应、神经渲染和外观交换等应用。
AI.conclusion: BodyMap通过连续表面特征学习有效解决了全身密集对应难题，为人体理解任务提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Mahdieh Kazemimoghadam,Zi Yang,Lin Ma,Mingli Chen,Weiguo Lu,Xuejun Gu
title: Leveraging Global Binary Masks for Structure Segmentation in Medical Images
title_zh: 利用全局二值掩模进行医学图像的结构分割
abstract: Deep learning (DL) models for medical image segmentation are highly influenced by intensity variations of input images and lack generalization due to primarily utilizing pixels' intensity information for inference. Acquiring sufficient training data is another challenge limiting models' applications. We proposed to leverage the consistency of organs' anatomical shape and position information in medical images. We introduced a framework leveraging recurring anatomical patterns through global binary masks for organ segmentation. Two scenarios were studied.1) Global binary masks were the only model's (i.e. U-Net) input, forcing exclusively encoding organs' position and shape information for segmentation/localization.2) Global binary masks were incorporated as an additional channel functioning as position/shape clues to mitigate training data scarcity. Two datasets of the brain and heart CT images with their ground-truth were split into (26:10:10) and (12:3:5) for training, validation, and test respectively. Training exclusively on global binary masks led to Dice scores of 0.77(0.06) and 0.85(0.04), with the average Euclidian distance of 3.12(1.43)mm and 2.5(0.93)mm relative to the center of mass of the ground truth for the brain and heart structures respectively. The outcomes indicate that a surprising degree of position and shape information is encoded through global binary masks. Incorporating global binary masks led to significantly higher accuracy relative to the model trained on only CT images in small subsets of training data; the performance improved by 4.3-125.3% and 1.3-48.1% for 1-8 training cases of the brain and heart datasets respectively. The findings imply the advantages of utilizing global binary masks for building generalizable models and to compensate for training data scarcity.
summary: Deep learning (DL) models for medical image segmentation are highly influenced by intensity variations of input images and lack generalization due to primarily utilizing pixels' intensity information for inference. Acquiring sufficient training data is another challenge limiting models' applications. We proposed to leverage the consistency of organs' anatomical shape and position information in medical images. We introduced a framework leveraging recurring anatomical patterns through global binary masks for organ segmentation. Two scenarios were studied.1) Global binary masks were the only model's (i.e. U-Net) input, forcing exclusively encoding organs' position and shape information for segmentation/localization.2) Global binary masks were incorporated as an additional channel functioning as position/shape clues to mitigate training data scarcity. Two datasets of the brain and heart CT images with their ground-truth were split into (26:10:10) and (12:3:5) for training, validation, and test respectively. Training exclusively on global binary masks led to Dice scores of 0.77(0.06) and 0.85(0.04), with the average Euclidian distance of 3.12(1.43)mm and 2.5(0.93)mm relative to the center of mass of the ground truth for the brain and heart structures respectively. The outcomes indicate that a surprising degree of position and shape information is encoded through global binary masks. Incorporating global binary masks led to significantly higher accuracy relative to the model trained on only CT images in small subsets of training data; the performance improved by 4.3-125.3% and 1.3-48.1% for 1-8 training cases of the brain and heart datasets respectively. The findings imply the advantages of utilizing global binary masks for building generalizable models and to compensate for training data scarcity.
abstract_zh: 用于医学图像分割的深度学习（DL）模型受输入图像强度变化的影响很大，并且由于主要利用像素的强度信息进行推理而缺乏泛化性。获取足够的训练数据是限制模型应用的另一个挑战。我们建议利用医学图像中器官解剖形状和位置信息的一致性。我们引入了一个框架，通过全局二元掩模利用重复的解剖模式进行器官分割。研究了两种场景。1) 全局二进制掩码是唯一的模型（即 U-Net）输入，强制专门编码器官的位置和形状信息以进行分割/本地化。2) 全局二进制掩码被纳入作为附加通道，充当位置/形状线索，以减轻训练数据的稀缺性。大脑和心脏 CT 图像的两个数据集及其真实值被分为 (26:10:10) 和 (12:3:5) 分别用于训练、验证和测试。仅在全局二元掩模上进行训练，Dice 得分为 0.77(0.06) 和 0.85(0.04)，相对于大脑和心脏结构的真实质心的平均欧几里得距离分别为 3.12(1.43)mm 和 2.5(0.93)mm。结果表明，位置和形状信息的惊人程度是通过全局二进制掩码进行编码的。相对于仅在小训练数据子集中的 CT 图像上训练的模型，结合全局二值掩模可显着提高准确性；对于大脑和心脏数据集的 1-8 个训练案例，性能分别提高了 4.3-125.3% 和 1.3-48.1%。研究结果表明，利用全局二进制掩码构建可推广模型并弥补训练数据稀缺的优势。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用全局二值掩码进行医学图像器官分割，以解决传统深度学习模型对强度信息依赖过强和训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割模型易受强度变化影响且泛化能力差，同时获取足够训练数据困难，需探索利用器官解剖结构一致性进行分割的新方法。
AI.method: 设计框架通过全局二值掩码编码器官位置和形状信息，包含两种场景：1) 仅以掩码作为U-Net输入；2) 将掩码作为附加通道辅助CT图像分割。在脑部和心脏CT数据集上验证。
AI.result: 仅训练掩码模型的Dice得分为脑0.77±0.06、心0.85±0.04，平均欧氏距离分别为3.12mm和2.5mm。结合掩码后，小样本下性能提升4.3-125.3%（脑）和1.3-48.1%（心）。
AI.conclusion: 全局二值掩码能有效编码位置形状信息，显著提升分割精度并缓解数据稀缺问题，为构建通用医学图像分割模型提供新思路。

search_text: Leveraging Global Binary Masks for Structure Segmentation in Medical Images 利用全局二值掩模进行医学图像的结构分割 Deep learning (DL) models for medical image segmentation are highly influenced by intensity variations of input images and lack generalization due to primarily utilizing pixels' intensity information for inference. Acquiring sufficient training data is another challenge limiting models' applications. We proposed to leverage the consistency of organs' anatomical shape and position information in medical images. We introduced a framework leveraging recurring anatomical patterns through global binary masks for organ segmentation. Two scenarios were studied.1) Global binary masks were the only model's (i.e. U-Net) input, forcing exclusively encoding organs' position and shape information for segmentation/localization.2) Global binary masks were incorporated as an additional channel functioning as position/shape clues to mitigate training data scarcity. Two datasets of the brain and heart CT images with their ground-truth were split into (26:10:10) and (12:3:5) for training, validation, and test respectively. Training exclusively on global binary masks led to Dice scores of 0.77(0.06) and 0.85(0.04), with the average Euclidian distance of 3.12(1.43)mm and 2.5(0.93)mm relative to the center of mass of the ground truth for the brain and heart structures respectively. The outcomes indicate that a surprising degree of position and shape information is encoded through global binary masks. Incorporating global binary masks led to significantly higher accuracy relative to the model trained on only CT images in small subsets of training data; the performance improved by 4.3-125.3% and 1.3-48.1% for 1-8 training cases of the brain and heart datasets respectively. The findings imply the advantages of utilizing global binary masks for building generalizable models and to compensate for training data scarcity. 用于医学图像分割的深度学习（DL）模型受输入图像强度变化的影响很大，并且由于主要利用像素的强度信息进行推理而缺乏泛化性。获取足够的训练数据是限制模型应用的另一个挑战。我们建议利用医学图像中器官解剖形状和位置信息的一致性。我们引入了一个框架，通过全局二元掩模利用重复的解剖模式进行器官分割。研究了两种场景。1) 全局二进制掩码是唯一的模型（即 U-Net）输入，强制专门编码器官的位置和形状信息以进行分割/本地化。2) 全局二进制掩码被纳入作为附加通道，充当位置/形状线索，以减轻训练数据的稀缺性。大脑和心脏 CT 图像的两个数据集及其真实值被分为 (26:10:10) 和 (12:3:5) 分别用于训练、验证和测试。仅在全局二元掩模上进行训练，Dice 得分为 0.77(0.06) 和 0.85(0.04)，相对于大脑和心脏结构的真实质心的平均欧几里得距离分别为 3.12(1.43)mm 和 2.5(0.93)mm。结果表明，位置和形状信息的惊人程度是通过全局二进制掩码进行编码的。相对于仅在小训练数据子集中的 CT 图像上训练的模型，结合全局二值掩模可显着提高准确性；对于大脑和心脏数据集的 1-8 个训练案例，性能分别提高了 4.3-125.3% 和 1.3-48.1%。研究结果表明，利用全局二进制掩码构建可推广模型并弥补训练数据稀缺的优势。 本论文提出利用全局二值掩码进行医学图像器官分割，以解决传统深度学习模型对强度信息依赖过强和训练数据不足的问题。 Mahdieh Kazemimoghadam,Zi Yang,Lin Ma,Mingli Chen,Weiguo Lu,Xuejun Gu eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Liane Bernstein,Alexander Sludds,Christopher Panuski,Sivan Trajtenberg-Mills,Ryan Hamerly,Dirk Englund
title: Single-Shot Optical Neural Network
title_zh: 单次光神经网络
comment: Main text: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Supplementary: 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables
comments: Main text: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Supplementary: 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables
abstract: As deep neural networks (DNNs) grow to solve increasingly complex problems, they are becoming limited by the latency and power consumption of existing digital processors. For improved speed and energy efficiency, specialized analog optical and electronic hardware has been proposed, however, with limited scalability (input vector length $K$ of hundreds of elements). Here, we present a scalable, single-shot-per-layer analog optical processor that uses free-space optics to reconfigurably distribute an input vector and integrated optoelectronics for static, updatable weighting and the nonlinearity -- with $K \approx 1,000$ and beyond. We experimentally test classification accuracy of the MNIST handwritten digit dataset, achieving 94.7% (ground truth 96.3%) without data preprocessing or retraining on the hardware. We also determine the fundamental upper bound on throughput ($\sim$0.9 exaMAC/s), set by the maximum optical bandwidth before significant increase in error. Our combination of wide spectral and spatial bandwidths in a CMOS-compatible system enables highly efficient computing for next-generation DNNs.
summary: As deep neural networks (DNNs) grow to solve increasingly complex problems, they are becoming limited by the latency and power consumption of existing digital processors. For improved speed and energy efficiency, specialized analog optical and electronic hardware has been proposed, however, with limited scalability (input vector length $K$ of hundreds of elements). Here, we present a scalable, single-shot-per-layer analog optical processor that uses free-space optics to reconfigurably distribute an input vector and integrated optoelectronics for static, updatable weighting and the nonlinearity -- with $K \approx 1,000$ and beyond. We experimentally test classification accuracy of the MNIST handwritten digit dataset, achieving 94.7% (ground truth 96.3%) without data preprocessing or retraining on the hardware. We also determine the fundamental upper bound on throughput ($\sim$0.9 exaMAC/s), set by the maximum optical bandwidth before significant increase in error. Our combination of wide spectral and spatial bandwidths in a CMOS-compatible system enables highly efficient computing for next-generation DNNs.
abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 不断发展以解决日益复杂的问题，它们正受到现有数字处理器的延迟和功耗的限制。为了提高速度和能源效率，已经提出了专门的模拟光学和电子硬件，但可扩展性有限（输入向量长度 $K$ 为数百个元素）。在这里，我们提出了一种可扩展的、每层单次模拟光学处理器，它使用自由空间光学器件可重新配置地分配输入矢量和集成光电器件，以实现静态、可更新的权重和非线性——成本为 K 美元\约 1,000 美元甚至更高。我们通过实验测试了 MNIST 手写数字数据集的分类精度，无需在硬件上进行数据预处理或重新训练，即可达到 94.7%（地面真实值 96.3%）。我们还确定了吞吐量的基本上限 ($\sim$0.9 exaMAC/s)，由误差显着增加之前的最大光带宽设置。我们将宽光谱和空间带宽结合在 CMOS 兼容系统中，可实现下一代 DNN 的高效计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的单次拍摄光学神经网络处理器，通过自由空间光学和光电集成技术实现高效深度神经网络计算。
AI.motivation: 现有数字处理器在处理复杂深度神经网络时面临延迟和功耗瓶颈，而传统光学硬件受限于输入向量长度的可扩展性。
AI.method: 利用自由空间光学动态分配输入向量，结合集成光电设备实现静态可更新权重与非线性处理，采用CMOS兼容系统支持K≈1000的输入规模。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上实现94.7%分类准确率（无数据预处理），确定0.9 exaMAC/s吞吐量上限，并验证系统在宽光谱/空间带宽下的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该光学处理器通过CMOS兼容架构实现了兼具高吞吐量与可扩展性的DNN计算方案，为下一代人工智能硬件提供新方向。
