search_text: One Explanation to Rule them All -- Ensemble Consistent Explanations 一种解释可以统治一切——整体一致的解释 Transparency is a major requirement of modern AI based decision making systems deployed in real world. A popular approach for achieving transparency is by means of explanations. A wide variety of different explanations have been proposed for single decision making systems. In practice it is often the case to have a set (i.e. ensemble) of decisions that are used instead of a single decision only, in particular in complex systems. Unfortunately, explanation methods for single decision making systems are not easily applicable to ensembles -- i.e. they would yield an ensemble of individual explanations which are not necessarily consistent, hence less useful and more difficult to understand than a single consistent explanation of all observed phenomena. We propose a novel concept for consistently explaining an ensemble of decisions locally with a single explanation -- we introduce a formal concept, as well as a specific implementation using counterfactual explanations. 透明度是现实世界中部署的基于现代人工智能的决策系统的主要要求。实现透明度的一种流行方法是通过解释。对于单一决策系统，人们提出了各种各样的不同解释。在实践中，通常会使用一组（即整体）决策而不是仅使用单个决策，特别是在复杂系统中。不幸的是，单一决策系统的解释方法并不容易适用于整体——也就是说，它们会产生不一定一致的个体解释的整体，因此比所有观察到的现象的单一一致解释更不有用且更难以理解。我们提出了一个新颖的概念，用单一的解释来一致地解释本地决策的集合——我们引入了一个正式的概念，以及使用反事实解释的具体实现。 本文提出了一种为多个决策（即集成系统）生成单一一致解释的方法，以解决现有方法在解释集成决策时产生的不一致性问题。 André Artelt,Stelios Vrachimis,Demetrios Eliades,Marios Polycarpou,Barbara Hammer cs.AI,cs.LG

title: DL4DS -- Deep Learning for empirical DownScaling
title_zh: DL4DS——用于经验缩减的深度学习
abstract: A common task in Earth Sciences is to infer climate information at local and regional scales from global climate models. Dynamical downscaling requires running expensive numerical models at high resolution which can be prohibitive due to long model runtimes. On the other hand, statistical downscaling techniques present an alternative approach for learning links between the large- and local-scale climate in a more efficient way. A large number of deep neural network-based approaches for statistical downscaling have been proposed in recent years, mostly based on convolutional architectures developed for computer vision and super-resolution tasks. This paper presents DL4DS, Deep Learning for empirical DownScaling, a python library that implements a wide variety of state-of-the-art and novel algorithms for downscaling gridded Earth Science data with deep neural networks. DL4DS has been designed with the goal of providing a general framework for training convolutional neural networks with configurable architectures and learning strategies to facilitate the conduction of comparative and ablation studies in a robust way. We showcase the capabilities of DL4DS on air quality CAMS data over the western Mediterranean area. The DL4DS library can be found in this repository: https://github.com/carlos-gg/dl4ds
summary: A common task in Earth Sciences is to infer climate information at local and regional scales from global climate models. Dynamical downscaling requires running expensive numerical models at high resolution which can be prohibitive due to long model runtimes. On the other hand, statistical downscaling techniques present an alternative approach for learning links between the large- and local-scale climate in a more efficient way. A large number of deep neural network-based approaches for statistical downscaling have been proposed in recent years, mostly based on convolutional architectures developed for computer vision and super-resolution tasks. This paper presents DL4DS, Deep Learning for empirical DownScaling, a python library that implements a wide variety of state-of-the-art and novel algorithms for downscaling gridded Earth Science data with deep neural networks. DL4DS has been designed with the goal of providing a general framework for training convolutional neural networks with configurable architectures and learning strategies to facilitate the conduction of comparative and ablation studies in a robust way. We showcase the capabilities of DL4DS on air quality CAMS data over the western Mediterranean area. The DL4DS library can be found in this repository: https://github.com/carlos-gg/dl4ds
abstract_zh: 地球科学的一项常见任务是从全球气候模型推断局部和区域尺度的气候信息。动态缩减需要以高分辨率运行昂贵的数值模型，由于模型运行时间长，这可能会令人望而却步。另一方面，统计降尺度技术提供了一种以更有效的方式了解大尺度气候和局部尺度气候之间联系的替代方法。近年来，人们提出了大量基于深度神经网络的统计降尺度方法，其中大部分基于为计算机视觉和超分辨率任务开发的卷积架构。本文介绍了 DL4DS（用于经验缩减的深度学习），这是一个 Python 库，它实现了各种最先进的新颖算法，用于通过深度神经网络缩减网格地球科学数据。 DL4DS 的设计目标是提供一个通用框架，用于训练具有可配置架构和学习策略的卷积神经网络，以促进以稳健的方式进行比较和消融研究。我们展示了 DL4DS 在西地中海地区空气质量 CAMS 数据上的功能。 DL4DS 库可以在此存储库中找到：https://github.com/carlos-gg/dl4ds

AI.tldr: 本文提出DL4DS库，利用深度学习方法对地球科学数据进行经验降尺度处理。
AI.motivation: 传统动力降尺度计算成本高，统计方法需更高效的实现框架以支持多种算法比较研究。
AI.method: 开发基于卷积神经网络的DL4DS库，提供可配置的网络架构和学习策略，支持多种降尺度算法实现。
AI.result: 在西地中海CAMS空气质量数据集上验证了DL4DS库的有效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: DL4DS为地球科学领域提供了通用的深度学习降尺度工具，促进相关算法研究与应用。

authors_text: Yuhan Lin,Han Sun,Ningzhong Liu,Yetong Bian,Jun Cen,Huiyu Zhou
title: A lightweight multi-scale context network for salient object detection in optical remote sensing images
title_zh: 用于光学遥感图像中显着目标检测的轻量级多尺度上下文网络
comment: accepted by ICPR2022, source code, see https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet
comments: accepted by ICPR2022, source code, see https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet
abstract: Due to the more dramatic multi-scale variations and more complicated foregrounds and backgrounds in optical remote sensing images (RSIs), the salient object detection (SOD) for optical RSIs becomes a huge challenge. However, different from natural scene images (NSIs), the discussion on the optical RSI SOD task still remains scarce. In this paper, we propose a multi-scale context network, namely MSCNet, for SOD in optical RSIs. Specifically, a multi-scale context extraction module is adopted to address the scale variation of salient objects by effectively learning multi-scale contextual information. Meanwhile, in order to accurately detect complete salient objects in complex backgrounds, we design an attention-based pyramid feature aggregation mechanism for gradually aggregating and refining the salient regions from the multi-scale context extraction module. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that MSCNet achieves competitive performance with only 3.26M parameters. The code will be available at https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet.
summary: Due to the more dramatic multi-scale variations and more complicated foregrounds and backgrounds in optical remote sensing images (RSIs), the salient object detection (SOD) for optical RSIs becomes a huge challenge. However, different from natural scene images (NSIs), the discussion on the optical RSI SOD task still remains scarce. In this paper, we propose a multi-scale context network, namely MSCNet, for SOD in optical RSIs. Specifically, a multi-scale context extraction module is adopted to address the scale variation of salient objects by effectively learning multi-scale contextual information. Meanwhile, in order to accurately detect complete salient objects in complex backgrounds, we design an attention-based pyramid feature aggregation mechanism for gradually aggregating and refining the salient regions from the multi-scale context extraction module. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that MSCNet achieves competitive performance with only 3.26M parameters. The code will be available at https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet.
abstract_zh: 由于光学遥感图像（RSI）中更剧烈的多尺度变化和更复杂的前景和背景，光学RSI的显着目标检测（SOD）成为一个巨大的挑战。然而，与自然场景图像（NSI）不同，对光学 RSI SOD 任务的讨论仍然很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学 RSI 中 SOD 的多尺度上下文网络，即 MSCNet。具体来说，采用多尺度上下文提取模块，通过有效学习多尺度上下文信息来解决显着对象的尺度变化。同时，为了准确检测复杂背景中完整的显着目标，我们设计了一种基于注意力的金字塔特征聚合机制，用于从多尺度上下文提取模块中逐步聚合和细化显着区域。对两个基准的大量实验表明，MSCNet 仅用 3.26M 参数就实现了有竞争力的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级多尺度上下文网络（MSCNet），用于解决光学遥感图像中显著物体检测的多尺度变化和复杂背景挑战。
AI.motivation: 光学遥感图像因多尺度变化剧烈、前景背景复杂，显著物体检测（SOD）难度大，但相关研究稀缺，需针对性方法提升检测效果。
AI.method: 设计多尺度上下文提取模块学习多尺度信息，并结合基于注意力的金字塔特征聚合机制，逐步精炼显著区域。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上验证，MSCNet以仅3.26M参数取得竞争力性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MSCNet通过多尺度建模与特征聚合有效解决光学遥感图像SOD问题，兼具轻量性与检测精度。

Meanwhile, in order to accurately detect complete salient objects in complex backgrounds, we design an attention-based pyramid feature aggregation mechanism for gradually aggregating and refining the salient regions from the multi-scale context extraction module. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that MSCNet achieves competitive performance with only 3.26M parameters. The code will be available at https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet. 由于光学遥感图像（RSI）中更剧烈的多尺度变化和更复杂的前景和背景，光学RSI的显着目标检测（SOD）成为一个巨大的挑战。然而，与自然场景图像（NSI）不同，对光学 RSI SOD 任务的讨论仍然很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学 RSI 中 SOD 的多尺度上下文网络，即 MSCNet。具体来说，采用多尺度上下文提取模块，通过有效学习多尺度上下文信息来解决显着对象的尺度变化。同时，为了准确检测复杂背景中完整的显着目标，我们设计了一种基于注意力的金字塔特征聚合机制，用于从多尺度上下文提取模块中逐步聚合和细化显着区域。对两个基准的大量实验表明，MSCNet 仅用 3.26M 参数就实现了有竞争力的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/NuaaYH/MSCNet 上获取。 本文提出一种轻量级多尺度上下文网络（MSCNet），用于解决光学遥感图像中显著物体检测的多尺度变化和复杂背景挑战。 Yuhan Lin,Han Sun,Ningzhong Liu,Yetong Bian,Jun Cen,Huiyu Zhou cs.CV

title: Meta-Learning Sparse Compression Networks
title_zh: 元学习稀疏压缩网络
abstract: Recent work in Deep Learning has re-imagined the representation of data as functions mapping from a coordinate space to an underlying continuous signal. When such functions are approximated by neural networks this introduces a compelling alternative to the more common multi-dimensional array representation. Recent work on such Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) has shown that - following careful architecture search - INRs can outperform established compression methods such as JPEG (e.g. Dupont et al., 2021). In this paper, we propose crucial steps towards making such ideas scalable: Firstly, we employ state-of-the-art network sparsification techniques to drastically improve compression. Secondly, introduce the first method allowing for sparsification to be employed in the inner-loop of commonly used Meta-Learning algorithms, drastically improving both compression and the computational cost of learning INRs. The generality of this formalism allows us to present results on diverse data modalities such as images, manifolds, signed distance functions, 3D shapes and scenes, several of which establish new state-of-the-art results.
summary: Recent work in Deep Learning has re-imagined the representation of data as functions mapping from a coordinate space to an underlying continuous signal. When such functions are approximated by neural networks this introduces a compelling alternative to the more common multi-dimensional array representation. Recent work on such Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) has shown that - following careful architecture search - INRs can outperform established compression methods such as JPEG (e.g. Dupont et al., 2021). In this paper, we propose crucial steps towards making such ideas scalable: Firstly, we employ state-of-the-art network sparsification techniques to drastically improve compression. Secondly, introduce the first method allowing for sparsification to be employed in the inner-loop of commonly used Meta-Learning algorithms, drastically improving both compression and the computational cost of learning INRs. The generality of this formalism allows us to present results on diverse data modalities such as images, manifolds, signed distance functions, 3D shapes and scenes, several of which establish new state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新工作将数据的表示重新想象为从坐标空间映射到底层连续信号的函数。当这些函数通过神经网络近似时，这为更常见的多维数组表示引入了一种引人注目的替代方案。最近关于此类隐式神经表示 (INR) 的研究表明，经过仔细的架构搜索后，INR 的性能可以优于 JPEG 等已建立的压缩方法（例如 Dupont 等人，2021）。在本文中，我们提出了使这些想法可扩展的关键步骤：首先，我们采用最先进的网络稀疏技术来大幅提高压缩率。其次，引入第一种方法，允许在常用元学习算法的内循环中采用稀疏化，从而极大地提高压缩率和学习 INR 的计算成本。这种形式主义的普遍性使我们能够在不同的数据模式上呈现结果，例如图像、流形、符号距离函数、3D 形状和场景，其中一些建立了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过元学习与稀疏化技术提升隐式神经表示（INR）的压缩效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 尽管INR在压缩性能上优于传统方法（如JPEG），但其可扩展性不足，需通过稀疏化和元学习优化计算成本。
AI.method: 结合网络稀疏化技术与元学习框架，在INR训练的内部循环中引入稀疏化，同时保持模型通用性。
AI.result: 在图像、流形、3D形状等多模态数据上取得新的最先进压缩效果，显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稀疏化与元学习的结合，有效提升了INR的压缩性能和计算效率，验证了其广泛适用性。

title: i-MYO: A Hybrid Prosthetic Hand Control System based on Eye-tracking, Augmented Reality and Myoelectric signal
title_zh: i-MYO：基于眼动追踪、增强现实和肌电信号的混合假手控制系统
abstract: Dexterous prosthetic hands have better grasp performance than traditional ones. However, patients still find it difficult to use these hands without a suitable control system. A new hybrid myoelectric control system, termed i-MYO, is presented and evaluated to solve this problem. The core component of the i-MYO is a novel grasp-type switching interface based on eye-tracking and augmented reality (AR), termed i-GSI. With the i-GSI, the user can easily switch a grasp type (six total) for a prosthetic hand by gazing at a GazeButton. The i-GSI is implemented in an AR helmet and is integrated, as an individual module, into the i-MYO system. In the i-MYO system, the myoelectric signal was used to control hand opening /closing proportionally. The operation of the i-MYO was tested on nine healthy subjects who wore HIT-V hand on the forearm and manipulated objects in a reach-and-grasp task. It was also tested on one patient who had an inferior myoelectric signal and was required to control the HIT-V hand to grasp objects. Results showed that in 91.6% of the trials, inexperienced healthy subjects accomplished the task within 5.9 s, and most failed trials were caused by a lack of experience in fine grasping. In addition, in about 1.5% of trials, the subjects also successfully transferred the objects but with a non-optimal grasp type. In 97.0% of the trials, the subjects spent ~1.3 s switching the optimal grasp types. A higher success rate in grasp type (99.1%) for the untrained patient has been observed thanks to more trials conducted. In 98.7 % of trials, the patient only needed another 2 s to control the hand to grasp the object after switching to the optimal grasp type. The tests demonstrate the control capability of the new system in multi-DOF prosthetics, and all inexperienced subjects were able to master the operation of the i-MYO quickly within a few pieces of training and apply it easily.

abstract_zh: 灵巧的假手比传统假手具有更好的抓握性能。然而，如果没有合适的控制系统，患者仍然很难使用这些手。为了解决这个问题，提出并评估了一种新的混合肌电控制系统，称为 i-MYO。 i-MYO的核心组件是一种基于眼动追踪和增强现实（AR）的新型抓握式切换界面，称为i-GSI。借助 i-GSI，用户可以通过注视 GazeButton 轻松切换假手的抓握类型（总共六种）。 i-GSI 在 AR 头盔中实现，并作为单独的模块集成到 i-MYO 系统中。在i-MYO系统中，肌电信号用于按比例控制手的张开/闭合。 i-MYO 的操作在 9 名健康受试者身上进行了测试，这些受试者的前臂上戴着 HIT-V 手，并在伸手抓握任务中操纵物体。它还在一名肌电信号较差、需要控制 HIT-V 手抓取物体的患者身上进行了测试。结果显示，91.6%的试验中，缺乏经验的健康受试者在5.9秒内完成了任务，大多数失败的试验是由于缺乏精细抓握经验造成的。此外，在大约 1.5% 的试验中，受试者也成功转移了物体，但抓握类型并非最佳。在 97.0% 的试验中，受试者花费约 1.3 秒的时间切换最佳抓握类型。由于进行了更多的试验，未经训练的患者的抓握类型成功率更高（99.1%）。在98.7%的试验中，患者切换到最佳抓握类型后只需要另外2秒即可控制手抓握物体。测试展示了新系统在多自由度假肢上的控制能力，所有没有经验的受试者都能够通过几次训练快速掌握i-MYO的操作并轻松应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合眼动追踪、增强现实和肌电信号的混合假肢控制系统i-MYO，通过新型抓握类型切换接口i-GSI提升假肢操作效率。
AI.motivation: 传统假肢控制方式操作复杂且缺乏直观性，用户难以快速掌握精细抓握动作，需开发更高效的人机交互系统。
AI.method: 设计基于AR的i-GSI接口，通过凝视GazeButton切换六种抓握模式，结合肌电信号控制手部开合比例，并在健康受试者与患者中进行多任务测试。
AI.result: 91.6%健康受试者在5.9秒内完成任务，患者抓握类型选择成功率99.1%，平均切换耗时1.3秒，系统展现出良好的控制性能与学习效率。
AI.conclusion: i-MYO系统通过多模态交互显著提升了假肢控制精度与易用性，验证了其在多自由度假肢中的可行性与临床应用潜力。

A higher success rate in grasp type (99.1%) for the untrained patient has been observed thanks to more trials conducted. In 98.7 % of trials, the patient only needed another 2 s to control the hand to grasp the object after switching to the optimal grasp type. The tests demonstrate the control capability of the new system in multi-DOF prosthetics, and all inexperienced subjects were able to master the operation of the i-MYO quickly within a few pieces of training and apply it easily. 灵巧的假手比传统假手具有更好的抓握性能。然而，如果没有合适的控制系统，患者仍然很难使用这些手。为了解决这个问题，提出并评估了一种新的混合肌电控制系统，称为 i-MYO。 i-MYO的核心组件是一种基于眼动追踪和增强现实（AR）的新型抓握式切换界面，称为i-GSI。借助 i-GSI，用户可以通过注视 GazeButton 轻松切换假手的抓握类型（总共六种）。 i-GSI 在 AR 头盔中实现，并作为单独的模块集成到 i-MYO 系统中。在i-MYO系统中，肌电信号用于按比例控制手的张开/闭合。 i-MYO 的操作在 9 名健康受试者身上进行了测试，这些受试者的前臂上戴着 HIT-V 手，并在伸手抓握任务中操纵物体。它还在一名肌电信号较差、需要控制 HIT-V 手抓取物体的患者身上进行了测试。结果显示，91.6%的试验中，缺乏经验的健康受试者在5.9秒内完成了任务，大多数失败的试验是由于缺乏精细抓握经验造成的。此外，在大约 1.5% 的试验中，受试者也成功转移了物体，但抓握类型并非最佳。在 97.0% 的试验中，受试者花费约 1.3 秒的时间切换最佳抓握类型。由于进行了更多的试验，未经训练的患者的抓握类型成功率更高（99.1%）。在98.7%的试验中，患者切换到最佳抓握类型后只需要另外2秒即可控制手抓握物体。测试展示了新系统在多自由度假肢上的控制能力，所有没有经验的受试者都能够通过几次训练快速掌握i-MYO的操作并轻松应用。 本文提出了一种结合眼动追踪、增强现实和肌电信号的混合假肢控制系统i-MYO，通过新型抓握类型切换接口i-GSI提升假肢操作效率。 Chunyuan Shi,Dapeng Yang,Jingdong Zhao,Li Jiang cs.RO,cs.HC

title: Effectiveness of a time to fixate for fitness to drive evaluation in neurological patients
title_zh: 固定健身时间以推动神经系统患者评估的有效性
abstract: We present a method to automatically calculate time to fixate (TTF) from the eye-tracker data in subjects with neurological impairment using a driving simulator. TTF presents the time interval for a person to notice the stimulus from its first occurrence. Precisely, we measured the time since the children started to cross the street until the drivers directed their look to the children. From 108 neurological patients recruited for the study, the analysis of TTF was performed in 56 patients to assess fit-, unfit-, and conditionally-fit-to-drive patients. The results showed that the proposed method based on the YOLO (you only look once) object detector is efficient for computing TTFs from the eye-tracker data. We obtained discriminative results for fit-to-drive patients by application of Tukey's honest significant difference post hoc test (p < 0.01), while no difference was observed between conditionally-fit and unfit-to-drive groups (p = 0.542). Moreover, we show that time-to-collision (TTC), initial gaze distance (IGD) from pedestrians, and speed at the hazard onset did not influence the result, while the only significant interaction is among fitness, IGD, and TTC on TTF. Obtained TTFs are also compared with the perception response times (PRT) calculated independently from eye-tracker data and YOLO. Although we reached statistically significant results that speak in favor of possible method application for assessment of fitness to drive, we provide detailed directions for future driving simulation-based evaluation and propose processing workflow to secure reliable TTF calculation and its possible application in for example psychology and neuroscience.
summary: We present a method to automatically calculate time to fixate (TTF) from the eye-tracker data in subjects with neurological impairment using a driving simulator. TTF presents the time interval for a person to notice the stimulus from its first occurrence. Precisely, we measured the time since the children started to cross the street until the drivers directed their look to the children. From 108 neurological patients recruited for the study, the analysis of TTF was performed in 56 patients to assess fit-, unfit-, and conditionally-fit-to-drive patients. The results showed that the proposed method based on the YOLO (you only look once) object detector is efficient for computing TTFs from the eye-tracker data. We obtained discriminative results for fit-to-drive patients by application of Tukey's honest significant difference post hoc test (p < 0.01), while no difference was observed between conditionally-fit and unfit-to-drive groups (p = 0.542). Moreover, we show that time-to-collision (TTC), initial gaze distance (IGD) from pedestrians, and speed at the hazard onset did not influence the result, while the only significant interaction is among fitness, IGD, and TTC on TTF. Obtained TTFs are also compared with the perception response times (PRT) calculated independently from eye-tracker data and YOLO. Although we reached statistically significant results that speak in favor of possible method application for assessment of fitness to drive, we provide detailed directions for future driving simulation-based evaluation and propose processing workflow to secure reliable TTF calculation and its possible application in for example psychology and neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用驾驶模拟器根据神经损伤受试者的眼动仪数据自动计算注视时间 (TTF) 的方法。 TTF 表示一个人从第一次出现刺激到注意到该刺激的时间间隔。准确地说，我们测量了从孩子们开始过马路到司机将目光转向孩子们的时间。该研究招募了 108 名神经系统患者，其中 56 名患者进行了 TTF 分析，以评估适合、不适合和有条件适合驾驶的患者。结果表明，所提出的基于 YOLO（只看一次）目标检测器的方法对于根据眼动仪数据计算 TTF 非常有效。我们通过应用 Tukey 的诚实显着差异事后检验，获得了适合驾驶患者的区分结果 (p < 0.01)，而条件适合驾驶组和不适合驾驶组之间没有观察到差异 (p = 0.542)。此外，我们发现碰撞时间（TTC）、与行人的初始注视距离（IGD）和危险发生时的速度不会影响结果，而唯一显着的交互作用是适应度、IGD 和 TTC 对 TTF 的影响。还将获得的 TTF 与独立于眼动仪数据和 YOLO 计算的感知响应时间 (PRT) 进行比较。尽管我们取得了统计上显着的结果，支持可能的方法应用来评估驾驶适应性，但我们为未来基于驾驶模拟的评估提供了详细的方向，并提出了处理工作流程，以确保可靠的 TTF 计算及其在心理学和神经科学等领域的可能应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于眼动追踪数据的自动计算注视时间（TTF）方法，用于评估神经科患者的驾驶能力。
AI.motivation: 传统驾驶适应性评估方法存在局限，需更精确的指标（如TTF）来反映神经科患者对道路危险的反应能力，保障驾驶安全。
AI.method: 结合驾驶模拟器与眼动追踪数据，利用YOLO目标检测算法计算TTF，并通过Tukey's HSD检验分析不同适应性组别的差异。
AI.result: TTF能有效区分适合与不适合驾驶的患者（p<0.01），但无法区分有条件适合与不适合组（p=0.542）。TTC、IGD和速度无显著影响，但适应度、IGD与TTC存在交互作用。
AI.conclusion: TTF方法在驾驶适应性评估中具有潜力，但需优化数据处理流程以提高可靠性，并可扩展至心理学和神经科学研究领域。

authors_text: Gabriele Lagani,Davide Bacciu,Claudio Gallicchio,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Giuseppe Amato
title: Deep Features for CBIR with Scarce Data using Hebbian Learning
title_zh: 使用 Hebbian 学习的稀缺数据 CBIR 的深层特征
comment: 6 Pages, 1 Figure, 2 Tables, Submitted at CBMI 2022
comments: 6 Pages, 1 Figure, 2 Tables, Submitted at CBMI 2022
abstract: Features extracted from Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have proven to be very effective in the context of Content Based Image Retrieval (CBIR). In recent work, biologically inspired \textit{Hebbian} learning algorithms have shown promises for DNN training. In this contribution, we study the performance of such algorithms in the development of feature extractors for CBIR tasks. Specifically, we consider a semi-supervised learning strategy in two steps: first, an unsupervised pre-training stage is performed using Hebbian learning on the image dataset; second, the network is fine-tuned using supervised Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) training. For the unsupervised pre-training stage, we explore the nonlinear Hebbian Principal Component Analysis (HPCA) learning rule. For the supervised fine-tuning stage, we assume sample efficiency scenarios, in which the amount of labeled samples is just a small fraction of the whole dataset. Our experimental analysis, conducted on the CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets shows that, when few labeled samples are available, our Hebbian approach provides relevant improvements compared to various alternative methods.
summary: Features extracted from Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have proven to be very effective in the context of Content Based Image Retrieval (CBIR). In recent work, biologically inspired \textit{Hebbian} learning algorithms have shown promises for DNN training. In this contribution, we study the performance of such algorithms in the development of feature extractors for CBIR tasks. Specifically, we consider a semi-supervised learning strategy in two steps: first, an unsupervised pre-training stage is performed using Hebbian learning on the image dataset; second, the network is fine-tuned using supervised Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) training. For the unsupervised pre-training stage, we explore the nonlinear Hebbian Principal Component Analysis (HPCA) learning rule. For the supervised fine-tuning stage, we assume sample efficiency scenarios, in which the amount of labeled samples is just a small fraction of the whole dataset. Our experimental analysis, conducted on the CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets shows that, when few labeled samples are available, our Hebbian approach provides relevant improvements compared to various alternative methods.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，从深度神经网络 (DNN) 提取的特征在基于内容的图像检索 (CBIR) 中非常有效。在最近的工作中，受生物学启发的 \textit{Hebbian} 学习算法已显示出 DNN 训练的前景。在这篇文章中，我们研究了此类算法在开发 CBIR 任务特征提取器时的性能。具体来说，我们分两步考虑半监督学习策略：首先，使用赫布学习在图像数据集上执行无监督预训练阶段；其次，使用监督随机梯度下降（SGD）训练对网络进行微调。对于无监督预训练阶段，我们探索非线性赫布主成分分析（HPCA）学习规则。对于监督微调阶段，我们假设样本效率场景，其中标记样本的数量仅占整个数据集的一小部分。我们对 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集进行的实验分析表明，当可用标记样本很少时，与各种替代方法相比，我们的 Hebbian 方法提供了相关改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用赫布学习算法在少量标注数据下训练深度神经网络以提升基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）性能。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络特征在CBIR中表现优异，但传统方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际场景中标注数据稀缺且成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出两阶段半监督学习框架：首先通过非线性赫布主成分分析（HPCA）进行无监督预训练，随后在少量标注数据下使用随机梯度下降（SGD）微调网络。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和CIFAR100数据集上实验表明，当标注样本极少时，赫布学习方法相比其他替代方法显著提升检索效果。
AI.conclusion: 赫布学习算法在样本高效场景下能有效生成高质量特征，为标注数据稀缺的CBIR任务提供可行解决方案。

For the unsupervised pre-training stage, we explore the nonlinear Hebbian Principal Component Analysis (HPCA) learning rule. For the supervised fine-tuning stage, we assume sample efficiency scenarios, in which the amount of labeled samples is just a small fraction of the whole dataset. Our experimental analysis, conducted on the CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets shows that, when few labeled samples are available, our Hebbian approach provides relevant improvements compared to various alternative methods. 事实证明，从深度神经网络 (DNN) 提取的特征在基于内容的图像检索 (CBIR) 中非常有效。在最近的工作中，受生物学启发的 \textit{Hebbian} 学习算法已显示出 DNN 训练的前景。在这篇文章中，我们研究了此类算法在开发 CBIR 任务特征提取器时的性能。具体来说，我们分两步考虑半监督学习策略：首先，使用赫布学习在图像数据集上执行无监督预训练阶段；其次，使用监督随机梯度下降（SGD）训练对网络进行微调。对于无监督预训练阶段，我们探索非线性赫布主成分分析（HPCA）学习规则。对于监督微调阶段，我们假设样本效率场景，其中标记样本的数量仅占整个数据集的一小部分。我们对 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集进行的实验分析表明，当可用标记样本很少时，与各种替代方法相比，我们的 Hebbian 方法提供了相关改进。 本文研究使用赫布学习算法在少量标注数据下训练深度神经网络以提升基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）性能。 Gabriele Lagani,Davide Bacciu,Claudio Gallicchio,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Giuseppe Amato cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Hilda Azimi,Ashkan Ebadi,Jessy Song,Pengcheng Xi,Alexander Wong
title: COVID-Net UV: An End-to-End Spatio-Temporal Deep Neural Network Architecture for Automated Diagnosis of COVID-19 Infection from Ultrasound Videos
title_zh: COVID-Net UV：一种端到端时空深度神经网络架构，用于通过超声视频自动诊断 COVID-19 感染
abstract: Besides vaccination, as an effective way to mitigate the further spread of COVID-19, fast and accurate screening of individuals to test for the disease is yet necessary to ensure public health safety. We propose COVID-Net UV, an end-to-end hybrid spatio-temporal deep neural network architecture, to detect COVID-19 infection from lung point-of-care ultrasound videos captured by convex transducers. COVID-Net UV comprises a convolutional neural network that extracts spatial features and a recurrent neural network that learns temporal dependence. After careful hyperparameter tuning, the network achieves an average accuracy of 94.44% with no false-negative cases for COVID-19 cases. The goal with COVID-Net UV is to assist front-line clinicians in the fight against COVID-19 via accelerating the screening of lung point-of-care ultrasound videos and automatic detection of COVID-19 positive cases.
summary: Besides vaccination, as an effective way to mitigate the further spread of COVID-19, fast and accurate screening of individuals to test for the disease is yet necessary to ensure public health safety. We propose COVID-Net UV, an end-to-end hybrid spatio-temporal deep neural network architecture, to detect COVID-19 infection from lung point-of-care ultrasound videos captured by convex transducers. COVID-Net UV comprises a convolutional neural network that extracts spatial features and a recurrent neural network that learns temporal dependence. After careful hyperparameter tuning, the network achieves an average accuracy of 94.44% with no false-negative cases for COVID-19 cases. The goal with COVID-Net UV is to assist front-line clinicians in the fight against COVID-19 via accelerating the screening of lung point-of-care ultrasound videos and automatic detection of COVID-19 positive cases.
abstract_zh: 除了疫苗接种外，作为减缓 COVID-19 进一步传播的有效方法，还需要对个人进行快速、准确的疾病筛查，以确保公共卫生安全。我们提出了 COVID-Net UV，一种端到端混合时空深度神经网络架构，用于从凸传感器捕获的肺部护理点超声视频中检测 COVID-19 感染。 COVID-Net UV 由提取空间特征的卷积神经网络和学习时间依赖性的循环神经网络组成。经过仔细的超参数调整后，网络对 COVID-19 病例的平均准确率达到 94.44%，没有出现假阴性病例。 COVID-Net UV 的目标是通过加速肺部护理点超声视频的筛查和自动检测 COVID-19 阳性病例，协助一线临床医生对抗 COVID-19。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的时空深度神经网络架构COVID-Net UV，用于通过凸阵探头采集的肺部床旁超声视频自动诊断COVID-19感染。
AI.motivation: 在疫苗接种之外，需要快速准确的筛查方法来控制COVID-19传播，确保公共卫生安全，而传统方法存在效率和准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取空间特征与循环神经网络（RNN）学习时间依赖性，通过超参数调优构建混合时空模型。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到94.44%的平均准确率，且无漏诊病例，可有效辅助临床筛查。
AI.conclusion: COVID-Net UV通过自动化分析超声视频显著提升COVID-19检测效率，为前线临床提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Logan Stapleton,Min Hun Lee,Diana Qing,Marya Wright,Alexandra Chouldechova,Kenneth Holstein,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Haiyi Zhu
title: Imagining new futures beyond predictive systems in child welfare: A qualitative study with impacted stakeholders
title_zh: 想象儿童福利预测系统之外的新未来：与受影响的利益相关者进行的定性研究
comment: 10 pages in main body; 4 pages in appendix; Published in the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT'22)
comments: 10 pages in main body; 4 pages in appendix; Published in the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT'22)
abstract: Child welfare agencies across the United States are turning to data-driven predictive technologies (commonly called predictive analytics) which use government administrative data to assist workers' decision-making. While some prior work has explored impacted stakeholders' concerns with current uses of data-driven predictive risk models (PRMs), less work has asked stakeholders whether such tools ought to be used in the first place. In this work, we conducted a set of seven design workshops with 35 stakeholders who have been impacted by the child welfare system or who work in it to understand their beliefs and concerns around PRMs, and to engage them in imagining new uses of data and technologies in the child welfare system. We found that participants worried current PRMs perpetuate or exacerbate existing problems in child welfare. Participants suggested new ways to use data and data-driven tools to better support impacted communities and suggested paths to mitigate possible harms of these tools. Participants also suggested low-tech or no-tech alternatives to PRMs to address problems in child welfare. Our study sheds light on how researchers and designers can work in solidarity with impacted communities, possibly to circumvent or oppose child welfare agencies.
summary: Child welfare agencies across the United States are turning to data-driven predictive technologies (commonly called predictive analytics) which use government administrative data to assist workers' decision-making. While some prior work has explored impacted stakeholders' concerns with current uses of data-driven predictive risk models (PRMs), less work has asked stakeholders whether such tools ought to be used in the first place. In this work, we conducted a set of seven design workshops with 35 stakeholders who have been impacted by the child welfare system or who work in it to understand their beliefs and concerns around PRMs, and to engage them in imagining new uses of data and technologies in the child welfare system. We found that participants worried current PRMs perpetuate or exacerbate existing problems in child welfare. Participants suggested new ways to use data and data-driven tools to better support impacted communities and suggested paths to mitigate possible harms of these tools. Participants also suggested low-tech or no-tech alternatives to PRMs to address problems in child welfare. Our study sheds light on how researchers and designers can work in solidarity with impacted communities, possibly to circumvent or oppose child welfare agencies.
abstract_zh: 美国各地的儿童福利机构正在转向数据驱动的预测技术（通常称为预测分析），该技术使用政府行政数据来协助工作人员决策。虽然之前的一些工作已经探讨了利益相关者对当前使用数据驱动的预测风险模型 (PRM) 的担忧，但很少有工作询问利益相关者是否应该首先使用此类工具。在这项工作中，我们与 35 位受儿童福利系统影响或在其中工作的利益相关者举办了 7 个设计研讨会，以了解他们对 PRM 的信念和担忧，并让他们想象数据和技术在儿童福利系统中的新用途。我们发现，参与者担心当前的 PRM 会延续或加剧儿童福利方面的现有问题。参与者提出了使用数据和数据驱动工具的新方法，以更好地支持受影响的社区，并提出了减轻这些工具可能造成的危害的路径。与会者还建议采用低技术或无技术的 PRM 替代方案来解决儿童福利问题。我们的研究揭示了研究人员和设计师如何与受影响的社区团结一致，从而可能规避或反对儿童福利机构。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过定性研究探讨儿童福利系统中利益相关者对预测性风险模型（PRMs）的看法，并设想替代性数据工具的应用。
AI.motivation: 当前预测性风险模型可能加剧儿童福利系统中的既有问题，需了解利益相关者是否应继续使用此类工具并探索改进方案。
AI.method: 开展七场设计研讨会，邀请35名受儿童福利系统影响的人员或从业者，通过质性分析收集其对PRMs的担忧及替代技术建议。
AI.result: 参与者认为现有PRMs加剧系统问题，提出数据工具的新应用方式及低技术或无技术解决方案，强调需与社区合作减少工具危害。
AI.conclusion: 研究者应与受儿童福利系统影响的社区协作，设计更公平的技术方案以替代或改进现有预测性系统。

title: Generating Explanations from Deep Reinforcement Learning Using Episodic Memory
title_zh: 使用情景记忆从深度强化学习生成解释
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) involves the use of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to make sequential decisions in order to maximize reward. For many tasks the resulting sequence of actions produced by a Deep RL policy can be long and difficult to understand for humans. A crucial component of human explanations is selectivity, whereby only key decisions and causes are recounted. Imbuing Deep RL agents with such an ability would make their resulting policies easier to understand from a human perspective and generate a concise set of instructions to aid the learning of future agents. To this end we use a Deep RL agent with an episodic memory system to identify and recount key decisions during policy execution. We show that these decisions form a short, human readable explanation that can also be used to speed up the learning of naive Deep RL agents in an algorithm-independent manner.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) involves the use of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to make sequential decisions in order to maximize reward. For many tasks the resulting sequence of actions produced by a Deep RL policy can be long and difficult to understand for humans. A crucial component of human explanations is selectivity, whereby only key decisions and causes are recounted. Imbuing Deep RL agents with such an ability would make their resulting policies easier to understand from a human perspective and generate a concise set of instructions to aid the learning of future agents. To this end we use a Deep RL agent with an episodic memory system to identify and recount key decisions during policy execution. We show that these decisions form a short, human readable explanation that can also be used to speed up the learning of naive Deep RL agents in an algorithm-independent manner.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (RL) 涉及使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 做出顺序决策，以最大化奖励。对于许多任务来说，深度强化学习策略产生的动作序列可能很长，而且人类难以理解。人类解释的一个重要组成部分是选择性，即仅重述关键决策和原因。赋予深度强化学习代理这样的能力将使他们的策略更容易从人类的角度理解，并生成一套简洁的指令来帮助未来代理的学习。为此，我们使用具有情景记忆系统的深度强化学习代理来识别和重新计算策略执行期间的关键决策。我们证明，这些决策形成了一个简短的、人类可读的解释，也可用于以独立于算法的方式加速初级深度强化学习代理的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用情景记忆系统从深度强化学习策略中生成简洁的人类可读解释，以增强策略的可理解性并加速后续学习。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习生成的决策序列通常冗长复杂，缺乏人类解释所需的精炼性和关键信息筛选能力，导致难以理解且难以用于指导其他智能体学习。
AI.method: 设计带有情景记忆模块的深度强化学习框架，在策略执行过程中识别并记录关键决策节点，生成浓缩的解释性信息。
AI.result: 实验表明生成的解释能有效概括策略核心逻辑，且作为先验知识可独立于算法类型加速新智能体的学习过程。
AI.conclusion: 情景记忆机制为深度强化学习提供了可解释性增强方案，在保持算法性能的同时提升了策略的透明度和教学价值。

search_text: Generating Explanations from Deep Reinforcement Learning Using Episodic Memory 使用情景记忆从深度强化学习生成解释 Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) involves the use of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to make sequential decisions in order to maximize reward. For many tasks the resulting sequence of actions produced by a Deep RL policy can be long and difficult to understand for humans. A crucial component of human explanations is selectivity, whereby only key decisions and causes are recounted. Imbuing Deep RL agents with such an ability would make their resulting policies easier to understand from a human perspective and generate a concise set of instructions to aid the learning of future agents. To this end we use a Deep RL agent with an episodic memory system to identify and recount key decisions during policy execution. We show that these decisions form a short, human readable explanation that can also be used to speed up the learning of naive Deep RL agents in an algorithm-independent manner. 深度强化学习 (RL) 涉及使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 做出顺序决策，以最大化奖励。对于许多任务来说，深度强化学习策略产生的动作序列可能很长，而且人类难以理解。人类解释的一个重要组成部分是选择性，即仅重述关键决策和原因。赋予深度强化学习代理这样的能力将使他们的策略更容易从人类的角度理解，并生成一套简洁的指令来帮助未来代理的学习。为此，我们使用具有情景记忆系统的深度强化学习代理来识别和重新计算策略执行期间的关键决策。我们证明，这些决策形成了一个简短的、人类可读的解释，也可用于以独立于算法的方式加速初级深度强化学习代理的学习。 本文提出利用情景记忆系统从深度强化学习策略中生成简洁的人类可读解释，以增强策略的可理解性并加速后续学习。 Sam Blakeman,Denis Mareschal cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

title: Financial Time Series Data Augmentation with Generative Adversarial Networks and Extended Intertemporal Return Plots
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络和扩展的跨期回报图增强金融时间序列数据
abstract: Data augmentation is a key regularization method to support the forecast and classification performance of highly parameterized models in computer vision. In the time series domain however, regularization in terms of augmentation is not equally common even though these methods have proven to mitigate effects from small sample size or non-stationarity. In this paper we apply state-of-the art image-based generative models for the task of data augmentation and introduce the extended intertemporal return plot (XIRP), a new image representation for time series. Multiple tests are conducted to assess the quality of the augmentation technique regarding its ability to synthesize time series effectively and improve forecast results on a subset of the M4 competition. We further investigate the relationship between data set characteristics and sampling results via Shapley values for feature attribution on the performance metrics and the optimal ratio of augmented data. Over all data sets, our approach proves to be effective in reducing the return forecast error by 7% on 79% of the financial data sets with varying statistical properties and frequencies.
summary: Data augmentation is a key regularization method to support the forecast and classification performance of highly parameterized models in computer vision. In the time series domain however, regularization in terms of augmentation is not equally common even though these methods have proven to mitigate effects from small sample size or non-stationarity. In this paper we apply state-of-the art image-based generative models for the task of data augmentation and introduce the extended intertemporal return plot (XIRP), a new image representation for time series. Multiple tests are conducted to assess the quality of the augmentation technique regarding its ability to synthesize time series effectively and improve forecast results on a subset of the M4 competition. We further investigate the relationship between data set characteristics and sampling results via Shapley values for feature attribution on the performance metrics and the optimal ratio of augmented data. Over all data sets, our approach proves to be effective in reducing the return forecast error by 7% on 79% of the financial data sets with varying statistical properties and frequencies.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是支持计算机视觉中高度参数化模型的预测和分类性能的关键正则化方法。然而，在时间序列领域，尽管这些方法已被证明可以减轻小样本量或非平稳性的影响，但增强方面的正则化并不同样常见。在本文中，我们将最先进的基于图像的生成模型应用于数据增强任务，并介绍了扩展的跨期回报图（XIRP），这是一种新的时间序列图像表示形式。我们进行了多项测试来评估增强技术的质量，了解其有效合成时间序列并改进 M4 竞赛子集的预测结果的能力。我们通过性能指标的特征归因的 Shapley 值和增强数据的最佳比率进一步研究数据集特征和采样结果之间的关系。在所有数据集上，我们的方法被证明可以有效地将 79% 的具有不同统计属性和频率的金融数据集的回报预测误差减少 7%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）和扩展的跨期收益图（XIRP）对金融时间序列数据进行增强的方法，以提高时间序列预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在计算机视觉中，数据增强是提高模型性能的重要方法，但在时间序列领域应用较少。金融时间序列数据常常面临样本量小和非平稳性问题，因此需要有效的数据增强方法来提高预测效果。
AI.method: 论文采用先进的图像生成模型（GAN）进行数据增强，并引入扩展的跨期收益图（XIRP）作为时间序列的新图像表示。通过多种实验评估数据增强技术的有效性，并利用Shapley值分析数据集特征与采样结果之间的关系。
AI.result: 该方法在M4竞赛的金融数据集子集上有效减少了7%的收益预测误差，适用于具有不同统计特性和频率的79%的金融数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了使用生成对抗网络和XIRP图像表示进行时间序列数据增强在金融预测任务中的有效性，并揭示了数据集特征与增强效果之间的关系。

title: Remote Sensing Novel View Synthesis with Implicit Multiplane Representations
title_zh: 具有隐式多平面表示的遥感新颖视图合成
abstract: Novel view synthesis of remote sensing scenes is of great significance for scene visualization, human-computer interaction, and various downstream applications. Despite the recent advances in computer graphics and photogrammetry technology, generating novel views is still challenging particularly for remote sensing images due to its high complexity, view sparsity and limited view-perspective variations. In this paper, we propose a novel remote sensing view synthesis method by leveraging the recent advances in implicit neural representations. Considering the overhead and far depth imaging of remote sensing images, we represent the 3D space by combining implicit multiplane images (MPI) representation and deep neural networks. The 3D scene is reconstructed under a self-supervised optimization paradigm through a differentiable multiplane renderer with multi-view input constraints. Images from any novel views thus can be freely rendered on the basis of the reconstructed model. As a by-product, the depth maps corresponding to the given viewpoint can be generated along with the rendering output. We refer to our method as Implicit Multiplane Images (ImMPI). To further improve the view synthesis under sparse-view inputs, we explore the learning-based initialization of remote sensing 3D scenes and proposed a neural network based Prior extractor to accelerate the optimization process. In addition, we propose a new dataset for remote sensing novel view synthesis with multi-view real-world google earth images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the ImMPI over previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy, visual fidelity, and time efficiency. Ablation experiments also suggest the effectiveness of our methodology design. Our dataset and code can be found at https://github.com/wyc-Chang/ImMPI
summary: Novel view synthesis of remote sensing scenes is of great significance for scene visualization, human-computer interaction, and various downstream applications. Despite the recent advances in computer graphics and photogrammetry technology, generating novel views is still challenging particularly for remote sensing images due to its high complexity, view sparsity and limited view-perspective variations. The 3D scene is reconstructed under a self-supervised optimization paradigm through a differentiable multiplane renderer with multi-view input constraints. Images from any novel views thus can be freely rendered on the basis of the reconstructed model. As a by-product, the depth maps corresponding to the given viewpoint can be generated along with the rendering output. We refer to our method as Implicit Multiplane Images (ImMPI). To further improve the view synthesis under sparse-view inputs, we explore the learning-based initialization of remote sensing 3D scenes and proposed a neural network based Prior extractor to accelerate the optimization process. In addition, we propose a new dataset for remote sensing novel view synthesis with multi-view real-world google earth images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the ImMPI over previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy, visual fidelity, and time efficiency. Ablation experiments also suggest the effectiveness of our methodology design. Our dataset and code can be found at https://github.com/wyc-Chang/ImMPI
abstract_zh: 遥感场景的新颖视图合成对于场景可视化、人机交互以及各种下游应用具有重要意义。尽管计算机图形和摄影测量技术最近取得了进展，但由于其高度复杂性、视图稀疏性和有限的视图视角变化，生成新颖的视图仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于遥感图像。在本文中，我们利用隐式神经表示的最新进展提出了一种新颖的遥感视图合成方法。考虑到遥感图像的开销和远深度成像，我们通过结合隐式多平面图像（MPI）表示和深度神经网络来表示3D空间。 3D 场景通过具有多视图输入约束的可微分多平面渲染器在自监督优化范例下重建。因此，可以在重建模型的基础上自由地渲染来自任何新颖视图的图像。作为副产品，可以与渲染输出一起生成对应于给定视点的深度图。我们将我们的方法称为隐式多平面图像 (ImMPI)。为了进一步改进稀疏视图输入下的视图合成，我们探索了基于学习的遥感 3D 场景初始化，并提出了一种基于神经网络的先验提取器来加速优化过程。此外，我们提出了一个新的数据集，用于利用多视图真实世界谷歌地球图像进行遥感新视图合成。大量实验证明 ImMPI 在重建精度、视觉保真度和时间效率方面优于以前最先进的方法。消融实验还表明我们的方法设计的有效性。我们的数据集和代码可以在 https://github.com/wyc-Chang/ImMPI 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式多平面图像表示的遥感场景新视角合成方法（ImMPI），以解决遥感图像视角稀疏性和复杂性带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机图形学和摄影测量技术难以处理遥感图像的高复杂性、视角稀疏性和视角变化有限的问题，亟需更高效的视角合成方法。
AI.method: 结合隐式多平面图像（MPI）与深度神经网络，在自监督优化框架下通过可微分多平面渲染器重建3D场景，并引入基于神经网络的先验提取器加速优化过程，同时构建了新的多视角遥感数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，ImMPI在重建精度、视觉保真度和时间效率上优于现有方法，消融实验验证了方法设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ImMPI为遥感新视角合成提供了高效且高质量的解决方案，其数据集和代码已开源。

search_text: Remote Sensing Novel View Synthesis with Implicit Multiplane Representations 具有隐式多平面表示的遥感新颖视图合成 Novel view synthesis of remote sensing scenes is of great significance for scene visualization, human-computer interaction, and various downstream applications. Despite the recent advances in computer graphics and photogrammetry technology, generating novel views is still challenging particularly for remote sensing images due to its high complexity, view sparsity and limited view-perspective variations. In this paper, we propose a novel remote sensing view synthesis method by leveraging the recent advances in implicit neural representations. Considering the overhead and far depth imaging of remote sensing images, we represent the 3D space by combining implicit multiplane images (MPI) representation and deep neural networks. The 3D scene is reconstructed under a self-supervised optimization paradigm through a differentiable multiplane renderer with multi-view input constraints. Images from any novel views thus can be freely rendered on the basis of the reconstructed model. As a by-product, the depth maps corresponding to the given viewpoint can be generated along with the rendering output. We refer to our method as Implicit Multiplane Images (ImMPI). To further improve the view synthesis under sparse-view inputs, we explore the learning-based initialization of remote sensing 3D scenes and proposed a neural network based Prior extractor to accelerate the optimization process. In addition, we propose a new dataset for remote sensing novel view synthesis with multi-view real-world google earth images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the ImMPI over previous state-of-the-art methods in terms of reconstruction accuracy, visual fidelity, and time efficiency. Ablation experiments also suggest the effectiveness of our methodology design. Our dataset and code can be found at https://github.com/wyc-Chang/ImMPI 遥感场景的新颖视图合成对于场景可视化、人机交互以及各种下游应用具有重要意义。尽管计算机图形和摄影测量技术最近取得了进展，但由于其高度复杂性、视图稀疏性和有限的视图视角变化，生成新颖的视图仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于遥感图像。在本文中，我们利用隐式神经表示的最新进展提出了一种新颖的遥感视图合成方法。考虑到遥感图像的开销和远深度成像，我们通过结合隐式多平面图像（MPI）表示和深度神经网络来表示3D空间。 3D 场景通过具有多视图输入约束的可微分多平面渲染器在自监督优化范例下重建。因此，可以在重建模型的基础上自由地渲染来自任何新颖视图的图像。作为副产品，可以与渲染输出一起生成对应于给定视点的深度图。我们将我们的方法称为隐式多平面图像 (ImMPI)。为了进一步改进稀疏视图输入下的视图合成，我们探索了基于学习的遥感 3D 场景初始化，并提出了一种基于神经网络的先验提取器来加速优化过程。此外，我们提出了一个新的数据集，用于利用多视图真实世界谷歌地球图像进行遥感新视图合成。大量实验证明 ImMPI 在重建精度、视觉保真度和时间效率方面优于以前最先进的方法。消融实验还表明我们的方法设计的有效性。我们的数据集和代码可以在 https://github.com/wyc-Chang/ImMPI 找到 本文提出了一种基于隐式多平面图像表示的遥感场景新视角合成方法（ImMPI），以解决遥感图像视角稀疏性和复杂性带来的挑战。 Yongchang Wu,Zhengxia Zou,Zhenwei Shi cs.CV

authors_text: Yang Zhou,Zhiwen Yang,Hui Zhang,Eric I-Chao Chang,Yubo Fan,Yan Xu
title: 3D Segmentation Guided Style-based Generative Adversarial Networks for PET Synthesis
title_zh: 用于 PET 合成的 3D 分割引导的基于样式的生成对抗网络
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in a future issue of this journal, but has not been fully edited. Content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/TMI.2022.3156614, IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in a future issue of this journal, but has not been fully edited. Content may change prior to final publication. Citation information: DOI 10.1109/TMI.2022.3156614, IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
abstract: Potential radioactive hazards in full-dose positron emission tomography (PET) imaging remain a concern, whereas the quality of low-dose images is never desirable for clinical use. So it is of great interest to translate low-dose PET images into full-dose. Previous studies based on deep learning methods usually directly extract hierarchical features for reconstruction. We notice that the importance of each feature is different and they should be weighted dissimilarly so that tiny information can be captured by the neural network. Furthermore, the synthesis on some regions of interest is important in some applications. Here we propose a novel segmentation guided style-based generative adversarial network (SGSGAN) for PET synthesis. (1) We put forward a style-based generator employing style modulation, which specifically controls the hierarchical features in the translation process, to generate images with more realistic textures. (2) We adopt a task-driven strategy that couples a segmentation task with a generative adversarial network (GAN) framework to improve the translation performance. Extensive experiments show the superiority of our overall framework in PET synthesis, especially on those regions of interest.
summary: Potential radioactive hazards in full-dose positron emission tomography (PET) imaging remain a concern, whereas the quality of low-dose images is never desirable for clinical use. So it is of great interest to translate low-dose PET images into full-dose. Previous studies based on deep learning methods usually directly extract hierarchical features for reconstruction. We notice that the importance of each feature is different and they should be weighted dissimilarly so that tiny information can be captured by the neural network. Furthermore, the synthesis on some regions of interest is important in some applications. Here we propose a novel segmentation guided style-based generative adversarial network (SGSGAN) for PET synthesis. (1) We put forward a style-based generator employing style modulation, which specifically controls the hierarchical features in the translation process, to generate images with more realistic textures. (2) We adopt a task-driven strategy that couples a segmentation task with a generative adversarial network (GAN) framework to improve the translation performance. Extensive experiments show the superiority of our overall framework in PET synthesis, especially on those regions of interest.
abstract_zh: 全剂量正电子发射断层扫描 (PET) 成像中的潜在放射性危害仍然令人担忧，而低剂量图像的质量永远不适合临床使用。因此，将低剂量 PET 图像转化为全剂量图像非常有意义。以往基于深度学习方法的研究通常直接提取层次特征进行重建。我们注意到每个特征的重要性是不同的，它们的权重应该不同，以便神经网络可以捕获微小的信息。此外，某些感兴趣区域的合成在某些应用中很重要。在这里，我们提出了一种用于 PET 合成的新型分割引导基于风格的生成对抗网络（SGSGAN）。 （1）我们提出了一种基于风格的生成器，采用风格调制，专门控制翻译过程中的层次特征，以生成具有更真实纹理的图像。 （2）我们采用任务驱动策略，将分割任务与生成对抗网络（GAN）框架结合起来，以提高翻译性能。大量实验表明我们的整体框架在 PET 合成中的优越性，特别是在那些感兴趣的区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D分割引导的风格化生成对抗网络（SGSGAN），用于将低剂量PET图像转换为高质量的全剂量PET图像。
AI.motivation: 全剂量PET成像存在放射性风险，而低剂量图像质量不足，需在保证安全的前提下提升图像质量。传统方法未充分考虑特征权重差异及关键区域的合成需求。
AI.method: 设计带风格调制的生成器以控制特征层次，结合分割任务与GAN框架，通过任务驱动策略优化关键区域的重建效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在PET合成任务中优于现有方法，尤其在感兴趣区域的重建质量上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合分割引导与风格化生成，SGSGAN有效提升了低剂量到全剂量PET图像转换的质量与临床适用性。

title: GeoPointGAN: Synthetic Spatial Data with Local Label Differential Privacy
title_zh: GeoPointGAN：具有本地标签差异隐私的合成空间数据
abstract: Synthetic data generation is a fundamental task for many data management and data science applications. Spatial data is of particular interest, and its sensitive nature often leads to privacy concerns. We introduce GeoPointGAN, a novel GAN-based solution for generating synthetic spatial point datasets with high utility and strong individual level privacy guarantees. GeoPointGAN's architecture includes a novel point transformation generator that learns to project randomly generated point co-ordinates into meaningful synthetic co-ordinates that capture both microscopic (e.g., junctions, squares) and macroscopic (e.g., parks, lakes) geographic features. We provide our privacy guarantees through label local differential privacy, which is more practical than traditional local differential privacy. We seamlessly integrate this level of privacy into GeoPointGAN by augmenting the discriminator to the point level and implementing a randomized response-based mechanism that flips the labels associated with the 'real' and 'fake' points used in training. Extensive experiments show that GeoPointGAN significantly outperforms recent solutions, improving by up to 10 times compared to the most competitive baseline. We also evaluate GeoPointGAN using range, hotspot, and facility location queries, which confirm the practical effectiveness of GeoPointGAN for privacy-preserving querying. The results illustrate that a strong level of privacy is achieved with little-to-no adverse utility cost, which we explain through the generalization and regularization effects that are realized by flipping the labels of the data during training.
summary: Synthetic data generation is a fundamental task for many data management and data science applications. Spatial data is of particular interest, and its sensitive nature often leads to privacy concerns. We introduce GeoPointGAN, a novel GAN-based solution for generating synthetic spatial point datasets with high utility and strong individual level privacy guarantees. GeoPointGAN's architecture includes a novel point transformation generator that learns to project randomly generated point co-ordinates into meaningful synthetic co-ordinates that capture both microscopic (e.g., junctions, squares) and macroscopic (e.g., parks, lakes) geographic features. We provide our privacy guarantees through label local differential privacy, which is more practical than traditional local differential privacy. We seamlessly integrate this level of privacy into GeoPointGAN by augmenting the discriminator to the point level and implementing a randomized response-based mechanism that flips the labels associated with the 'real' and 'fake' points used in training. Extensive experiments show that GeoPointGAN significantly outperforms recent solutions, improving by up to 10 times compared to the most competitive baseline. We also evaluate GeoPointGAN using range, hotspot, and facility location queries, which confirm the practical effectiveness of GeoPointGAN for privacy-preserving querying. The results illustrate that a strong level of privacy is achieved with little-to-no adverse utility cost, which we explain through the generalization and regularization effects that are realized by flipping the labels of the data during training.
abstract_zh: 合成数据生成是许多数据管理和数据科学应用程序的一项基本任务。空间数据特别令人感兴趣，其敏感性往往会导致隐私问题。我们介绍 GeoPointGAN，这是一种基于 GAN 的新型解决方案，用于生成具有高实用性和强大的个人级别隐私保证的合成空间点数据集。 GeoPointGAN 的架构包括一个新颖的点变换生成器，它学习将随机生成的点坐标投影为有意义的合成坐标，以捕获微观（例如，路口、广场）和宏观（例如，公园、湖泊）地理特征。我们通过标签本地差分隐私来提供我们的隐私保证，这比传统的本地差分隐私更实用。我们通过将鉴别器增强到点级别并实现基于随机响应的机制来翻转与训练中使用的“真实”和“假”点相关的标签，从而将这种级别的隐私无缝集成到 GeoPointGAN 中。大量实验表明，GeoPointGAN 的性能显着优于最新的解决方案，与最具竞争力的基线相比，性能提高了 10 倍。我们还使用范围、热点和设施位置查询来评估 GeoPointGAN，这证实了 GeoPointGAN 在隐私保护查询方面的实际有效性。结果表明，在几乎没有不利效用成本的情况下实现了强大的隐私级别，我们通过在训练期间翻转数据标签实现的泛化和正则化效果来解释这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoPointGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，用于生成具有局部标签差分隐私保护的合成空间点数据集。
AI.motivation: 空间数据具有敏感性，传统方法难以在隐私保护与数据效用间取得平衡，需设计兼顾高隐私性和数据可用性的生成模型。
AI.method: 设计包含点变换生成器的GAN架构，通过标签局部差分隐私机制对训练数据的'真实'/'虚假'标签进行随机翻转，并增强判别器以实现隐私保护。
AI.result: 实验表明GeoPointGAN相比现有方法性能提升达10倍，在范围查询、热点分析等任务中验证了隐私保护的有效性，且效用损失极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过标签翻转机制实现强隐私保护与数据效用的平衡，证明了局部标签差分隐私在空间数据合成中的可行性与优越性。

search_text: GeoPointGAN: Synthetic Spatial Data with Local Label Differential Privacy GeoPointGAN：具有本地标签差异隐私的合成空间数据 Synthetic data generation is a fundamental task for many data management and data science applications. Spatial data is of particular interest, and its sensitive nature often leads to privacy concerns. We introduce GeoPointGAN, a novel GAN-based solution for generating synthetic spatial point datasets with high utility and strong individual level privacy guarantees. GeoPointGAN's architecture includes a novel point transformation generator that learns to project randomly generated point co-ordinates into meaningful synthetic co-ordinates that capture both microscopic (e.g., junctions, squares) and macroscopic (e.g., parks, lakes) geographic features. We provide our privacy guarantees through label local differential privacy, which is more practical than traditional local differential privacy. We seamlessly integrate this level of privacy into GeoPointGAN by augmenting the discriminator to the point level and implementing a randomized response-based mechanism that flips the labels associated with the 'real' and 'fake' points used in training. Extensive experiments show that GeoPointGAN significantly outperforms recent solutions, improving by up to 10 times compared to the most competitive baseline. We also evaluate GeoPointGAN using range, hotspot, and facility location queries, which confirm the practical effectiveness of GeoPointGAN for privacy-preserving querying. The results illustrate that a strong level of privacy is achieved with little-to-no adverse utility cost, which we explain through the generalization and regularization effects that are realized by flipping the labels of the data during training. 合成数据生成是许多数据管理和数据科学应用程序的一项基本任务。空间数据特别令人感兴趣，其敏感性往往会导致隐私问题。我们介绍 GeoPointGAN，这是一种基于 GAN 的新型解决方案，用于生成具有高实用性和强大的个人级别隐私保证的合成空间点数据集。 GeoPointGAN 的架构包括一个新颖的点变换生成器，它学习将随机生成的点坐标投影为有意义的合成坐标，以捕获微观（例如，路口、广场）和宏观（例如，公园、湖泊）地理特征。我们通过标签本地差分隐私来提供我们的隐私保证，这比传统的本地差分隐私更实用。我们通过将鉴别器增强到点级别并实现基于随机响应的机制来翻转与训练中使用的“真实”和“假”点相关的标签，从而将这种级别的隐私无缝集成到 GeoPointGAN 中。大量实验表明，GeoPointGAN 的性能显着优于最新的解决方案，与最具竞争力的基线相比，性能提高了 10 倍。我们还使用范围、热点和设施位置查询来评估 GeoPointGAN，这证实了 GeoPointGAN 在隐私保护查询方面的实际有效性。结果表明，在几乎没有不利效用成本的情况下实现了强大的隐私级别，我们通过在训练期间翻转数据标签实现的泛化和正则化效果来解释这一点。 本文提出GeoPointGAN，一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，用于生成具有局部标签差分隐私保护的合成空间点数据集。 Teddy Cunningham,Konstantin Klemmer,Hongkai Wen,Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.DB

authors_text: Ziniu Qian,Kailu Li,Maode Lai,Eric I-Chao Chang,Bingzheng Wei,Yubo Fan,Yan Xu
title: Transformer based multiple instance learning for weakly supervised histopathology image segmentation
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的多实例学习，用于弱监督组织病理学图像分割
abstract: Hispathological image segmentation algorithms play a critical role in computer aided diagnosis technology. The development of weakly supervised segmentation algorithm alleviates the problem of medical image annotation that it is time-consuming and labor-intensive. As a subset of weakly supervised learning, Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has been proven to be effective in segmentation. However, there is a lack of related information between instances in MIL, which limits the further improvement of segmentation performance. In this paper, we propose a novel weakly supervised method for pixel-level segmentation in histopathology images, which introduces Transformer into the MIL framework to capture global or long-range dependencies. The multi-head self-attention in the Transformer establishes the relationship between instances, which solves the shortcoming that instances are independent of each other in MIL. In addition, deep supervision is introduced to overcome the limitation of annotations in weakly supervised methods and make the better utilization of hierarchical information. The state-of-the-art results on the colon cancer dataset demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method compared with other weakly supervised methods. It is worth believing that there is a potential of our approach for various applications in medical images.
summary: Hispathological image segmentation algorithms play a critical role in computer aided diagnosis technology. The development of weakly supervised segmentation algorithm alleviates the problem of medical image annotation that it is time-consuming and labor-intensive. In this paper, we propose a novel weakly supervised method for pixel-level segmentation in histopathology images, which introduces Transformer into the MIL framework to capture global or long-range dependencies. The multi-head self-attention in the Transformer establishes the relationship between instances, which solves the shortcoming that instances are independent of each other in MIL. In addition, deep supervision is introduced to overcome the limitation of annotations in weakly supervised methods and make the better utilization of hierarchical information. The state-of-the-art results on the colon cancer dataset demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method compared with other weakly supervised methods. It is worth believing that there is a potential of our approach for various applications in medical images.
abstract_zh: 病理图像分割算法在计算机辅助诊断技术中发挥着至关重要的作用。弱监督分割算法的发展缓解了医学图像标注耗时耗力的问题。作为弱监督学习的一个子集，多实例学习（MIL）已被证明在分割方面是有效的。然而，MIL中实例之间缺乏相关信息，限制了分割性能的进一步提高。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织病理学图像中像素级分割的新型弱监督方法，该方法将 Transformer 引入 MIL 框架以捕获全局或远程依赖性。 Transformer中的多头自注意力机制建立了实例之间的关系，解决了MIL中实例相互独立的缺点。此外，引入深度监督来克服弱监督方法中注释的局限性，更好地利用层次信息。结肠癌数据集的最新结果证明了所提出的方法与其他弱监督方法相比的优越性。值得相信的是，我们的方法在医学图像的各种应用中都有潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多实例学习方法，用于弱监督的组织病理学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 传统多实例学习（MIL）在实例间缺乏关联性，限制了分割性能提升，且弱监督方法注释利用不足。
AI.method: 将Transformer引入MIL框架，通过多头自注意力机制建立实例间关系，并引入深度监督以优化分层信息利用。
AI.result: 在结直肠癌数据集上达到最先进的分割效果，优于其他弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在医学图像分割中具有广泛应用潜力。

title: Seeing Sounds, Hearing Shapes: a gamified study to evaluate sound-sketches
title_zh: 看到声音，听到形状：评估声音草图的游戏化研究
comment: Accepted at International Computer Music Conference (ICMC) 2022
comments: Accepted at International Computer Music Conference (ICMC) 2022
abstract: Sound-shape associations, a subset of cross-modal associations between the auditory and visual domain, have been studied mainly in the context of matching a set of purposefully crafted shapes to sounds. Recent studies have explored how humans represent sound through free-form sketching and how a graphical sketch input could be used for sound production. In this paper, the potential of communicating sound characteristics through these free-form sketches is investigated in a gamified study that was conducted with eighty-two participants at two online exhibition events. The results show that participants managed to recognise sounds at a higher rate than the random baseline would suggest, however it appeared difficult to visually encode nuanced timbral differences.
summary: Sound-shape associations, a subset of cross-modal associations between the auditory and visual domain, have been studied mainly in the context of matching a set of purposefully crafted shapes to sounds. Recent studies have explored how humans represent sound through free-form sketching and how a graphical sketch input could be used for sound production. In this paper, the potential of communicating sound characteristics through these free-form sketches is investigated in a gamified study that was conducted with eighty-two participants at two online exhibition events. The results show that participants managed to recognise sounds at a higher rate than the random baseline would suggest, however it appeared difficult to visually encode nuanced timbral differences.
abstract_zh: 声音-形状关联是听觉和视觉领域之间跨模式关联的一个子集，主要在将一组特意设计的形状与声音相匹配的背景下进行研究。最近的研究探索了人类如何通过自由形式的草图来表示声音，以及如何使用图形草图输入来产生声音。在本文中，通过在两次在线展览活动中对 82 名参与者进行的游戏化研究，调查了通过这些自由形式的草图传达声音特征的潜力。结果表明，参与者能够以比随机基线建议的更高的速度识别声音，但似乎很难在视觉上编码细微的音色差异。

AI.tldr: 通过游戏化研究评估声音草图在传达声音特征方面的潜力
AI.motivation: 探索人类如何通过自由形式素描表达声音，并验证其作为声音生成输入的可行性
AI.method: 通过两次在线展览的游戏化实验，让82名参与者进行声音草图绘制和识别任务
AI.result: 参与者识别声音准确率高于随机基线，但视觉编码细微音色差异存在困难
AI.conclusion: 声音草图能有效传达基本声音特征，但需进一步研究以提升细微音色差异的表达能力

title: Bridging the gap between QP-based and MPC-based RL
title_zh: 弥合基于 QP 和基于 MPC 的 RL 之间的差距
abstract: Reinforcement learning methods typically use Deep Neural Networks to approximate the value functions and policies underlying a Markov Decision Process. Unfortunately, DNN-based RL suffers from a lack of explainability of the resulting policy. In this paper, we instead approximate the policy and value functions using an optimization problem, taking the form of Quadratic Programs (QPs). We propose simple tools to promote structures in the QP, pushing it to resemble a linear MPC scheme. A generic unstructured QP offers high flexibility for learning, while a QP having the structure of an MPC scheme promotes the explainability of the resulting policy, additionally provides ways for its analysis. The tools we propose allow for continuously adjusting the trade-off between the former and the latter during learning. We illustrate the workings of our proposed method with the resulting structure using a point-mass task.
summary: Reinforcement learning methods typically use Deep Neural Networks to approximate the value functions and policies underlying a Markov Decision Process. Unfortunately, DNN-based RL suffers from a lack of explainability of the resulting policy. In this paper, we instead approximate the policy and value functions using an optimization problem, taking the form of Quadratic Programs (QPs). We propose simple tools to promote structures in the QP, pushing it to resemble a linear MPC scheme. A generic unstructured QP offers high flexibility for learning, while a QP having the structure of an MPC scheme promotes the explainability of the resulting policy, additionally provides ways for its analysis. The tools we propose allow for continuously adjusting the trade-off between the former and the latter during learning. We illustrate the workings of our proposed method with the resulting structure using a point-mass task.
abstract_zh: 强化学习方法通​​常使用深度神经网络来近似马尔可夫决策过程背后的价值函数和策略。不幸的是，基于 DNN 的 RL 所产生的策略缺乏可解释性。在本文中，我们使用二次规划（QP）形式的优化问题来近似策略和价值函数。我们提出了简单的工具来促进 QP 中的结构，使其类似于线性 MPC 方案。通用的非结构化 QP 为学习提供了高度的灵活性，而具有 MPC 方案结构的 QP 则提高了结果策略的可解释性，另外还提供了分析方法。我们提出的工具允许在学习过程中不断调整前者和后者之间的权衡。我们使用点质量任务通过所得结构来说明我们提出的方法的工作原理。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过将二次规划（QP）与模型预测控制（MPC）结合，解决基于深度神经网络的强化学习（RL）策略可解释性不足的问题，同时保持策略的灵活性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习方法因依赖深度神经网络而缺乏策略可解释性，而单纯使用QP或MPC各有局限，需在灵活性与可解释性间取得平衡。
AI.method: 通过设计结构化工具，使QP逼近MPC框架，允许在学习过程中动态调整策略灵活性与可解释性之间的平衡。
AI.result: 在点质量任务中验证了方法的有效性，证明结构化QP能提升策略可解释性，同时保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效弥合QP与MPC在RL中的差距，提供兼具灵活性与可解释性的策略，为透明化强化学习提供新思路。

search_text: Bridging the gap between QP-based and MPC-based RL 弥合基于 QP 和基于 MPC 的 RL 之间的差距 Reinforcement learning methods typically use Deep Neural Networks to approximate the value functions and policies underlying a Markov Decision Process. Unfortunately, DNN-based RL suffers from a lack of explainability of the resulting policy. In this paper, we instead approximate the policy and value functions using an optimization problem, taking the form of Quadratic Programs (QPs). We propose simple tools to promote structures in the QP, pushing it to resemble a linear MPC scheme. A generic unstructured QP offers high flexibility for learning, while a QP having the structure of an MPC scheme promotes the explainability of the resulting policy, additionally provides ways for its analysis. The tools we propose allow for continuously adjusting the trade-off between the former and the latter during learning. We illustrate the workings of our proposed method with the resulting structure using a point-mass task. 强化学习方法通​​常使用深度神经网络来近似马尔可夫决策过程背后的价值函数和策略。不幸的是，基于 DNN 的 RL 所产生的策略缺乏可解释性。在本文中，我们使用二次规划（QP）形式的优化问题来近似策略和价值函数。我们提出了简单的工具来促进 QP 中的结构，使其类似于线性 MPC 方案。通用的非结构化 QP 为学习提供了高度的灵活性，而具有 MPC 方案结构的 QP 则提高了结果策略的可解释性，另外还提供了分析方法。我们提出的工具允许在学习过程中不断调整前者和后者之间的权衡。我们使用点质量任务通过所得结构来说明我们提出的方法的工作原理。 本文旨在通过将二次规划（QP）与模型预测控制（MPC）结合，解决基于深度神经网络的强化学习（RL）策略可解释性不足的问题，同时保持策略的灵活性。 Shambhuraj Sawant,Sebastien Gros eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: A Method for Self-Service Rehabilitation Training of Human Lower Limbs
title_zh: 一种人体下肢自助康复训练方法
abstract: In recent years, the research of rehabilitation robot technology has become a hotspot in the field of rehabilitation medicine engineering and robotics. To assist active rehabilitation in patients with unilateral lower extremity injury, we propose a new self-service rehabilitation training method to control the injured lower extremity through its contralateral healthy upper limbs. Firstly, the movement data of upper limbs and lower limbs of healthy people in normal walking state are obtained by gait measurement experiment. Secondly, the eigenvectors of upper limb and lower limb movements in a single movement cycle are extracted respectively. Thirdly, the linear mapping relationship between the upper limbs movement and the lower limbs movement is identified using the least squares method. Finally, the simulation experiment of self-service rehabilitation training is implemented on MATLAB/Simulink. The results indicate that the identified linear mapping model can achieve good accuracy and adaptability. The self-service rehabilitation training method is effective for helping patients with unilateral limb injury to make rehabilitation training on themselves.
summary: In recent years, the research of rehabilitation robot technology has become a hotspot in the field of rehabilitation medicine engineering and robotics. To assist active rehabilitation in patients with unilateral lower extremity injury, we propose a new self-service rehabilitation training method to control the injured lower extremity through its contralateral healthy upper limbs. Firstly, the movement data of upper limbs and lower limbs of healthy people in normal walking state are obtained by gait measurement experiment. Secondly, the eigenvectors of upper limb and lower limb movements in a single movement cycle are extracted respectively. Thirdly, the linear mapping relationship between the upper limbs movement and the lower limbs movement is identified using the least squares method. Finally, the simulation experiment of self-service rehabilitation training is implemented on MATLAB/Simulink. The results indicate that the identified linear mapping model can achieve good accuracy and adaptability. The self-service rehabilitation training method is effective for helping patients with unilateral limb injury to make rehabilitation training on themselves.
abstract_zh: 近年来，康复机器人技术的研究已成为康复医学工程和机器人领域的热点。为了协助单侧下肢损伤患者进行主动康复，我们提出了一种新的自助康复训练方法，通过对侧健康上肢来控制受伤下肢。首先，通过步态测量实验获得健康人正常行走状态下上肢和下肢的运动数据。其次，分别提取单个运动周期内上肢和下肢运动的特征向量。第三，利用最小二乘法识别上肢运动与下肢运动之间的线性映射关系。最后在MATLAB/Simulink上实现自助康复训练仿真实验。结果表明，识别的线性映射模型具有良好的精度和适应性。自助康复训练方法对于帮助单侧肢体损伤患者进行自我康复训练是有效的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过健侧上肢控制受伤下肢的自助康复训练方法，帮助单侧下肢损伤患者自主进行康复训练。
AI.motivation: 针对单侧下肢损伤患者康复训练需求，减少对专业设备依赖，提升自主康复效率。
AI.method: 通过步态实验获取健康人上下肢运动数据，提取特征向量并建立线性映射关系，利用MATLAB/Simulink进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 线性映射模型具有高准确性和适应性，自助康复方法对患者有效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单侧肢体损伤患者提供可行的自主康复方案，具备临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Juan Luis Gonzalez Bello,Jaeho Moon,Munchurl Kim
title: Positional Information is All You Need: A Novel Pipeline for Self-Supervised SVDE from Videos
title_zh: 位置信息就是您所需要的：视频自监督 SVDE 的新颖管道
abstract: Recently, much attention has been drawn to learning the underlying 3D structures of a scene from monocular videos in a fully self-supervised fashion. One of the most challenging aspects of this task is handling the independently moving objects as they break the rigid-scene assumption. For the first time, we show that pixel positional information can be exploited to learn SVDE (Single View Depth Estimation) from videos. Our proposed moving object (MO) masks, which are induced by shifted positional information (SPI) and referred to as `SPIMO' masks, are very robust and consistently remove the independently moving objects in the scenes, allowing for better learning of SVDE from videos. Additionally, we introduce a new adaptive quantization scheme that assigns the best per-pixel quantization curve for our depth discretization. Finally, we employ existing boosting techniques in a new way to further self-supervise the depth of the moving objects. With these features, our pipeline is robust against moving objects and generalizes well to high-resolution images, even when trained with small patches, yielding state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with almost 8.5x fewer parameters than the previous works that learn from videos. We present extensive experiments on KITTI and CityScapes that show the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Recently, much attention has been drawn to learning the underlying 3D structures of a scene from monocular videos in a fully self-supervised fashion. One of the most challenging aspects of this task is handling the independently moving objects as they break the rigid-scene assumption. For the first time, we show that pixel positional information can be exploited to learn SVDE (Single View Depth Estimation) from videos. Our proposed moving object (MO) masks, which are induced by shifted positional information (SPI) and referred to as `SPIMO' masks, are very robust and consistently remove the independently moving objects in the scenes, allowing for better learning of SVDE from videos. Additionally, we introduce a new adaptive quantization scheme that assigns the best per-pixel quantization curve for our depth discretization. Finally, we employ existing boosting techniques in a new way to further self-supervise the depth of the moving objects. With these features, our pipeline is robust against moving objects and generalizes well to high-resolution images, even when trained with small patches, yielding state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with almost 8.5x fewer parameters than the previous works that learn from videos. We present extensive experiments on KITTI and CityScapes that show the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们越来越关注以完全自我监督的方式从单目视频中学习场景的底层 3D 结构。这项任务最具挑战性的方面之一是处理独立移动的物体，因为它们打破了刚性场景的假设。我们首次展示了可以利用像素位置信息从视频中学习 SVDE（单视图深度估计）。我们提出的移动对象（MO）掩模是由移位位置信息（SPI）引起的，被称为“SPIMO”掩模，非常稳健，并且能够一致地去除场景中独立移动的物体，从而可以更好地从视频中学习 SVDE。此外，我们引入了一种新的自适应量化方案，该方案为深度离散化分配最佳的每像素量化曲线。最后，我们以一种新的方式利用现有的增强技术来进一步自我监督移动物体的深度。凭借这些功能，我们的管道对于移动物体具有很强的鲁棒性，并且即使使用小补丁进行训练，也能很好地推广到高分辨率图像，从而产生最先进的 (SOTA) 结果，其参数比之前从视频中学习的作品少了近 8.5 倍。我们在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 上进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用视频中像素位置信息进行自监督单视角深度估计（SVDE）的新方法，解决了移动物体对场景刚性假设的破坏问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频中独立移动物体时表现不佳，因其破坏了刚性场景假设，导致深度估计困难。本文旨在通过位置信息有效分离移动物体以提升SVDE性能。
AI.method: 提出SPIMO掩码通过位移位置信息（SPI）识别并移除移动物体；设计自适应量化方案优化深度离散化；结合提升技术对移动物体深度进行自监督学习。
AI.result: 在KITTI和CityScapes数据集上达到SOTA效果，参数量仅为先前视频学习方法的1/8.5，且在高分辨率图像和小块训练下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 基于位置信息的移动物体分离策略显著提升了视频深度估计的鲁棒性与泛化能力，为自监督SVDE提供了高效解决方案。

With these features, our pipeline is robust against moving objects and generalizes well to high-resolution images, even when trained with small patches, yielding state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with almost 8.5x fewer parameters than the previous works that learn from videos. We present extensive experiments on KITTI and CityScapes that show the effectiveness of our method. 最近，人们越来越关注以完全自我监督的方式从单目视频中学习场景的底层 3D 结构。这项任务最具挑战性的方面之一是处理独立移动的物体，因为它们打破了刚性场景的假设。我们首次展示了可以利用像素位置信息从视频中学习 SVDE（单视图深度估计）。我们提出的移动对象（MO）掩模是由移位位置信息（SPI）引起的，被称为“SPIMO”掩模，非常稳健，并且能够一致地去除场景中独立移动的物体，从而可以更好地从视频中学习 SVDE。此外，我们引入了一种新的自适应量化方案，该方案为深度离散化分配最佳的每像素量化曲线。最后，我们以一种新的方式利用现有的增强技术来进一步自我监督移动物体的深度。凭借这些功能，我们的管道对于移动物体具有很强的鲁棒性，并且即使使用小补丁进行训练，也能很好地推广到高分辨率图像，从而产生最先进的 (SOTA) 结果，其参数比之前从视频中学习的作品少了近 8.5 倍。我们在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 上进行了广泛的实验，证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种利用视频中像素位置信息进行自监督单视角深度估计（SVDE）的新方法，解决了移动物体对场景刚性假设的破坏问题。 Juan Luis Gonzalez Bello,Jaeho Moon,Munchurl Kim cs.CV,eess.IV

title: GPoeT-2: A GPT-2 Based Poem Generator
title_zh: GPoeT-2：基于 GPT-2 的诗歌生成器
comment: Carnegie Mellon University 11-785: Intro to Deep Learning Final Project
comments: Carnegie Mellon University 11-785: Intro to Deep Learning Final Project
abstract: This project aims to produce the next volume of machine-generated poetry, a complex art form that can be structured and unstructured, and carries depth in the meaning between the lines. GPoeT-2 is based on fine-tuning a state of the art natural language model (i.e. GPT-2) to generate limericks, typically humorous structured poems consisting of five lines with a AABBA rhyming scheme. With a two-stage generation system utilizing both forward and reverse language modeling, GPoeT-2 is capable of freely generating limericks in diverse topics while following the rhyming structure without any seed phrase or a posteriori constraints.Based on the automated generation process, we explore a wide variety of evaluation metrics to quantify "good poetry," including syntactical correctness, lexical diversity, and subject continuity. Finally, we present a collection of 94 categorized limericks that rank highly on the explored "good poetry" metrics to provoke human creativity.
summary: This project aims to produce the next volume of machine-generated poetry, a complex art form that can be structured and unstructured, and carries depth in the meaning between the lines. GPoeT-2 is based on fine-tuning a state of the art natural language model (i.e. GPT-2) to generate limericks, typically humorous structured poems consisting of five lines with a AABBA rhyming scheme. With a two-stage generation system utilizing both forward and reverse language modeling, GPoeT-2 is capable of freely generating limericks in diverse topics while following the rhyming structure without any seed phrase or a posteriori constraints.Based on the automated generation process, we explore a wide variety of evaluation metrics to quantify "good poetry," including syntactical correctness, lexical diversity, and subject continuity. Finally, we present a collection of 94 categorized limericks that rank highly on the explored "good poetry" metrics to provoke human creativity.
abstract_zh: 该项目旨在制作下一卷机器生成的诗歌，这是一种可以结构化和非结构化的复杂艺术形式，并且在字里行间蕴含着深度的意义。 GPoeT-2 基于微调最先进的自然语言模型（即 GPT-2）来生成打油诗，通常是由五行和 AABBA 押韵方案组成的幽默结构诗歌。凭借利用正向和反向语言建模的两阶段生成系统，GPoeT-2能够在没有任何助记词或后验约束的情况下自由生成不同主题的打油诗，同时遵循押韵结构。基于自动生成过程，我们探索了多种评估指标来量化“好诗歌”，包括句法正确性、词汇多样性和主题连续性。最后，我们呈现了 94 首分类打油诗的集合，这些打油诗在激发人类创造力的探索的“好诗歌”指标中排名很高。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出基于GPT-2模型的诗歌生成系统GPoeT-2，专注于生成符合AABBA押韵结构的幽默打油诗，并探索诗歌质量评估方法。
AI.motivation: 探索机器生成结构化诗歌的可能性，通过自动化评估体系量化诗歌质量标准，同时激发人类创作灵感。
AI.method: 采用两阶段生成机制结合正向与反向语言模型，无需种子短语或后期约束，通过语法正确性、词汇多样性等指标评估生成效果。
AI.result: 生成94首分类打油诗，这些作品在评估指标中表现优异，验证了模型生成符合结构要求的高质量诗歌的能力。
AI.conclusion: GPoeT-2证明了基于预训练语言模型生成结构化诗歌的可行性，其评估体系为机器诗歌创作提供了量化标准。
