title: RandoMix: A mixed sample data augmentation method with multiple mixed modes
title_zh: RandoMix：多种混合模式的混合样本数据增强方法
abstract: Data augmentation plays a crucial role in enhancing the robustness and performance of machine learning models across various domains. In this study, we introduce a novel mixed-sample data augmentation method called RandoMix. RandoMix is specifically designed to simultaneously address robustness and diversity challenges. It leverages a combination of linear and mask-mixed modes, introducing flexibility in candidate selection and weight adjustments. We evaluate the effectiveness of RandoMix on diverse datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet, and Google Speech Commands. Our results demonstrate its superior performance compared to existing techniques such as Mixup, CutMix, Fmix, and ResizeMix. Notably, RandoMix excels in enhancing model robustness against adversarial noise, natural noise, and sample occlusion. The comprehensive experimental results and insights into parameter tuning underscore the potential of RandoMix as a versatile and effective data augmentation method. Moreover, it seamlessly integrates into the training pipeline.
summary: Data augmentation plays a crucial role in enhancing the robustness and performance of machine learning models across various domains. In this study, we introduce a novel mixed-sample data augmentation method called RandoMix. RandoMix is specifically designed to simultaneously address robustness and diversity challenges. It leverages a combination of linear and mask-mixed modes, introducing flexibility in candidate selection and weight adjustments. We evaluate the effectiveness of RandoMix on diverse datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet, and Google Speech Commands. Our results demonstrate its superior performance compared to existing techniques such as Mixup, CutMix, Fmix, and ResizeMix. Notably, RandoMix excels in enhancing model robustness against adversarial noise, natural noise, and sample occlusion. The comprehensive experimental results and insights into parameter tuning underscore the potential of RandoMix as a versatile and effective data augmentation method. Moreover, it seamlessly integrates into the training pipeline.
abstract_zh: 数据增强在增强各个领域的机器学习模型的稳健性和性能方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在本研究中，我们介绍了一种称为 RandoMix 的新型混合样本数据增强方法。 RandoMix 专为同时解决稳健性和多样性挑战而设计。它利用线性和掩模混合模式的组合，为候选选择和权重调整引入了灵活性。我们评估了 RandoMix 在不同数据集上的有效性，包括 CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet、ImageNet 和 Google Speech Commands。我们的结果表明，与 Mixup、CutMix、Fmix 和 ResizeMix 等现有技术相比，其具有卓越的性能。值得注意的是，RandoMix 擅长增强模型针对对抗性噪声、自然噪声和样本遮挡的鲁棒性。全面的实验结果和对参数调整的见解强调了 RandoMix 作为一种多功能且有效的数据增强方法的潜力。此外，它无缝集成到培训管道中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RandoMix的混合样本数据增强方法，旨在提升机器学习模型的鲁棒性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法（如Mixup、CutMix等）在应对对抗噪声、自然噪声及样本遮挡等挑战时存在局限性，需更灵活的混合模式以兼顾模型鲁棒性与多样性。
AI.method: RandoMix结合线性混合与掩码混合模式，通过动态候选样本选择和权重调整机制，实现多模式混合增强。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet、ImageNet及Google Speech Commands等数据集上，RandoMix在鲁棒性指标上优于现有方法，尤其在对抗噪声和遮挡场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: RandoMix通过多模式混合策略有效提升了模型鲁棒性与多样性，且易于集成到训练流程中，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: RandoMix: A mixed sample data augmentation method with multiple mixed modes RandoMix：多种混合模式的混合样本数据增强方法 Data augmentation plays a crucial role in enhancing the robustness and performance of machine learning models across various domains. In this study, we introduce a novel mixed-sample data augmentation method called RandoMix. RandoMix is specifically designed to simultaneously address robustness and diversity challenges. It leverages a combination of linear and mask-mixed modes, introducing flexibility in candidate selection and weight adjustments. We evaluate the effectiveness of RandoMix on diverse datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet, and Google Speech Commands. Our results demonstrate its superior performance compared to existing techniques such as Mixup, CutMix, Fmix, and ResizeMix. Notably, RandoMix excels in enhancing model robustness against adversarial noise, natural noise, and sample occlusion. The comprehensive experimental results and insights into parameter tuning underscore the potential of RandoMix as a versatile and effective data augmentation method. Moreover, it seamlessly integrates into the training pipeline. 数据增强在增强各个领域的机器学习模型的稳健性和性能方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在本研究中，我们介绍了一种称为 RandoMix 的新型混合样本数据增强方法。 RandoMix 专为同时解决稳健性和多样性挑战而设计。它利用线性和掩模混合模式的组合，为候选选择和权重调整引入了灵活性。我们评估了 RandoMix 在不同数据集上的有效性，包括 CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet、ImageNet 和 Google Speech Commands。我们的结果表明，与 Mixup、CutMix、Fmix 和 ResizeMix 等现有技术相比，其具有卓越的性能。值得注意的是，RandoMix 擅长增强模型针对对抗性噪声、自然噪声和样本遮挡的鲁棒性。全面的实验结果和对参数调整的见解强调了 RandoMix 作为一种多功能且有效的数据增强方法的潜力。此外，它无缝集成到培训管道中。 本文提出了一种名为RandoMix的混合样本数据增强方法，旨在提升机器学习模型的鲁棒性和多样性。 Xiaoliang Liu,Furao Shen,Jian Zhao,Changhai Nie cs.CV

title: $(O,G)$-granular variable precision fuzzy rough sets based on overlap and grouping functions
title_zh: $(O,G)$-基于重叠和分组函数的粒度变精度模糊粗糙集
abstract: Since Bustince et al. introduced the concepts of overlap and grouping functions, these two types of aggregation functions have attracted a lot of interest in both theory and applications. In this paper, the depiction of $(O,G)$-granular variable precision fuzzy rough sets ($(O,G)$-GVPFRSs for short) is first given based on overlap and grouping functions. Meanwhile, to work out the approximation operators efficiently, we give another expression of upper and lower approximation operators by means of fuzzy implications and co-implications. Furthermore, starting from the perspective of construction methods, $(O,G)$-GVPFRSs are represented under diverse fuzzy relations. Finally, some conclusions on the granular variable precision fuzzy rough sets (GVPFRSs for short) are extended to $(O,G)$-GVPFRSs under some additional conditions.
summary: Since Bustince et al. introduced the concepts of overlap and grouping functions, these two types of aggregation functions have attracted a lot of interest in both theory and applications. In this paper, the depiction of $(O,G)$-granular variable precision fuzzy rough sets ($(O,G)$-GVPFRSs for short) is first given based on overlap and grouping functions. Meanwhile, to work out the approximation operators efficiently, we give another expression of upper and lower approximation operators by means of fuzzy implications and co-implications. Furthermore, starting from the perspective of construction methods, $(O,G)$-GVPFRSs are represented under diverse fuzzy relations. Finally, some conclusions on the granular variable precision fuzzy rough sets (GVPFRSs for short) are extended to $(O,G)$-GVPFRSs under some additional conditions.
abstract_zh: 自从Bustince等人。引入了重叠函数和分组函数的概念，这两类聚合函数在理论和应用上都引起了人们的广泛兴趣。本文首先基于重叠函数和分组函数给出了$(O,G)$-粒度变精度模糊粗糙集(简称$(O,G)$-GVPFRSs)的描述。同时，为了有效地求解近似算子，我们利用模糊蕴涵和共蕴涵给出了上下近似算子的另一种表达式。此外，从构造方法的角度出发，$(O,G)$-GVPFRS在多种模糊关系下表示。最后，在一些附加条件下，将粒变精度模糊粗糙集（简称GVPFRS）的一些结论推广到$(O,G)$-GVPFRS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于重叠函数和分组函数的$(O,G)$-粒度可变精度模糊粗糙集模型，并探讨其近似算子及不同模糊关系下的表示方法。
AI.motivation: 重叠函数和分组函数在理论与应用中备受关注，但其在模糊粗糙集理论中的结合研究尚不充分，需进一步拓展相关模型与方法。
AI.method: 通过引入重叠函数与分组函数构建$(O,G)$-GVPFRS模型，利用模糊蕴含与共蕴含重新表达近似算子，并基于不同模糊关系进行模型表示。
AI.result: 提出$(O,G)$-GVPFRS的定义与近似算子新表达，实现多模糊关系下的模型表示，并扩展了GVPFRS的部分结论至新模型。
AI.conclusion: 在附加条件下，将传统GVPFRS的结论推广至$(O,G)$-GVPFRS，为模糊粗糙集理论提供了新的分析工具与研究方向。

title: A Regression Approach to Learning-Augmented Online Algorithms
title_zh: 学习增强在线算法的回归方法
abstract: The emerging field of learning-augmented online algorithms uses ML techniques to predict future input parameters and thereby improve the performance of online algorithms. Since these parameters are, in general, real-valued functions, a natural approach is to use regression techniques to make these predictions. We introduce this approach in this paper, and explore it in the context of a general online search framework that captures classic problems like (generalized) ski rental, bin packing, minimum makespan scheduling, etc. We show nearly tight bounds on the sample complexity of this regression problem, and extend our results to the agnostic setting. From a technical standpoint, we show that the key is to incorporate online optimization benchmarks in the design of the loss function for the regression problem, thereby diverging from the use of off-the-shelf regression tools with standard bounds on statistical error.
summary: The emerging field of learning-augmented online algorithms uses ML techniques to predict future input parameters and thereby improve the performance of online algorithms. Since these parameters are, in general, real-valued functions, a natural approach is to use regression techniques to make these predictions. We introduce this approach in this paper, and explore it in the context of a general online search framework that captures classic problems like (generalized) ski rental, bin packing, minimum makespan scheduling, etc. We show nearly tight bounds on the sample complexity of this regression problem, and extend our results to the agnostic setting. From a technical standpoint, we show that the key is to incorporate online optimization benchmarks in the design of the loss function for the regression problem, thereby diverging from the use of off-the-shelf regression tools with standard bounds on statistical error.
abstract_zh: 学习增强在线算法的新兴领域使用机器学习技术来预测未来的输入参数，从而提高在线算法的性能。由于这些参数通常是实值函数，因此自然的方法是使用回归技术来进行这些预测。我们在本文中介绍了这种方法，并在通用在线搜索框架的背景下对其进行了探索，该框架捕获了（广义）滑雪设备租赁、装箱、最小完工时间安排等经典问题。我们显示了该回归问题的样本复杂性的近乎严格的界限，并将我们的结果扩展到不可知的设置。从技术角度来看，我们表明关键是将在线优化基准纳入回归问题的损失函数的设计中，从而不同于使用具有统计误差标准界限的现成回归工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于回归方法的学习增强型在线算法，旨在通过预测未来输入参数提升在线算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统在线算法在面对不确定输入时性能受限，而引入机器学习预测未来参数可提升算法表现，但如何有效整合回归方法仍需探索。
AI.method: 通过回归技术预测实值函数，并在回归损失函数中引入在线优化基准，以替代传统回归工具的统计误差分析。
AI.result: 证明了回归问题样本复杂度的近似紧界，并在无先验情况下扩展了结果，表明方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合在线优化基准改进回归模型设计，为学习增强型在线算法提供了理论支持和实用框架，推动了在线学习与机器学习的融合。

title: Customizing ML Predictions for Online Algorithms
title_zh: 为在线算法定制 ML 预测
abstract: A popular line of recent research incorporates ML advice in the design of online algorithms to improve their performance in typical instances. These papers treat the ML algorithm as a black-box, and redesign online algorithms to take advantage of ML predictions. In this paper, we ask the complementary question: can we redesign ML algorithms to provide better predictions for online algorithms? We explore this question in the context of the classic rent-or-buy problem, and show that incorporating optimization benchmarks in ML loss functions leads to significantly better performance, while maintaining a worst-case adversarial result when the advice is completely wrong. We support this finding both through theoretical bounds and numerical simulations.
summary: A popular line of recent research incorporates ML advice in the design of online algorithms to improve their performance in typical instances. These papers treat the ML algorithm as a black-box, and redesign online algorithms to take advantage of ML predictions. In this paper, we ask the complementary question: can we redesign ML algorithms to provide better predictions for online algorithms? We explore this question in the context of the classic rent-or-buy problem, and show that incorporating optimization benchmarks in ML loss functions leads to significantly better performance, while maintaining a worst-case adversarial result when the advice is completely wrong. We support this finding both through theoretical bounds and numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 最近的一项流行研究将机器学习建议纳入在线算法的设计中，以提高其在典型情况下的性能。这些论文将 ML 算法视为黑匣子，并重新设计在线算法以利用 ML 预测。在本文中，我们提出了一个补充问题：我们能否重新设计机器学习算法来为在线算法提供更好的预测？我们在经典的租或买问题的背景下探讨了这个问题，并表明，在 ML 损失函数中纳入优化基准可以带来显着更好的性能，同时在建议完全错误时保持最坏情况的对抗结果。我们通过理论界限和数值模拟支持这一发现。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过优化机器学习算法的损失函数，为在线算法提供更精准的预测，以提升其性能并保持对抗性鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将机器学习作为黑盒用于在线算法设计，但未考虑反向优化ML模型本身以适配算法需求，导致预测可能不精确。
AI.method: 在经典租用或购买问题中，将在线算法的优化基准纳入机器学习损失函数，通过理论分析与数值模拟验证效果。
AI.result: 改进后的ML预测显著提升在线算法性能，同时保证预测完全错误时仍能保持最坏情况下的对抗性结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过定制化机器学习预测可有效增强在线算法性能，为结合ML与在线算法设计提供新思路。

motivation: 现有研究将机器学习作为黑盒用于在线算法设计，但未考虑反向优化ML模型本身以适配算法需求，导致预测可能不精确。

conclusion: 通过定制化机器学习预测可有效增强在线算法性能，为结合ML与在线算法设计提供新思路。
search_text: Customizing ML Predictions for Online Algorithms 为在线算法定制 ML 预测 A popular line of recent research incorporates ML advice in the design of online algorithms to improve their performance in typical instances. These papers treat the ML algorithm as a black-box, and redesign online algorithms to take advantage of ML predictions. In this paper, we ask the complementary question: can we redesign ML algorithms to provide better predictions for online algorithms? We explore this question in the context of the classic rent-or-buy problem, and show that incorporating optimization benchmarks in ML loss functions leads to significantly better performance, while maintaining a worst-case adversarial result when the advice is completely wrong. We support this finding both through theoretical bounds and numerical simulations. 最近的一项流行研究将机器学习建议纳入在线算法的设计中，以提高其在典型情况下的性能。这些论文将 ML 算法视为黑匣子，并重新设计在线算法以利用 ML 预测。在本文中，我们提出了一个补充问题：我们能否重新设计机器学习算法来为在线算法提供更好的预测？我们在经典的租或买问题的背景下探讨了这个问题，并表明，在 ML 损失函数中纳入优化基准可以带来显着更好的性能，同时在建议完全错误时保持最坏情况的对抗结果。我们通过理论界限和数值模拟支持这一发现。 本文探讨如何通过优化机器学习算法的损失函数，为在线算法提供更精准的预测，以提升其性能并保持对抗性鲁棒性。 Keerti Anand,Rong Ge,Debmalya Panigrahi cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Jaeyoung Yoo,Hojun Lee,Seunghyeon Seo,Inseop Chung,Nojun Kwak
title: End-to-End Multi-Object Detection with a Regularized Mixture Model
title_zh: 使用正则化混合模型的端到端多目标检测
abstract: Recent end-to-end multi-object detectors simplify the inference pipeline by removing hand-crafted processes such as non-maximum suppression (NMS). However, during training, they still heavily rely on heuristics and hand-crafted processes which deteriorate the reliability of the predicted confidence score. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to train an end-to-end multi-object detector consisting of only two terms: negative log-likelihood (NLL) and a regularization term. In doing so, the multi-object detection problem is treated as density estimation of the ground truth bounding boxes utilizing a regularized mixture density model. The proposed \textit{end-to-end multi-object Detection with a Regularized Mixture Model} (D-RMM) is trained by minimizing the NLL with the proposed regularization term, maximum component maximization (MCM) loss, preventing duplicate predictions. Our method reduces the heuristics of the training process and improves the reliability of the predicted confidence score. Moreover, our D-RMM outperforms the previous end-to-end detectors on MS COCO dataset.
summary: Recent end-to-end multi-object detectors simplify the inference pipeline by removing hand-crafted processes such as non-maximum suppression (NMS). However, during training, they still heavily rely on heuristics and hand-crafted processes which deteriorate the reliability of the predicted confidence score. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to train an end-to-end multi-object detector consisting of only two terms: negative log-likelihood (NLL) and a regularization term. In doing so, the multi-object detection problem is treated as density estimation of the ground truth bounding boxes utilizing a regularized mixture density model. The proposed \textit{end-to-end multi-object Detection with a Regularized Mixture Model} (D-RMM) is trained by minimizing the NLL with the proposed regularization term, maximum component maximization (MCM) loss, preventing duplicate predictions. Our method reduces the heuristics of the training process and improves the reliability of the predicted confidence score. Moreover, our D-RMM outperforms the previous end-to-end detectors on MS COCO dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的端到端多目标检测器通过消除非极大值抑制 (NMS) 等手工流程来简化推理流程。然而，在训练过程中，他们仍然严重依赖启发式和手工制作的过程，这降低了预测置信度得分的可靠性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来训练仅包含两项的端到端多目标检测器：负对数似然（NLL）和正则化项。在此过程中，多目标检测问题被视为利用正则化混合密度模型的地面真实边界框的密度估计。所提出的 \textit{使用正则化混合模型的端到端多目标检测}（D-RMM）是通过使用所提出的正则化项、最大分量最大化（MCM）损失来最小化 NLL 来进行训练的，从而防止重复预测。我们的方法减少了训练过程的启发式操作并提高了预测置信度得分的可靠性。此外，我们的 D-RMM 在 MS COCO 数据集上的性能优于之前的端到端检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端多目标检测框架D-RMM，通过正则化混合密度模型解决检测中的置信度可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端检测器虽简化推理流程，但训练阶段仍依赖手工设计的启发式方法，导致预测置信度不可靠。
AI.method: 构建仅含负对数似然（NLL）和正则化项的训练框架，将检测建模为带最大成分最大化（MCM）损失的密度估计问题。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上优于现有端到端检测器，有效减少重复预测并提升置信度可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过消除训练阶段的启发式依赖，D-RMM在保持端到端优势的同时显著提升了检测性能与置信度可靠性。

title: CARNet: A Dynamic Autoencoder for Learning Latent Dynamics in Autonomous Driving Tasks
title_zh: CARNet：用于学习自动驾驶任务中潜在动态的动态自动编码器
comment: 13 pages, 14 figures, 8 tables, removed submission info, bios
comments: 13 pages, 14 figures, 8 tables, removed submission info, bios
abstract: Autonomous driving has received a lot of attention in the automotive industry and is often seen as the future of transportation. Passenger vehicles equipped with a wide array of sensors (e.g., cameras, front-facing radars, LiDARs, and IMUs) capable of continuous perception of the environment are becoming increasingly prevalent. These sensors provide a stream of high-dimensional, temporally correlated data that is essential for reliable autonomous driving. An autonomous driving system should effectively use the information collected from the various sensors in order to form an abstract description of the world and maintain situational awareness. Deep learning models, such as autoencoders, can be used for that purpose, as they can learn compact latent representations from a stream of incoming data. However, most autoencoder models process the data independently, without assuming any temporal interdependencies. Thus, there is a need for deep learning models that explicitly consider the temporal dependence of the data in their architecture. This work proposes CARNet, a Combined dynAmic autoencodeR NETwork architecture that utilizes an autoencoder combined with a recurrent neural network to learn the current latent representation and, in addition, also predict future latent representations in the context of autonomous driving. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed model in both imitation and reinforcement learning settings using both simulated and real datasets. Our results show that the proposed model outperforms the baseline state-of-the-art model, while having significantly fewer trainable parameters.
summary: Autonomous driving has received a lot of attention in the automotive industry and is often seen as the future of transportation. Passenger vehicles equipped with a wide array of sensors (e.g., cameras, front-facing radars, LiDARs, and IMUs) capable of continuous perception of the environment are becoming increasingly prevalent. These sensors provide a stream of high-dimensional, temporally correlated data that is essential for reliable autonomous driving. An autonomous driving system should effectively use the information collected from the various sensors in order to form an abstract description of the world and maintain situational awareness. Deep learning models, such as autoencoders, can be used for that purpose, as they can learn compact latent representations from a stream of incoming data. However, most autoencoder models process the data independently, without assuming any temporal interdependencies. Thus, there is a need for deep learning models that explicitly consider the temporal dependence of the data in their architecture. This work proposes CARNet, a Combined dynAmic autoencodeR NETwork architecture that utilizes an autoencoder combined with a recurrent neural network to learn the current latent representation and, in addition, also predict future latent representations in the context of autonomous driving. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed model in both imitation and reinforcement learning settings using both simulated and real datasets. Our results show that the proposed model outperforms the baseline state-of-the-art model, while having significantly fewer trainable parameters.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶在汽车行业受到广泛关注，通常被视为交通的未来。配备各种能够持续感知环境的传感器（例如摄像头、前置雷达、激光雷达和 IMU）的乘用车变得越来越普遍。这些传感器提供高维、时间相关的数据流，这对于可靠的自动驾驶至关重要。自动驾驶系统应有效地利用从各种传感器收集的信息，以形成对世界的抽象描述并保持态势感知。深度学习模型（例如自动编码器）可用于此目的，因为它们可以从传入数据流中学习紧凑的潜在表示。然而，大多数自动编码器模型独立处理数据，不假设任何时间相互依赖性。因此，深度学习模型需要在其架构中明确考虑数据的时间依赖性。这项工作提出了 CARNet，一种组合动态自动编码网络架构，它利用自动编码器与循环神经网络相结合来学习当前的潜在表示，此外还可以预测自动驾驶背景下的未来潜在表示。我们使用模拟和真实数据集证明了所提出的模型在模仿和强化学习设置中的有效性。我们的结果表明，所提出的模型优于基线最先进模型，同时可训练参数显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARNet，一种结合自编码器和循环神经网络的动态模型，用于在自动驾驶任务中学习环境潜在动态表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自编码器未能有效捕捉自动驾驶中传感器数据的时间依赖性，而时间信息对环境感知和决策至关重要。
AI.method: 设计CARNet架构，将自编码器与循环神经网络结合，同时学习当前潜在状态并预测未来潜在状态，以建模时间相关性。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实数据集的模仿学习与强化学习实验中，CARNet在性能上优于现有先进模型且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: CARNet通过显式建模时间动态，为自动驾驶提供了更高效、更精确的环境表示学习方法。

title: It Isn't Sh!tposting, It's My CAT Posting
title_zh: 这不是垃圾贴，这是我的猫贴
abstract: In this paper, we describe a novel architecture which can generate hilarious captions for a given input image. The architecture is split into two halves, i.e. image captioning and hilarious text conversion. The architecture starts with a pre-trained CNN model, VGG16 in this implementation, and applies attention LSTM on it to generate normal caption. These normal captions then are fed forward to our hilarious text conversion transformer which converts this text into something hilarious while maintaining the context of the input image. The architecture can also be split into two halves and only the seq2seq transformer can be used to generate hilarious caption by inputting a sentence.This paper aims to help everyday user to be more lazy and hilarious at the same time by generating captions using CATNet.
summary: In this paper, we describe a novel architecture which can generate hilarious captions for a given input image. The architecture is split into two halves, i.e. image captioning and hilarious text conversion. The architecture starts with a pre-trained CNN model, VGG16 in this implementation, and applies attention LSTM on it to generate normal caption. These normal captions then are fed forward to our hilarious text conversion transformer which converts this text into something hilarious while maintaining the context of the input image. The architecture can also be split into two halves and only the seq2seq transformer can be used to generate hilarious caption by inputting a sentence.This paper aims to help everyday user to be more lazy and hilarious at the same time by generating captions using CATNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种新颖的架构，它可以为给定的输入图像生成搞笑的标题。该架构分为两部分，即图像字幕和搞笑文本转换。该架构从预训练的 CNN 模型（在此实现中为 VGG16）开始，并在其上应用注意力 LSTM 来生成正常的字幕。然后，这些普通的标题会被转发到我们搞笑的文本转换转换器，该转换器将这些文本转换成搞笑的内容，同时保持输入图像的上下文。该架构还可以分为两半，仅使用 seq2seq 转换器即可通过输入句子来生成搞笑的标题。本文旨在通过使用 CATNet 生成标题来帮助日常用户同时变得更加懒惰和搞笑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CATNet的新型架构，通过结合图像描述生成和幽默文本转换，为输入图像生成搞笑的字幕。
AI.motivation: 旨在帮助日常用户在无需费力的情况下生成幽默内容，提升娱乐性和表达效率。
AI.method: 采用预训练CNN（VGG16）结合注意力LSTM生成常规字幕，再通过序列到序列的Transformer模型将其转换为幽默文本，同时保持图像上下文。
AI.result: 成功实现图像到搞笑字幕的生成，验证了该架构在保持语境的同时提升幽默效果的能力。
AI.conclusion: CATNet通过分阶段处理有效结合了图像理解和幽默生成，为用户提供了一种懒人式幽默内容创作工具。
